name: Fellow American, are you still a Republican?
subject: The liberal media is claiming patriots are leaving the Republican Party in droves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
That can’t be true
Fellow American, we're PANICKING after reading this headline...

**[URGENT:_The number of Americans identifying as Republican is the lowest it has been in a decade -- (from Gallup Polling)_](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d454db9615fe4375bfd31e31337d511b&_e=VlOFuBzpEDOb71KcmeqKZi5r8eYA3nN3qN7Rby0wZUIcrsl_XFovlsy4zCOTAvb_bvJSghtKJPZDkq1KJmjPkHF5a-vAaXcM9QMKLq-2SPP5WE6oxIx2gkTXbQSQGwVbaQXCaQwfmQgGf5XHZbGnmR64I8Erg-scUsG4vpznT0siwyRMiogGNKdIU9WrqvY5vdW7ZsCDolrxf9Ux5gaiR6AiEKkfkCQLfACGixKJwuZZI14PzYC_2ENOgULuET6-y5V4mlquKvUU8ucZbxqk39Fd5-ja53te9_4Q4kUN3NnnHaZFoZ0682eLmUZFokog-UYvRM3pEjSa55eCQD1VG0mJlSB3HQrswpSQsPFotVlvAdUBZ1CEKe4hXQCY8hnZlbQVcBQDIA1BQZdz4R-Ov3b9x3NKm9E7esxoaY_2KdfWNh1Pvhkq7S8vCBHC7BXp2lJK7NV7DXwUESr6q4MCfA%3D%3D)**

We need to know whether or not we still have you in our corner, Fellow American.

Liberal media outlets are claiming that patriots are "leaving the party in droves." If this is true, we'll be helpless to stop the socialist Far-Left from taking back control, and our country will be doomed.

**[Please do not delay in responding to this message as soon as possible. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102554127/529544172/1080914824?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_022125_1_1_JohnsonSpotlight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTdlNjFhNy1iM2YwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfINOfqvZINg6SkcDadX6ANZMH7gVu_nPIvTYUEewoA=) Here at the Democratic Party of Georgia, we celebrate Black leaders not just during Black History Month, but 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Today, we want to put the spotlight on Georgia’s very own Rep. Hank Jonson.

Congressman Hank Johnson of Georgia's 4th District is known as one of the most effective Democrats in Congress.

He’s built a stellar reputation as a true champion for civil rights, judicial transparency, and safe communities.

And since being elected in 2007, he’s been committed to fighting for hard-working families and communities all across the state.

We are honored to have Hank Johnson representing Georgians in Congress, and we are so proud to support him as well as other Black Democratic champions for justice!

name: Josh Weil
subject: STOP the cuts to cancer research
body:
| |
---
We can turn things around on April 1 by flipping this seat and winning this special election. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODMyMzIyNDkyLFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiYTE4MWQ3YWE2MzA0MjFlMSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODM3NTY1MzczLFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiNmEyMDBkYjE0ZDkwZGFmYyJ9)
---
|
---
Friend,

Donald Trump back in the Oval Office has been exactly the disaster that so many of us foresaw.

But while the gaslighting, fear-mongering, and strongman act has been predictable, there have been some surprises:

**Trump cutting off funding to NIH and the CDC, and restricting access to crucial, life-saving medical research, treatments, and clinical trials for cancer researchers is**** _cruel beyond measure_****, even for MAGA.**

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODQxNzU5Njc4LFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiM2JkNDg3NzA0OTRlNDllZSJ9)
---
|
---
Cancer can affect anyone. It respects no class, race, or political position. There is no reason anyone should want to disrupt cancer research—Trump is simply a deranged madman who cares only about himself, his wealth, and wielding power over others.

With Trump and Musk given a blank check by the GOP-controlled Congress, so many important programs and vulnerable people have been put at risk. __

But we can change all that__. On April 1, voters in my district in Florida will be going to the polls to make their voices heard in this special election. **And with your support, they will send me—a public school teacher and father of two young boys—to Congress to put a stop to Trump’s lunacy.**

|
---
[Will you help me get there? We have less than 45 days to do the work it would take a normal campaign to do in nearly six months—which is why I am personally asking if you will chip in any amount to send me to Congress to stop Trump’s cruelty:](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODQ1OTUzOTg1LFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiNGM2M2ZkZDA1MjVmYzE2OCJ9)
|
---
| | [ STOP TRUMP'S CRUELTY >>
](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODUwMTQ4MjkwLFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiOGRhMzlkODJkYjcxYWJlYiJ9)
---
|
---
**[_Or multiply your impact with a monthly contribution_](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODU0MzQyNTk1LFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiZjJhNTQ2NzIwZjZjMjMzMCJ9)**
|
---
It’s time to rise up and say enough is enough. Thank you for doing your part at this critical hour.

Sincerely,

Josh Weil
Democrat for Florida’s 6th

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ2OTkzNzkzODU5NTg1NDc4LFwiclwiOjE0Njk5Mzg1NDQzNDc3MjA0NH0iLCJzIjoiZTYxMGZkNjUzNzk0NzVlMyJ9)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Standing together against Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter, this past Monday I joined hundreds of community-minded citizens in front of the Napa 9/11 memorial to celebrate democracy, the rule of law, and our American flag. The crowd was enthusiastic and energetic, with signs and voices asserting their concerns about the current Administration’s undermining of our democracy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102554524/529550677/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250221_PT_WeThePepple_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTFhNDRiZS1iNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Wy-ZCIU5WTqUlyzPzcySKV9lcfML8GEOUw-nI3mLqA=&emci=ed0d7468-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0a1a44be-b5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)
_Passionate, foresightful 13-year-old girls painted the pictures included in the photos above from the We the People event._
Several speakers at the event urged the crowd to speak up and take action — **and I couldn’t agree more.** In times like these, it becomes more important than ever that we gather together, and employ our fundamental right to assembly and freedom of speech to call out those threatening our democracy.

Democracy is for the people and **by the people.** It only works when each of us does our part. We must remain active and engaged to hold those attempting to take control accountable.

I was so proud to be a part of a crowd with such a strong spirit who are determined to push back against the chaos we’re witnessing today.

**We need all hands on deck if we’re going to win this fight. I need your support, Peter, now more than ever.

_[If you stand with us, sign our petition here. We need 2,000 signatures to show the current Administration that we don’t stand for the undermining of our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102554526/529550678/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250221_PT_WeThePepple_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTFhNDRiZS1iNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Wy-ZCIU5WTqUlyzPzcySKV9lcfML8GEOUw-nI3mLqA=&emci=ed0d7468-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0a1a44be-b5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)_**
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102554528/529550679/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250221_PT_WeThePepple_0_New_MikeThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTFhNDRiZS1iNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Wy-ZCIU5WTqUlyzPzcySKV9lcfML8GEOUw-nI3mLqA=&emci=ed0d7468-68f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0a1a44be-b5f0-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)**
Thank you,

Mike Thompson

name: Dave Min
subject: How we won a close victory in 2024:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Our proven strategy in California |

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102556528/529572685/1841815421?refcode=20250221_FR_90DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjAxNGY2NS1jNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzKyyG6mGx-iQ19BQn66tULw6Dv8zI-_kHMhwWIusJk=) Hi there — I’m newly elected Congressman Dave Min. Last November, I was elected in CA-47 to replace outgoing Rep. Katie Porter in **one of the closest Congressional races across the entire state and country.** We were rated as a “tossup” by numerous election forecasters. Plenty of talking heads and pundits thought this seat was one of the blue districts that would flip red. **[But we won a close victory. Because Democrats like you supported our strategy that centered early grassroots organizing and people power. Now, we have an opportunity in front of us to run the same successful playbook again and retake the U.S. House. Will you split a donation between my swing seat campaign and the California Democratic Party today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102556529/529572686/1841815421?refcode=20250221_FR_90DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjAxNGY2NS1jNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzKyyG6mGx-iQ19BQn66tULw6Dv8zI-_kHMhwWIusJk=)** The 2024 election was extremely disappointing in the Presidential race. But here in California, **_we defied the national environment_** and flipped three seats from red to blue — all while defending vulnerable blue districts like mine in CA-47. But these races weren’t a foregone conclusion. Many of them were incredibly close, including my own race. Aren’t convinced? _Take a look below_ : [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102556530/529572687/1841815421?refcode=20250221_FR_90DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjAxNGY2NS1jNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzKyyG6mGx-iQ19BQn66tULw6Dv8zI-_kHMhwWIusJk=) **51% to 49%, it doesn’t get much closer than that.** If we hadn’t had early support from volunteers, organizers, and grassroots donors, this race might’ve gone a very different way. _Republicans could’ve flipped this seat and expanded their House Majority_. Instead, we won critical races and Republicans went into 2025 with one of the smallest majorities in our country’s history. And it’s because folks like you pitch in $35 or $55 to open regional offices, hire staff, print literature, and mobilize long before Election Day. **[Now, we have the chance to run this winning playbook again and take back the U.S. House. Will you power our early grassroots efforts with a donation today? It will be split between my toss-up seat campaign and the California Democratic Party.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102556531/529572688/1841815421?refcode=20250221_FR_90DO_MinSurrogate&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjAxNGY2NS1jNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzKyyG6mGx-iQ19BQn66tULw6Dv8zI-_kHMhwWIusJk=)** [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102556532/529572689/1841815421?&refcode=20250221_FR_90DO_MinSurrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjAxNGY2NS1jNWYwLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzKyyG6mGx-iQ19BQn66tULw6Dv8zI-_kHMhwWIusJk=)

clean_body: Our proven strategy in California | | = Hi there — I’m newly elected Congressman Dave Min. Last November, I was elected in CA-47 to replace outgoing Rep. Katie Porter in one of the closest Congressional races across the entire state and country. We were rated as a “tossup” by numerous election forecasters. Plenty of talking heads and pundits thought this seat was one of the blue districts that would flip red. = The 2024 election was extremely disappointing in the Presidential race. But here in California, we defied the national environment and flipped three seats from red to blue — all while defending vulnerable blue districts like mine in CA-47. But these races weren’t a foregone conclusion. Many of them were incredibly close, including my own race. Aren’t convinced? Take a look below : = 51% to 49%, it doesn’t get much closer than that. If we hadn’t had early support from volunteers, organizers, and grassroots donors, this race might’ve gone a very different way. Republicans could’ve flipped this seat and expanded their House Majority. Instead, we won critical races and Republicans went into 2025 with one of the smallest majorities in our country’s history. And it’s because folks like you pitch in $35 or $55 to open regional offices, hire staff, print literature, and mobilize long before Election Day. = = = = = = Thank you so much for your support in the past and going forward. When Democrats take back the U.S. House, and put a “check” on Donald Trump, it will be because of you. Yours, \- Dave Min | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. | I recently made headlines with my $47.45 billion offer to acquire TikTok. This move is not just about a business deal; it's about securing a key platform for America's future and safeguarding our national interests. [**WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW**](https://rasner4wy.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6915dcf45e69335acd266178e&id=1d47fc1daa&e=9e637674b4)

* **Make TikTok American:** Ensuring TikTok is under American control.
* **Protecting National Security:** Cutting off China’s influence and securing American’s data.
* **Boosting Jobs and Wyoming’s Economy:** Creating thousands of high-paying jobs in Wyoming.
* **Standing Up for Free Speech:** Protecting Americans' First Amendment rights.

Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can make this vision a reality and ensure America's secure, prosperous future.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: General Milley Cover-Up
body:
HUGE: Kash Patel Confirmed!

[INSIDE JW]

KASH PATEL Kash Must Return the FBI to Legitimate Law Enforcement

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=34587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj14M1paNVhLeGNEWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0adc183947ac6afe61bb3a6d41e20d350611c17b4f6377a2d3136cfe76a3c7c1]

As perhaps the nation’s leading Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
litigant against the FBI on its corruption issues, we congratulate
Kash Patel on his confirmation as Director of the FBI.

Kash Patel is a patriot and a fighter. It was a scandal his
confirmation took this long.

I consider Kash a friend, and he is the perfect choice to reform the
FBI. Kash will bring transparency and accountability back to an agency
that became irredeemably corrupt and the tip of the spear of
unfettered lawfare against any American seen as a threat to the ruling
class. From sitting on Hunter Biden’s laptop to influence the 2020
election, the raid of President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home, and the
censorship of Americans, to the targeting of traditional Catholics,
the FBI has shown itself as a tainted domestic and intelligence
service. Kash Patel has his work set out for him.

Under its previous leadership, the FBI became the enemy of
transparency, the rule of law, constitutional government, and the
civil rights of tens of millions of Americans. (Judicial Watch and I
witnessed firsthand the corruption of Wray’s operation when FBI
agents came to my home in what was obvious retaliation for our
criticism and lawsuits exposing their abuses.)

Kash Patel should open wide the FBI’s files and expose its abuses of
power targeting Trump and countless other American citizens. Along
with bringing transparency and accountability back to the FBI, Kash
will return the agency to its core mission, legitimate law
enforcement, that will protect the rights of law-abiding Americans and
prosecute legitimate crimes.

Kash will be a welcome breath of fresh air for which we will all be
grateful.

Here are examples of our work on FBI corruption that we hope Kash
Patel addresses with transparency and accountability:

* In October 2024, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=33761&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdHMtY3JpdGljYWwtb2YtdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1f70b14a50ed1b4a9fae9f9ef2b7768841ff3c9e3af3e860debb79bcf481eb6b]
the Justice
Department for messages among top leaders of the FBI referencing
social media posts of Special Agent Jeffrey Veltri
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=33735&F=T&&hash=02c0ef77260f257edbaa377c5a2fc7aae006cbf8b86e990ff4d94d2e6d5fea3d],
head of the Miami Field Office, which is investigating the September
15 assassination attempt against Donald Trump.
* In May 2024, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=32339&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmFpZC1vZi10cnVtcHMtaG9tZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9a9ce94681988da6e02c7fd65c6c48a23a742e7c1daf21d923acd26aedd660a1]
a recording of
a phone message
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=32356&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXNlY3JldC1zZXJ2aWNlLW1hci1hLWxhZ28tZmJpLWF1ZGlvLTAzMTQ3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7eb5b3d1e1f6e4bdb6418fcd608624a996dba03fa51977205e427def772537a8]
left
by an FBI special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the
context of the raid on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago,
Florida.
* In April 2024, Justice Department records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=31970&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdGh1bW91cy1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9uLW9mLWJhYmJpdHQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e9724243f5fea6c1ef97d2b1c3c7e9c256a01f9ef45904c4c795aa7fd86eb4c1]
showed
that the FBI opened a criminal investigation of Air Force veteran
Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential
violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil
disorder.
* In January 2023 we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=28761&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWxhcHRvcC1zdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=12e49544581f463d7e44109397bf10acf5ba7eb60189da5176c4480aaf658b93]
the DOJ
for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites
regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden
laptop story.
* In November 2023, we and CatholicVote Civic Action received FBI
records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=30725&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLXRhcmdldGluZy1vZi1jYXRob2xpY3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a484ae76dd25fc9988875706faeca09c016d4ebaf209b6439b38f7c57734c7c8]
showing
top officials rushing to craft a public response to the leaked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=30709&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhbGNsZWFycmVsaWdpb24ub3JnLzIwMjMvMDIvMTAvZmJpX2RvdWJsZXNfZG93bl9vbl9jaHJpc3RpYW5zX2FuZF93aGl0ZV9zdXByZW1hY3lfODgwODg3Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=14df0847eeda5e64733ef6dafcd1be7ebde2a375a4ecf613efcf07e16bd879e9]
FBI
intelligence memo that revealed its targeting of Catholics who adhere
to traditional beliefs on church issues. In December 2023, heavily
redacted records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=30922&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFyZ2V0aW5nLW9mLWNhdGhvbGljcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e4f35c10110c0325fcc8de4a9fe7085d5c031c84419c9e7a78a1a4a23f1ee824]
from the FBI
showed that the agency’s Office of General Counsel reviewed
the controversial targeting
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=29412&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudW5jb3ZlcmRjLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAyLzA4L3RoZS1mYmktZG91Ymxlcy1kb3duLW9uLWNocmlzdGlhbnMtYW5kLXdoaXRlLXN1cHJlbWFjeS1pbi0yMDIzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5b55fd3ba4f5a51ec8eed8c58bf3e0e1e40d244c3fec48c216fead1e5e93536f]
of
the Catholics by the Richmond field office of the FBI.
* In August 2022, the Department of Justice’s released
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=27949&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtcmFpZC1hZmZpZGF2aXQtcmVsZWFzZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=22dabfa64e9212ff0b80e18c9a6b2668c6f232c9de4b5aa4e752faddf3fb3ea8]

President Trump and during which General Milley pressured Garland to
target American “far right” militia movements.

This month we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=34562&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLW1pbGxleS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA0MzkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b361aef571d24b965597d5711be6babc8021d4585ae0311379c6008b528a3857]
against
the Department of Defense for information about two conference calls
involving Milley and the Departments of Justice, Interior and Homeland
Security regarding coordination for the January 6, 2021, election
certification (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=34562&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLW1pbGxleS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA0MzkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b361aef571d24b965597d5711be6babc8021d4585ae0311379c6008b528a3857]
(No.
1:25-cv-00439)).

We sued after the Defense Department failed to respond to a December
19, 2024, FOIA request for:

Records and communications about two conference calls hosted by former
Department of Defense employees Acting Secretary of Defense
Christopher Miller, then Secretary of Army Ryan McCarthy, and then
Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley on January
3rd and January 4th, 2021, with the Department of Justice, Department
of Interior, and Department of Homeland Security. The subject of these
conference calls was coordination for and the common operating picture
for the January 6, 2021, Electoral Certification taking place at the
United States Capitol building in Washington, DC.

In testimony
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72513&L=34563&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ292aW5mby5nb3YvY29udGVudC9wa2cvR1BPLUo2LVRSQU5TQ1JJUFQtQ1RSTDAwMDAwMzQ2MjAvcGRmL0dQTy1KNi1UUkFOU0NSSVBULUNUUkwwMDAwMDM0NjIwLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=173ef18428c422439f9d523003d1e2d88ff6362bd603c1dcc0e978e584a3de47]
to
the Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack, Milley
stated:

So there was a series of meetings prior to the 6th — and we can get
you the exact dates and who’s in the meetings, et cetera —
interagency meetings, with Acting SecDef Miller [and others]. And
I’m involved in those meetings as well. These are in the end of
December, so to speak, and then they go all the way up through, I want
to say, the 2nd or 3rd or maybe 4th or something like that of January.
These are telephonic conference calls to try to figure out exactly
what the security measures are going to be for the 6th.

General Mark Milley and many Deep Staters at the Pentagon hated
President Trump, so their role in January 6 is well worth exploring.
Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth should order full transparency and
disclosure.

clean_body: HUGE: Kash Patel Confirmed! [INSIDE JW] KASH PATEL Kash Must Return the FBI to Legitimate Law Enforcement [] As perhaps the nation’s leading Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) litigant against the FBI on its corruption issues, we congratulate Kash Patel on his confirmation as Director of the FBI. Kash Patel is a patriot and a fighter. It was a scandal his confirmation took this long. I consider Kash a friend, and he is the perfect choice to reform the FBI. Kash will bring transparency and accountability back to an agency that became irredeemably corrupt and the tip of the spear of unfettered lawfare against any American seen as a threat to the ruling class. From sitting on Hunter Biden’s laptop to influence the 2020 election, the raid of President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home, and the censorship of Americans, to the targeting of traditional Catholics, the FBI has shown itself as a tainted domestic and intelligence service. Kash Patel has his work set out for him. Under its previous leadership, the FBI became the enemy of transparency, the rule of law, constitutional government, and the civil rights of tens of millions of Americans. (Judicial Watch and I witnessed firsthand the corruption of Wray’s operation when FBI agents came to my home in what was obvious retaliation for our criticism and lawsuits exposing their abuses.) Kash Patel should open wide the FBI’s files and expose its abuses of power targeting Trump and countless other American citizens. Along with bringing transparency and accountability back to the FBI, Kash will return the agency to its core mission, legitimate law enforcement, that will protect the rights of law-abiding Americans and prosecute legitimate crimes. Kash will be a welcome breath of fresh air for which we will all be grateful. Here are examples of our work on FBI corruption that we hope Kash Patel addresses with transparency and accountability: In October 2024, we sued [] the Justice Department for messages among top leaders of the FBI referencing social media posts of Special Agent Jeffrey Veltri [], head of the Miami Field Office, which is investigating the September 15 assassination attempt against Donald Trump. In May 2024, we uncovered [] a recording of a phone message [] left by an FBI special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the context of the raid on President Trump’s home in Mar-a-Lago, Florida. In April 2024, Justice Department records [] showed that the FBI opened a criminal investigation of Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil disorder. In January 2023 we sued [] the DOJ for records of communications between the FBI and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. In November 2023, we and CatholicVote Civic Action received FBI records [] showing top officials rushing to craft a public response to the leaked [] FBI intelligence memo that revealed its targeting of Catholics who adhere to traditional beliefs on church issues. In December 2023, heavily redacted records [] from the FBI showed that the agency’s Office of General Counsel reviewed the controversial targeting [] of the Catholics by the Richmond field office of the FBI. In August 2022, the Department of Justice’s released [] a highly redacted affidavit [] in response to our court request [] to unseal the warrant materials used in the unprecedented raid on the home of President Trump. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON FOR RECORDS ON MILLEY JAN 6 CALLS Former Joint Chief of Staff Mark Milley has a lot of explaining to do. In December we sued [] the Department of Justice for details of a reported meeting between Attorney General Merrick Garland and Milley in which they discussed President Trump and during which General Milley pressured Garland to target American “far right” militia movements. This month we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the Department of Defense for information about two conference calls involving Milley and the Departments of Justice, Interior and Homeland Security regarding coordination for the January 6, 2021, election certification (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense [] (No. 1:25-cv-00439)). We sued after the Defense Department failed to respond to a December 19, 2024, FOIA request for: Records and communications about two conference calls hosted by former Department of Defense employees Acting Secretary of Defense Christopher Miller, then Secretary of Army Ryan McCarthy, and then Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley on January 3rd and January 4th, 2021, with the Department of Justice, Department of Interior, and Department of Homeland Security. The subject of these conference calls was coordination for and the common operating picture for the January 6, 2021, Electoral Certification taking place at the United States Capitol building in Washington, DC. In testimony [] to the Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack, Milley stated: So there was a series of meetings prior to the 6th — and we can get you the exact dates and who’s in the meetings, et cetera — interagency meetings, with Acting SecDef Miller [and others]. And I’m involved in those meetings as well. These are in the end of December, so to speak, and then they go all the way up through, I want to say, the 2nd or 3rd or maybe 4th or something like that of January. These are telephonic conference calls to try to figure out exactly what the security measures are going to be for the 6th. General Mark Milley and many Deep Staters at the Pentagon hated President Trump, so their role in January 6 is well worth exploring. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth should order full transparency and disclosure. TRUMP SLASHES ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION, THOUSANDS FLEE Our Corruption Chronicles blog has for years reported the disaster of the Biden administration’s open border mania. Now it can report [] the good news of President Trump’s efforts to reverse the Biden invasion. President Trump’s measures to mitigate the unprecedented illegal immigration crisis he inherited from the Biden administration are working and have led to an impressive 93% decline [] in migrants apprehended at ports of entry since his January 20 inauguration. The U.S. Border Patrol also reported an 85% drop in apprehensions along the southwest border from January 21 through January 31 compared to the same period in 2024. Newly released federal data reveals that just 61,465 illegal aliens were captured at the southern border during the entire month of January, a 36% decline from the previous month. A national Spanish-language news network reported [] days ago that restrictions imposed by Trump are deterring migrants who have made it to Mexico’s southeastern city of Tapachula, on the border with Guatemala, from continuing the long journey north through Mexico to the U.S. southern border. Instead, many are returning home to Honduras, El Salvador, Colombia, and Venezuela. “In particular they are discouraged by massive deportation policies and the closure of the border with thousands of military personnel deployed and the elimination of U.S. Customs and Border Protection’s CBP One app that allowed asylum solicitation in the United States from the south of Mexico,” the story states. The “Donald Trump Effect [ has forced Mexico to invest millions of dollars to build shelters that accommodate the flow of migrants deported by the administration, a Latin American business journal reports this month. “The recent immigration policies implemented by Donald Trump increased massive deportations towards Mexico,” the publication writes, adding that Mexican authorities are looking to mitigate the “humanitarian crisis” triggered by the increase in the flow of migrants that are being returned because it has overwhelmed existing shelters. The new project will offer refuge and assistance to people affected by the “strict immigration policies of the actual U.S. administration,” the article states. One American newspaper chain reports [ an estimated 350,000 migrants are “trapped in Mexico” because the U.S. border has been closed by “drastic measures put in place by the Trump administration.” Thousands are making the “hard trek back to their countries,” the report adds, with some already crossing in Guatemala while others try to earn enough money for the trip home. The apprehension of illegal immigrants inside the United States has also skyrocketed with an increase of more than 137% [] since Trump moved back into the White House, according to figures released this week by Border Czar Tom Homan. “Arrests of aliens with criminal convictions have doubled under President Trump,” Homan writes in a social media post, adding that arrests of illegal alien gang members have also doubled. Homan, a former New York police officer and Border Patrol agent who served as Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) executive associate director of Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) under Obama, confirms that “our streets and neighborhoods are that much safer under President Trump.” In 2015 Homan received the Presidential Rank Award for Distinguished Service [], which is bestowed each year by the commander-in-chief and is considered the nation’s highest civil service award. Among his celebrated accomplishments was the removal of 534,000 criminal aliens from the United States. The Trump border measures came at a critical time for national security as well as public safety. Under Biden’s disastrous open border policies, a ghastly 7.6 million illegal aliens were welcomed into the country, including nearly 2 million who sneaked over the border without getting arrested. Among them were more than 1.7 million [ countries that the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) has determined pose a national security threat to the United States. They are labeled Special Interest Aliens (SIA) by the government and come from some 26 nations, including Afghanistan, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Libya, Nigeria, Syria, and Turkey, China, North Korea, Kyrgyzstan, Mauritania, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, and Venezuela. The Biden administration also allowed over half a million illegal aliens with criminal histories [] to roam freely in the United States by putting them on an ICE “non-detained docket.” Recent figures revealed that 435,719 had convictions and another 226,847 pending charges. Nearly 15,000 of the freed illegal aliens have been convicted of or charged with murder, more than 20,000 with sexual assault, 60,268 with burglary, larceny, or robbery, 105,146 with assault, 16,820 with weapon offenses, 3,971 with commercialized sex crimes and 3,372 with kidnapping. BEHIND THE BOMBSHELL END OF THE CASE AGAINST NEW YORK MAYOR ERIC ADAMS Micah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, takes a look [] at one example of corruption in the Biden Justice Department in Investigative Bulletin. Rotten Big Apple? Prosecutorial pile-on? Politics as blood sport? To legal observers in New York City [], those were the questions haunting the pending criminal trial of Mayor Eric Adams []. The Trump Justice Department [] ended speculation last week with a bombshell memo [] to the U.S Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York, the fabled and famously independent SDNY, directing the office to “dismiss the pending charges” against Adams. The memo from acting Deputy Attorney General Emil Bove criticized “the timing of the charges and more recent public actions by the former U.S. Attorney [Damian Williams] ... that have threatened the integrity of the proceedings, including increasing prejudicial pretrial publicity that risks impacting potential witnesses and the jury pool.” The Bove memo also noted that “the pending prosecution has unduly restricted Mayor Adams’ ability to devote full attention and resources to the illegal immigration and violent crime that escalated under the policies of the prior Administration.” At the SDNY, the interim U.S. attorney, Danielle Sassoon, declined to follow Bove’s directive and resigned. So did the lead prosecutor in the case. In Washington, five members of the Justice Department’s public integrity unit, responsible for overseeing corruption cases, resigned. Bove responded to Sassoon’s resignation with a scathing letter [] charging her with “insubordination” and misconduct. Attorney General Pam Bondi brushed aside the resignations, and on Friday, the Justice Department filed a motion to dismiss the charges []. Read the full Washington Examiner article by Judicial Watch’s Micah Morrison here []. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

body:
Judiciary Committee ... It's On! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/749185c4dacf/congressmember-ro-khanna-is-all-in-13472355-asktlzi9fq-14053977?e=e6ba7d1bc4)

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:

Last week was the first full Judiciary committee hearing of this treacherous congressional term. I brought the heat.

Republicans are quite clever. They do this thing where they come up with hearing titles that describe the trickery they are exacting on the American people, but they posit it as outrage against the wrong-doings of Democrats. It is a duplicitous tactic that they use time after time.

Our first Judiciary hearing was titled, "The Censorship Industrial Complex."
Insert side-eye here.

The Republicans came ready with the theatrics. They just weren’t ready for me.

---
| [ ](https://kamlagerforassembly.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fbfb0a1bdf4e44789fab92d0&id=7935748d68&e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
Handling the Biz-ness on Judiciary
|
Afterwards, Jamie Raskin said I was “awesome” (his words). That was kind, but the icing on the cake was watching Republican Harriet Hageman have a conniption fit.

**I worked very hard to get on Judiciary. You helped me get on this committee.** Your contributions helped me pay my dues and help vulnerable and Red-to-Blue Democrats win. Leadership noticed. And now, I have to do it again.

I ask that you continue to help me because I plan to use my five minutes each and every time to call Republicans out on their shameful lies and hypocrisy. They might not care about the truth, but I do! We do!

Hey Jim Jordan, wanna wrestle?!?

---

clean_body: Judiciary Committee ... It's On! | | | | | | | | Dear Peter: Last week was the first full Judiciary committee hearing of this treacherous congressional term. I brought the heat. Republicans are quite clever. They do this thing where they come up with hearing titles that describe the trickery they are exacting on the American people, but they posit it as outrage against the wrong-doings of Democrats. It is a duplicitous tactic that they use time after time. Our first Judiciary hearing was titled, "The Censorship Industrial Complex." Insert side-eye here. The Republicans came ready with the theatrics. They just weren’t ready for me. | Handling the Biz-ness on Judiciary | Afterwards, Jamie Raskin said I was “awesome” (his words). That was kind, but the icing on the cake was watching Republican Harriet Hageman have a conniption fit. I worked very hard to get on Judiciary. You helped me get on this committee. Your contributions helped me pay my dues and help vulnerable and Red-to-Blue Democrats win. Leadership noticed. And now, I have to do it again. I ask that you continue to help me because I plan to use my five minutes each and every time to call Republicans out on their shameful lies and hypocrisy. They might not care about the truth, but I do! We do! Hey Jim Jordan, wanna wrestle?!? | | "CONTRIBUTE TO THE FIGHT" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Sydney Kamlager-Dove for Congress 419 N. Larchmont Blvd., #37, Los Angeles, CA 90004 | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Kamlager for Senate 419 N. Larchmont Blvd. #37 Los Angeles, CA 90004 USA

body:
Warning: Democrats launch coordinated plot to undermine Elon Musk and DOGE!

| |
---
| | | **Warning: Democrats launch coordinated plot to blockade, sabotage, and sue Elon Musk and DOGE! ** | | [SKIP TO THE END: HELP SAVE DOGE!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2ndaisfmuops0lhbqu1rp9q176f2breed5mag8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o32cdh2bs "SKIP TO THE END: HELP SAVE DOGE!")
---

Friend:

For everyone who believes in President Trump's vision for this country, this is an emergency!

Democrats tried every dirty trick in the book to stop President Trump. Luckily, they failed. But now they want revenge in the form of undermining and sabotaging the Trump Administration at every turn. _And because of his incredible work with DOGE, they 've made Elon Musk PUBLIC ENEMY #1:_

- Liberal AGs filed lawsuits to halt mass layoffs identified by DOGE
- Multiple Democrat groups sued to restrict his access to government systems
- Deep State operatives are trying to slowwalk and undermine the DOGE team
- The Liberal Propaganda Machine is vilifying his good work in the press

We have a razor-thin margin in the House right now, so the Democrats see this as their best moment to strike!

So we will be blunt:

**_[We're urgently calling on 10,000 of our best Conservatives to step up - before our key end-of-month fundraising deadline - and help us outraise these Radical Democrats and stop them from ever taking control again.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpoq3ukvl5hbatltdchihvj4p4i8b4lj78rjb898_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o32cdh2bs "We’re urgently calling on 10,000 of our best Conservatives to step up – before our key end-of-month fundraising deadline – and help us outraise these Radical Democrats and stop them from ever taking control again.")_**

February is a short month and the Democrat Machine is RAKING IN cash by attacking Elon Musk, DOGE, and every House Republican working alongside them.

We need a major show of strength TODAY or we'll come up short at the worst possible time.

SO PLEASE:
| [HELP US SAVE DOGE!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6n2ajiei7t0ho9skeqiabjo80lm88e34j8som8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o32cdh2bs "HELP US SAVE DOGE!")
---

We need 10,000 Conservatives with the guts and courage to stand up for what's right.

**Not everyone reading this will fit that mold - which makes everyone who does that much more important. We sincerely hope that's you.**

_**[Can you please help us in our greatest hour of need?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zme3q6higjfcqe414nfj9kl3nrvphos7o0r5phao_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o32cdh2bs "Can you please help us in our greatest hour of need?")**_

Onward,
House GOP

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

Steve Scalise

name: JAG
subject: Hated for saving humanity
body:
Musk is striking back and doubling down.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgvireu9v901inof39tbt5uvegtcmq0pi1ftfbm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs) Friend,

In _Atlas Shrugged_ , Ayn Rand described how the mediocre, the resentful, and the envious would always turn their animus on the very innovators on whom progress and their very survival relies — the very people who are elevating humanity forward.

She observed:
_"The age of envy has come into its own: the age when men burn with the desire to destroy what they cannot equal; the age when the fire of their own impotence is the only light they have by which to see; and the age when the innovators and creators among them are to be burned at the stake with the fire they taught mankind to light."_
**Exhibit A is how the left treats Elon Musk.**

Like the mythical Atlas from Greek mythology who inspired the title of Ayn Rand’s magnum opus, he is daily — and globally — literally uplifting the world. Is he thanked, admired, emulated? By some, yes. But he’s also besieged by regulators, censors, hysterical media critics, left-wing politicians, short sellers, and media trolls seeking to bring him down.

But unlike the productive geniuses in _Atlas Shrugged,_ who withdraw their creative energies from society, he’s NOT going on strike. Musk is striking back and doubling down.

Despite calls from radical Leftists to “nationalize SpaceX” and tear down his accomplishments, Musk perseveres, launching scores of new, innovative products across his six different companies and advancing our horizons in communication, transportation, robotics, health, and, fundamentally, free speech.

When Ayn Rand observed the following, she was describing Elon Musk:

_"Throughout the centuries there were men who took the first steps, down new roads, armed with nothing but their own vision."_

**Maybe that’s why Elon Musk has been talking about _Atlas Shrugged_ , and sharing The Atlas Society’s content on Twitter/X with increasing frequency over the past few months, further fueling the remarkable growth we’ve enjoyed this year.**

Here are just two examples:
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmvuikd41r064rpckc5qp4db1mjeiniqd5ddsf10_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs) [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg7863ah401177oqkqenmaggdbtoumjhdaoo9om8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
In a recent interview, he describes his harassment by regulators, as “living through a real life _Atlas Shrugged,_ ” where the villains pile more and more ridiculous rules and regulations on entrepreneurs, and then say, “Oh, you’ll manage. You’ll manage.”

**At The Atlas Society, we’re committed to inoculating young minds against the Socially Transmitted Diseases (STDs) of envy, entitlement, and resentment.**

Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism offers a radically different message that _empowers_ young people to reach their fullest potential by embracing reason, individualism, productivity, achievement, benevolence, rational self-interest, and liberty.

By leveraging art and cutting-edge technology, The Atlas Society is reaching the next generation with graphic novels, animated videos, music videos, and social media, then upselling them opportunities for deeper learning through our seminars, podcasts, and events — all while marketing the literature of Ayn Rand.

[**_Today, I’m asking you to support me in this mission. You can play an integral role in helping young people develop a mindset that values individual greatness over envy._**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdl5rupai5mud9stj17p3colm0igpm53fa0vdclo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvt4d4dkkljufek1pi0d8hb643s7f1itcvjbd5k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
Here at The Atlas Society, we know that ideals need compelling stories to thrive, so it’s great to see the world’s richest man recognizing the importance of our content.

Ayn Rand herself called art _“the indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_ That’s why we use new, artistically creative, and digitally savvy ways to communicate Ayn Rand’s ideals.

For our latest project, we set out to market _Atlas Shrugged_ with an animated book trailer in which we created an AI model to transform live-action into animation. The result: a 4-minute animated video that captures the drama and adventure of _Atlas Shrugged_.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z98robm56hd920cj8uk853vbrndk0u8sfh2fntpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
**The response has exceeded our wildest expectations. It attracted over 14 MILLION views across platforms and DOUBLED purchases of _Atlas Shrugged_ in the ensuing weeks!**

This success inspired us to invest in similar AI-animated trailers for _The Fountainhead_ and _ANTHEM_ — plus four one-minute standalone scenes.

The Atlas Society is on a mission to reach 1 BILLION young people with Ayn Rand’s work. Your generous donation will help us continue to innovate new ways to reach the next generation.

**When you donate, you’re empowering young minds to see heroes not as objects of envy but as examples to emulate.**
[Donate $10](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9k07qkdug6ljs6ij16si5fb9177tg7l2s5ca868_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate $35](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4c7c0orlgi3dmoel2kmp2usbddon66hupvbao10_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfqukgrvs74dtdpsbb5a3c8mkvvc10dmcd4b73d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate $100](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgp2n6mvj6s3r30dfim0pj724524fvncj2tlj478_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1rpr12m0gm82c43inek4ccjbhbek33u8vbjguq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpfaehgqq9db6ojaaloot1fpl58ijaoe97detih8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zccsrfec5snq9f7l5qvt6aeg79sb6rrhrnl55tc0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8q8b8375brns8umi90p3jgo5t00pc3lmektkhi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
Ayn Rand’s novels stand as a testament to the human spirit and a celebration of the individual’s power over the doctrines of irrationalism, self-sacrifice, brute force, and collectivism.

**I’m committed to sharing these resources with the rising generation of curious young people in ways that are engaging, accessible, and inspiring.**

Whether it’s through our action-packed animated book trailers, thought-provoking Draw My Life videos, or captivating graphic novels, The Atlas Society is using art to engage young minds with the message of a free society where everyone has the opportunity to be victorious.

Ayn Rand’s philosophy gives young people the weapons to fight back against envy and resentment.

**By donating today, you can help us build a future where truth, reason, and achievement are valued — a world where heroes like Elon Musk continue to inspire.**

_[**Plus, when you donate $35 or more, you’ll get a digital copy of our graphic novel adaptation of _Top Secret_. Click now to make your tax-deductible donation. >>**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo16rplerndo7poi7f9djeg3dqgql0t9eu22lhg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)_
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo8q1gak3tq08hafunrgdf06oam8j0i8sbehp1c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs) [Get Your Copy of _Top Secret_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhfdgg1kb7q9nc2m46ap89qdervfp8rp6gl3kq2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
Thank you in advance for your support,

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---
| |
---
---

Updates for Great Americans
---

name: Senate Battleground Memo
subject: Senate Republicans have a message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
you’re going to want to read this

**[CONFIDENTIAL MEMO
PREPARED BY: SENATE REPUBLICANS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdfjfr15a1sl232sf44lia2t097f3ncclmngfr0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o33c3h2bs)
[_DELETE AFTER READING_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs30is0mnq7uh1tcebta9hp8h460nh4k3g1rg3h0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o33c3h2bs)**

Friend,

We're working around the clock to implement President Trump's agenda, but here's the truth:

For the America First agenda to succeed, President Trump needs a four-year Senate majority.

_That means that the 2026 cycle is already here, friend._

**[And here's where things stand.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8c5efk2snrfsfdnqfu2btt9vlnrchm93up4398_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o33c3h2bs)**

_**[_TOSSUPS: GEORGIA & MICHIGAN_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm45mr48q0q72t5pg8bsmn9l5bb71jt4osc5fr00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o33c3h2bs)**_

Two Trump states with Senate seats held by Democrats. That needs to change.

_**[_LEAN REPUBLICAN: NORTH CAROLINA & MAINE_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs7oht4efh23j5jmtpg28v0095rquurkdbji5dg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o33c3h2bs)**_

If we lose these seats, our Majority is in trouble.

_**[_LEAN DEMOCRAT: NEW HAMPSHIRE AND MINNESOTA_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zia5qda8ivoph6ab0jqi5huhmicio80393djvtuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o33c3h2bs)**_

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt4jgndf5ln1o3oclm2l5aegf3pfqrevue5c64i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o30s1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr59ifph3b124p0aukst4i6eup5mfv66gliegbh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o30s1h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh9hdgvpvosha48trlfb7g1nlpv8mrr3pccbh4ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o30s1h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zobssbq7r7ulh2v7c3as8eddlmeb39bkkui8m5fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o30s1h2bs)**
---

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

Friend:

For everyone who believes in President Trump's vision for this country, this is an emergency!

- The Liberal Propaganda Machine is vilifying his good work in the press

SO PLEASE:

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.

| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpqkc8o0e4f4ug9epgp48v8rdeom4rnubff3lgrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvm7d4327mrb3jm6q49hs021ughp8jm1u8t4vco0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4dk2s9aadfqtsuq2140s4lae30li4nuihijd4r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zck04m56dn037qec2o4ga5cfn64loh0rgt3i2rg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4btdaeo7oai0qckhgqmt5l37bfuv4pq3p5uu54o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9kmjun0cr2k4madunuppihih0hevddfr3qdp34g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znq4u15vasnv02137kvaqr34fpd3sq5558doijt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zllc695dopg7cbfdvj854nb9j4vgm9qma2k2h5c0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nr42l8n1tnm0h69fkpi2pc08in0p3hfh87kda0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztt9tppdq136j61c6g8am3gon9ulr623eemn1k48_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi90v1mfi6sr77mogiq4cmdhsahb2n3qkfius31g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)_**
---
[**DONATE **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgj34nj8moc756bcmu6nr3pkqd8amqtfphrf5730_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm7ndetdmtp9jjj97kcgb7chlna6v2sg5seduv7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztifoq9pb5p74ilg46d4k3f0aun91pesimmh18fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zci0l0e735b3rmqitnipgf8j98d3fcoqt6v59ocg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)|
---|---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpj34b3a8cudtlgvmog52bham1m4n35bgapd4v48_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5g62o36c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0heeopk0aaji19pmnvctvn7ogl756fgnk16pr2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o37c5h2bs)_

body:
Trump’s return to office

Take a look at this MASSIVE Trump knife.
It's razor sharp out of the box, feels heavy in the hand, and will slice through just about anything like butter.
I've been sold out of them for about a month now, and just got a small batch of 400 yesterday.
And because of Trump's return to office, I've decided to give away these Limited-Edition $69 knives for FREE.
But only for today.
[Claim Your Massive & Razor-Sharp Trump Knife For FREE Here](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcr16d6f6co33js9rjcpellsktgom2iihef87s0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)
Why only today?
Honestly, I only want the most die-hard patriots getting their hands on one.
And if I limit this giveaway to only 400 units today, it forces you to act fast.
Especially since this email is going to other patriots that love free gear.
And Acting fast is one of the most critical skills to have when facing a survival scenario.
So if you want this bad@ss Beast of a Trump Knife for free, [move fast here friend.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj6eb1h0rap9hbldpnbt400sk7h5nqvgs04v1748_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h64o36c3h2bs)

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrjrr9he6392j0k31rbfguvi84s1negmc8u6bhv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zint7vqk5e6ssnhum28tju6mm1juj3tmsgpi88j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)
|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcpqiq2ef1rl05kq1rn8f31qdn9p1deprl144o60_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlg14v61lvobnejhp4qb6f1k869obv41kofqo990_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ipcpl916i5fm4q9iamgt007hvut7i5s9ccu4co_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4clh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkt2dl1ivqghamu2ac0rqkd41u1uvctvuv3ccvko_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4clh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ha6989kk8m517gdg9i7mlk4l61sfr942c9lmh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4clh2bs)**
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq5b3vbrosl2f788bar2lsk7upvkj5i234le4at8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zre13o7jovdu7eevlg5jqqbomdqvcejealvhh0ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)
|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zldiha7bklmhm7ooqi4fr3mhn3hfa60a0er5ndp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrp55jn16ckj3d91ss16pbfu3sjdsa685l0bfpu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor4cdh2bs)
|
---
Thank you and god bless,
Byron Donalds _****_

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuj6gn0e1b8ka2mq7c43e8vqcbpsh1hc7j7fhh08_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor0cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z688vu4nongsknd5lbqikcbib8p3r2odlb9evr4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor0cjh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi5jnsasd9pqg8opvnblsrjap7hf2p7bnt2i66m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6aor0cjh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdhf97u4q1tpbokq41fv875sdo8ir7g4j9fuuv00_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6eob2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0ruep4kd15e7fhsj92p67536t0mmavcu2151a30_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6eob2clh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl439r254mgfvra96ouf20bqaitej5h518vaiusg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h6eob2clh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
