Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqhokbaepo18mtkaq4jm03ivu9gh1k0qu3dgjhe0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h69oj2c9h2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Get your FREE Trump Knife today.
body:
Trump’s return to office

Take a look at this MASSIVE Trump knife.
It's razor sharp out of the box, feels heavy in the hand, and will slice through just about anything like butter.
I've been sold out of them for about a month now, and just got a small batch of 400 yesterday.
And because of Trump's return to office, I've decided to give away these Limited-Edition $69 knives for FREE.
But only for today.
[Claim Your Massive & Razor-Sharp Trump Knife For FREE Here](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg67epkbaa6gr9omquk98k1kqb2sbbglnnsglqj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9h69oj2c9h2bs)
Why only today?
Honestly, I only want the most die-hard patriots getting their hands on one.
And if I limit this giveaway to only 400 units today, it forces you to act fast.

# _Weekly Update_
This week, we saw the first half of session come to a close with the deadline for bills to be read on third reading taking place on past Thursday. With this deadline, any bills that passed out of the Senate now head to the House. This also means that here in the Senate, we will start hearing bills that passed out of the House when we return for session on March 3. This process is called _crossover_. These bills will start the legislative process over with opportunities for testimony and amendments throughout. This is why it is important to recognize that for bills we like, as well as bills we do not, there is still a long way to go.

_Speaking of bills we like_ , the Indiana Senate Democrats have several pieces of legislation that we are hoping will receive hearings in the House, and you can read more about a few of those in [my legislative review](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cce3eed18b9b2e938d5b2a123e03ed0302f9b68834d4100014c6c5b8065cf737683b0a1afb0b0f4cf738b39f9fb945c15cbda37360046389 "my legislative review") which can be found later in this newsletter.

**However, we also saw some legislation pass that we are seriously concerned with. ** In last week's newsletter, I shared with you my concerns with SB 518. This bill will destabilize public school systems in order to save our state a buck. **_[See More Problems with SB 518 Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cce3eed18b9b2e93af6848602059ffb0e87d2ee1e02638f76b3986ca5385d6a6631c80f8f1022a792d687cdeb0927f4a3061a2e615d462d2 "See More Problems with SB 518 Here")_**
My colleagues and I introduced 19 amendments to the bill this week that focused on local oversight, financial responsibility and transportation for our students. Ultimately, the bill passed without the majority accepting a single amendment.

I continue to have serious concerns with this bill as it heads to the House during _crossover._ **With the second half of session just around the corner, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream session and more on[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cce3eed18b9b2e934167824e8a352355037cc8912966be35d373a78a876916b8426faa8386516c286817ae887bae492e360dd35acfbbbad5). ** **Additionally, make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---

body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs98ll7s8k15ugrhlqn5imvad2u3olglrqu9ik0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9j64o71c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrt87fr0cj6kq6sgiuchdgmebpf5piu28go067s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9j64o71c1h2bs)
|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabkjn1krto8koq11vgh11v0d045oig46t49u4d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9j64o71c1h2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqa1dk271o7uuum375u2iq20760p4k84hljg332g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0c9j64o71c1h2bs)
|
---
Thank you and god bless,
Byron Donalds _****_

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Democrats are already building up their war chest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t play around!

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
| | Peter, we have the narrowest majority _**in nearly 100 YEARS.**_ And to make matters worse, the Democrats are wasting no time building their war chest to flip it.

Here’s what you need to know: ➔ GOP control could shrink to just 215 seats with upcoming vacancies.➔ Not a single defection can be afforded to pass President Trump’s bold America First agenda.➔ The Democrats are ready to exploit every crack in our defense to block Trump’s policies and derail the conservative movement.

_**We can’t let them win.**_

Democrats are already pouring MILLIONS into their efforts to undo everything we’ve fought for. If we don’t act NOW, we risk losing our ability to deliver the bold, conservative agenda voters demanded in November.

If we’re going to put up a fight, we need to get ahead of the Democrats on fundraising starting RIGHT NOW.**[**If you can, please consider chipping in to defend our slim majority. Every dollar counts in a fight as critical as this.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ DEFEND THE MAJORITY](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ZCspBueG44YpF8B-MxA)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Congressman Troy Downing

name: John Milligan (Executive Director)
subject: The race is on 🏎🏁
body:
SPECIAL ELECTIONS ARE COMING!
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YRu_OFM93i_N-hyxx196Zbt_dwIpWl8ZBPR-9pCUWIPp1I4-D3L7cINp44DPLSi2wpkK7rcoNCxfFXLKTmJCfzbcPfsd5AI4Kjzuu1XJz-AxVjsGkoFpn5fBmEc5hKhiTINDg1LSUtoX0BwRc96QZw==&c=qBiepFUZ1584rhCr2GqzBJ3sF3G-jAPClbUXyTOKGkWOz-wIefeHvA==&ch=ckiZ0MJecxF3412TCao8di_pO_3hW8WBV2YjOLDsEOHd3psJejlXrQ==)
---
| Hi Peter,
The race is on! Two special elections are coming and both seats are hot targets for Republicans to pick up. Mark your calendars - The special election for the 6th Essex State Representative seat in Beverly is officially set for May 13th and [Medley Long](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YRu_OFM93i_N-hyxx196Zbt_dwIpWl8ZBPR-9pCUWIPp1I4-D3L7cDZGO0e2SUYOkCCTO7BVdXEbZaawwN957fsdxFMR5BFI79RmgXRpTMdEcYq5pU6cEMZvmoKjKSemx8pFcohm3Et1WXONJzGfbQ==&c=qBiepFUZ1584rhCr2GqzBJ3sF3G-jAPClbUXyTOKGkWOz-wIefeHvA==&ch=ckiZ0MJecxF3412TCao8di_pO_3hW8WBV2YjOLDsEOHd3psJejlXrQ==) is ready to fight. A proven leader with a strong business background and deep roots in the district, Medley is stepping up to deliver commonsense solutions that put families and businesses first.
There will also be a special in the 3rd Bristol down in Taunton, but that date has yet to be announced.
You know the drill - winning these seats will be an all hands on deck effort. In fact, this weekend MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale will be out door knocking for Medley in Beverly!
Perhaps now more than ever, it's Conservatives that are the bold, effective leaders we need on Beacon Hill.
Stay tuned for more door knocking and other announcements...
There is one thing you can do today, though, to best position MassGOP and our candidates for victory.
Whatever you can swing, [please chip in right now](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YRu_OFM93i_N-hyxx196Zbt_dwIpWl8ZBPR-9pCUWIPp1I4-D3L7cDZGO0e2SUYOZoHFCdUjzgqnUNCZAViSxxZSbFN37SfQslJInIoZD_VPFBct1qrXZzzRCgCDigfVsSRphic_mLqJBrJUQpRkb9eB-SfOnmu0x0PJnktVo7NSC0lLnnHHbDNwaPeiVPgS&c=qBiepFUZ1584rhCr2GqzBJ3sF3G-jAPClbUXyTOKGkWOz-wIefeHvA==&ch=ckiZ0MJecxF3412TCao8di_pO_3hW8WBV2YjOLDsEOHd3psJejlXrQ==)[.](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YRu_OFM93i_N-hyxx196Zbt_dwIpWl8ZBPR-9pCUWIPp1I4-D3L7cDZGO0e2SUYOZoHFCdUjzgqnUNCZAViSxxZSbFN37SfQslJInIoZD_VPFBct1qrXZzzRCgCDigfVsSRphic_mLqJBrJUQpRkb9eB-SfOnmu0x0PJnktVo7NSC0lLnnHHbDNwaPeiVPgS&c=qBiepFUZ1584rhCr2GqzBJ3sF3G-jAPClbUXyTOKGkWOz-wIefeHvA==&ch=ckiZ0MJecxF3412TCao8di_pO_3hW8WBV2YjOLDsEOHd3psJejlXrQ==) Special elections present a unique opportunity to stretch your dollar -
$40 provides the resources to launch a social media campaign in district, hitting the right voters at the right time
$75 funds thousands of GOTV text messages to early & election day voters
$150 helps volunteers utilize highly targeted data to WIN!
Another option is to make your gift monthly. Just $25 per month could make a huge impact in our voter outreach efforts over the course of the year.
---
| | [JOIN THE SPECIAL ELECTION FIGHT - CHIP IN TODAY](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YRu_OFM93i_N-hyxx196Zbt_dwIpWl8ZBPR-9pCUWIPp1I4-D3L7cDZGO0e2SUYOZoHFCdUjzgqnUNCZAViSxxZSbFN37SfQslJInIoZD_VPFBct1qrXZzzRCgCDigfVsSRphic_mLqJBrJUQpRkb9eB-SfOnmu0x0PJnktVo7NSC0lLnnHHbDNwaPeiVPgS&c=qBiepFUZ1584rhCr2GqzBJ3sF3G-jAPClbUXyTOKGkWOz-wIefeHvA==&ch=ckiZ0MJecxF3412TCao8di_pO_3hW8WBV2YjOLDsEOHd3psJejlXrQ==)
---
Talk soon, John
John Milligan Executive Director, MassGOP
---

Thank you to all the activists and candidates who are working hard for Judge Brad Schimel, Brittany Kinser, and our local candidates! **Upcoming Events**

3/15: [St. Croix County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cijiktl-didthutlhu-yh/)
3/16: [Manitowoc County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cijiktl-didthutlhu-yk/)
3/27: [Jackson County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cijiktl-didthutlhu-yu/)
3/27: [Chippewa County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cijiktl-didthutlhu-jl/) **Upcoming WisGOP Events** **Dane County**
Republicans in Dane County were fired up to hear from Governor Tommy Thompson, Chairman Brian Schimming, and Judge Brad Schimel. The momentum for April is strong! **Fond du Lac County**
There was a packed house in Fond du Lac County for their annual caucus! **Green County**
Green County Republicans hosted a breakfast meeting with guest speaker Author Dave Warn, who spoke about his new book titled "Called to Contend" and the need to become involved at all levels of local government. **Jackson County**
Jackson County Republicans are fired up at their county caucus and ready to elect Judge Brad Schimel! **Kenosha County**
Republicans in Kenosha County braved the cold to knock on doors for Judge Brad Schimel! They are ready to win on April 1st! **La Crosse County**
Derrick Van Orden and Judge Brad Schimel fired up the La Crosse County Caucus crowd! **Marquette County**
Marquette County Republicans are ready to win big in April and take back the court! **Monroe County**
Brittany Kinser for DPI stopped by Monroe County's Conservative Breakfast to explain why she is running for Superintendent on her way to La Crosse, Black River Falls, and River Falls. **Oconto County**
Oconto County Republicans held their annual caucus with special guest speakers Brad Schimmel, Tony Wied, Eric Winberger, David Steffen, and our sheriff Todd Skarbon. **Outagamie County**
Republicans in Outagamie County elected new members to their county board. Congratulations! **Price County**
Republicans in Price County had a speaker-packed caucus and Lincoln Dinner with Representative Tom Tiffany, Senator Romaine Quinn, and Chairman Brian Schimming! **Walworth County**
Walworth County Republicans were keeping busy the last few weeks! They hosted a coffee meeting with guest Kathy Kostock and prepared literature for voters. **Washington County**
Republicans in Washington County braved the snow to remind voters to elect Judge Brad Schimel on April 1st. They also hosted their county caucus and packed the room. Good work! **Waukesha County**
The Republican Party of Waukesha County hosted Pints and Politics with State Senator Rob Hutton, Elmbrook school board candidates Cheryl Milnes & Amit Singh, and others. The crowd left fired up! **Wood County**
Republicans in Wood County signed over 1500 postcards for Brad Schimel and hosted their annual caucus. Keep up the good work! La Crosse County Derrick Van Orden and Judge Brad Schimel fired up the La Crosse County Caucus crowd! Marquette County Marquette County Republicans are ready to win big in April and take back the court! Monroe County Brittany Kinser for DPI stopped by Monroe County's Conservative Breakfast to explain why she is running for Superintendent on her way to La Crosse, Black River Falls, and River Falls. Oconto County Oconto County Republicans held their annual caucus with special guest speakers Brad Schimmel, Tony Wied, Eric Winberger, David Steffen, and our sheriff Todd Skarbon. Outagamie County Republicans in Outagamie County elected new members to their county board. Congratulations! Price County Republicans in Price County had a speaker-packed caucus and Lincoln Dinner with Representative Tom Tiffany, Senator Romaine Quinn, and Chairman Brian Schimming! Walworth County Walworth County Republicans were keeping busy the last few weeks! They hosted a coffee meeting with guest Kathy Kostock and prepared literature for voters. Washington County Republicans in Washington County braved the snow to remind voters to elect Judge Brad Schimel on April 1st. They also hosted their county caucus and packed the room. Good work! Waukesha County The Republican Party of Waukesha County hosted Pints and Politics with State Senator Rob Hutton, Elmbrook school board candidates Cheryl Milnes & Amit Singh, and others. The crowd left fired up! Wood County Republicans in Wood County signed over 1500 postcards for Brad Schimel and hosted their annual caucus. Keep up the good work! | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.www.WisGOP.org |

name: Team Youngkin
subject: Leading The Council of Governors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by **Spirit of Virginia**
body:
---
| | | | | | View this email as a webpage [here.](https://view.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=efdf2b395000036f393394f42f8eaef5208f20afc959afa742394e727fafe49e73d9216ba40e0dc7b2046f77163a9bef963e01736347ac837b284a390b992b62fc748efc8944adc600fbdc43f3decd28)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=4af98c84093770cd31a2073f58666e072999300d8e37693e791e9b3c748ad1e9e7fb0e508f341b857defa42f3ff275bc07b4369d74b0f7956fe1648ece22387b)
---
| |
---
|
This week, Governor Youngkin was appointed by President Donald J. Trump as co-chair of The Council of Governors, a vital step in strengthening state-federal partnerships on national security and disaster response. Governor Youngkin's leadership will help ensure that states have a strong voice in shaping policies that safeguard our communities. With his commitment to commonsense solutions, this appointment is a win for both Virginia and the nation.
---
| | [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=4af98c84093770cd200ef51eabcd1c4b5f63f6b019fe6107760127c5b163938ca3cd0cbe19abd4adacbce5cf438323a8d6f0bdd9e11a7a70f7676f210600ac8a)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | [READ THE ANNOUNCEMENT](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=4af98c84093770cd21fbdff2017ff4eb4d502f5d82d913de14569c3e0d1628a36176d9cc1dd686a8f695b4c797da766cfca747aa62b7969a2aaa8d11f28109ab)
---
| |
---
|
Governor Youngkin and Team Youngkin secured their fourth victory at the 17th Annual VCU Massey Cancer Capitol Square Basketball Classic, raising over $20,000 for cancer research. This year's game was played in honor of Sarah, who has bravely battled an aggressive form of Metastatic Thyroid Cancer. Team Youngkin stands with her in prayers, love, and unwavering support, demonstrating once again that this effort is about more than just basketball--it's about making a difference.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
This week, First Lady Suzanne S. Youngkin had the privilege of meeting with the Head Pages of the Virginia General Assembly Page Program ahead of a special reception at the Executive Mansion, where she and Governor Youngkin welcomed all Senate and House Pages.

For decades, the Virginia General Assembly Page Program has provided young Virginians with a unique, hands-on experience in state government. Through this program, students develop essential skills in leadership, responsibility, and civic engagement, gaining firsthand insight into the legislative process while assisting lawmakers, staff, and constituents throughout the General Assembly session.

The Governor and First Lady were honored to spend time with these bright young leaders and are inspired by their dedication to public service. Their commitment and enthusiasm for learning will undoubtedly shape Virginia's future, and we look forward to seeing all they accomplish in the years ahead.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
First Lady Suzanne S. Youngkin recently welcomed the Virginia FFA State Officers for a roundtable discussion at the Patrick Henry Building. Joined by Secretary of Agriculture and Forestry Matt Lohr and Secretary of Education Aimee Guidera, the First Lady engaged with these young leaders on their vision for the future of agriculture and the role FFA plays in developing leadership and career opportunities.

With National FFA Week underway, it is a fitting time to recognize the impact of Virginia FFA, which serves 13,500 members across 226 chapters statewide. The organization continues to inspire and equip the next generation of agricultural leaders, reinforcing the importance of agriculture--Virginia's #1 industry.

The First Lady is grateful for the dedication and passion of these young leaders and looks forward to seeing their continued success in shaping the future of agriculture in the Commonwealth.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
Governor Glenn Youngkin announced this week that Nodal Exchange, LLC, North America's largest power futures exchange and a subsidiary of the Deutsche Boerse Group's EEX Group, will invest $300,000 to expand its operations in Fairfax County. The company will create 33 new jobs.

"Nodal Exchange's expansion in Fairfax County demonstrates Virginia's ability to attract and retain global financial technology leaders," said Governor Youngkin. "As North America's largest power futures exchange, Nodal Exchange showcases how international firms can thrive in the Commonwealth while developing innovative solutions for the world's energy markets. This expansion reinforces Virginia's position as a premier location for businesses at the intersection of finance and technology."
---
| | [READ THE ANNOUNCEMENT](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=4af98c84093770cd468face256359c01fcf7a16445e84be5b2f7e8a0e2ddc98993f4ad7cdc440962b27c4e87f60a0734f19e357cf9ffe3de5f54cddea1d55a9e)
---
| |
---
|
Last week, Governor Youngkin traveled to Southwest Virginia to assess the devastating flood damage and push for an expedited federal emergency declaration from the White House. The flooding has severely impacted Buchanan County--particularly Hurley and Grundy--as well as communities in Tazewell, Dickenson, and beyond.

Governor Youngkin is deeply grateful to the dedicated crews from VDOT, VDEM, and VSP, along with the first responders who carried out over 150 swift water rescues. Their tireless efforts to restore power, reopen roads, and provide critical support are nothing short of heroic.

Please continue to pray for the safety and recovery of our communities.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://click.go.spiritofvirginia.org/?qs=4af98c84093770cda6fd715e3d41606074cbd12bf9a001d8925e1c7bc2ae016843e6105bdb36989b17134e50eb5d369137ebddeb8a1996daf7a3beefbb24fc0d)
---
|
300 years ago this past week, a #homehistory pioneer was born at Popes Creek, Westmoreland County, Virginia. From surveying Virginia's lands to setting the precedent for democracy, George Washington's leadership and vision continue to inspire.

The Art Experience at the Executive Mansion pays homage to our nation's first president with artwork in the dining room, including a portrait of Washington and a painting of his home, Mount Vernon--both on loan from the Mount Vernon Ladies' Association.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
**Stay up to date with Governor Youngkin!**
---

name: Josh Weil
subject: Giant MAGA attack on my district - good sign??
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dznr-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **Giant MAGA attack on my district**
---
friend, As you know, I am the Democratic nominee in the FL-06 Special Election, which is set to take place on April 1st. Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters. Florida’s Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooing in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine. Yesterday the **_full frontal MAGA assault on my district_** entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent:
---
|
---
_The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday._ These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because **no one** in this district **_knows him_**. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida. If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn’t feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us **_but only if we can keep up with their spends_** in the 73 days left until E-Day. So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised _$500,000_ since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster. [**_If just 1 out of every 20 people we send this email to donate $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dzns-kyd76rh1/)[**_Can you help us keep up with the dark money pro-MAGA PACs flooding into this race by making a donation of $5 or more?_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dznt-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | | [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dznu-kyd76rh3/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dznv-kyd76rh4/)
---
| [Chip in $100](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dznw-kyd76rh5/)
---
| [RUSH $250](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wj8mv-v5dznx-kyd76rh6/)
---
|
---
That MAGA needs to flood the airwaves so early on in this race is a good sign for us - with your support we’ll soon be flooding the airwaves with ads of our own. Thank you in advance for your support. Josh Weil Democrat for Florida’s 6th
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to modify your [preferences](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wj8mv--15aab-kyd76rh2&sl=4i6&t=1&ac=gpnv) or [unsubscribe](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/form?2wj8mv--15aab-kyd76rh2&sl=4i6&t=5&ac=gpnv).

name: Peter
subject: Will you sign our THANK YOU letter for President Trump?
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Just over one month down, Peter, and thankfully, many more to go! President Trump stepped back into office and wasted no time fulfilling his promises to the American people. He immediately signed a flurry of executive orders that have ALREADY begun to right the ship, reinstate our nation as the land of hope and prosperity, and usher in the new Golden Age of America! Which is why we want to take a second to let him know how truly grateful we are for his countless sacrifices and undeterred commitment to our country! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2ac596dec39ee9a5367d7bc4aab0feb7a32deda539e53e135c4d7999d16a9255b45b5f47aa872346321bf72bceee3049f748cf9c8b97d1ffb6d87a6c2fd8c16d Will you join us, Peter? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2ac596dec39ee9a5367d7bc4aab0feb7a32deda539e53e135c4d7999d16a9255b45b5f47aa872346321bf72bceee3049f748cf9c8b97d1ffb6d87a6c2fd8c16d THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2ac596dec39ee9a5367d7bc4aab0feb7a32deda539e53e135c4d7999d16a9255b45b5f47aa872346321bf72bceee3049f748cf9c8b97d1ffb6d87a6c2fd8c16d FROM: Peter We went ahead and wrote President Trump a Thank You letter. But before we send it along, we’re determined to get 10,000 top patriots to join us and sign their names right alongside ours before the end of the day! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2ac596dec39ee9a5367d7bc4aab0feb7a32deda539e53e135c4d7999d16a9255b45b5f47aa872346321bf72bceee3049f748cf9c8b97d1ffb6d87a6c2fd8c16d So, what do you say, Peter? Will you help us reach our goal and show President Trump just how grateful we are for everything he is doing for our country? THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP! I am beyond grateful for your undeterred commitment to our nation and your countless sacrifices on behalf of the American people. Our country has already come so far under your stewardship this past month, and I’m grateful that you are Making America GREAT Again! Thank you for everything, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2ac596dec39ee9a5367d7bc4aab0feb7a32deda539e53e135c4d7999d16a9255b45b5f47aa872346321bf72bceee3049f748cf9c8b97d1ffb6d87a6c2fd8c16d Peter = SIGNATURE MISSING! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2ac596dec39ee9a5367d7bc4aab0feb7a32deda539e53e135c4d7999d16a9255b45b5f47aa872346321bf72bceee3049f748cf9c8b97d1ffb6d87a6c2fd8c16d >" alias="SIGN RIGHT NOW >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">SIGN RIGHT NOW >> - Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. | | Fellow Conservative, President Trump was sworn in just over a month ago and he hasn't wasted any time.

**He 's been charging forward full steam ahead to fulfill his campaign promises on a number of fronts and the American people **_**LOVE IT**_**!**

The Democrats' absurd anti-Trump hysteria is falling flat. Nobody's listening to the blatantly biased crap being peddled by the corrupt corporate media. **President Trump 's approval rating is higher than at any point during his first term.**** ** It's no wonder why - here's where voters stand:
---
* 59% favor declaring an emergency at the southern border

* 60% favor deporting illegal immigrants

* 60% favor expanding oil and gas production

* 63% favor the government recognizing only two sexes

---
_And President Trump is getting the job done JUST WEEKS into his second term!_

We did a deep dive into the latest poll numbers and the Democrats' political conundrum on the [**latest episode of**** _Verdict with Ted Cruz_**](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDUzLWQxNGJiNzVhZmJhNjQxMzFiOWJjNTk4YzEzNWMzMWMyIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vb21ueS5mbS9zaG93cy92ZXJkaWN0LXdpdGgtdGVkLWNydXotMS8yLTE3LTI1In0/HqQ_zrdMT7CvCINlpyQrJA), and today we want to hear from you. **** COMPLETE OUR AMERICA FIRST ISSUES POLL ****

**[**RESPOND NOW >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MDUzLWQxNGJiNzVhZmJhNjQxMzFiOWJjNTk4YzEzNWMzMWMyIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovcGdfZV92ZXJkaWN0LXBvbGwtMHM5XzIwMjUwMjIxX2Ffb3RoZXI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9WZXJkaWN0LVBvbGxfMjAyNTAyMjEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1WZXJkaWN0LVBvbGwmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/6gcYkG0C9tpoJt3iLglNAg)**
Thank you in advance for taking a moment to let us know where YOU stand.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Dani Hupper, Evergreen
subject: It's time to fight back
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
✉️ Congress needs to hear from you
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347161/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| Trump’s attempts to destroy clean energy progress and raise energy prices directly threaten our pocketbooks, our health, and our future. Republicans and Democrats alike must be reminded that they answer to us, not Trump and his Big Polluter cronies.

**Tell your representatives in Congress to protect energy affordability.** [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347162/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi friend,

President Trump has wasted no time doling out nonsense now that he’s back in the White House. On day one, he declared an “energy emergency” that, 1️⃣: doesn’t exist, and 2️⃣: eliminates wind and solar energy as possible solutions to fix this imaginary problem.

Why the nonsense? Because he and his Big Oil loyalists are hell-bent on dragging us back to an economy dominated by expensive, volatile fossil fuels—ignoring the fact that **a majority of voters support clean energy policies** , which are already lowering household costs nationwide.

In fact, [new polling confirms that a whopping **64 percent of voters prefer expanding solar and wind energy** , while only 35 percent prefer more coal, oil, and gas.](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347163/87SdQ4wZ)

But instead of listening to voters, Trump has illegally blocked funding for crucial clean energy programs, and now Republicans and their polluter pals are pushing a plan to fully repeal the clean energy tax credits and community climate programs that are lowering costs, creating jobs, and reducing deadly climate pollution.

**We must remind our representatives in Congress that they are accountable to us— _their constituents_ —**[**and as such must do everything they can to protect clean energy and climate programs.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347164/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TELL CONGRESS TO STEP UP](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347165/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Trump and his fellow Republicans promised to lower costs, but we know that repealing clean energy tax credits and climate loan and grant programs would do the opposite. **We’d see higher electricity bills at a time when people are already struggling to keep up with everyday costs.

Voters across the country are demanding affordability**—not policies that jack up our bills while jeopardizing the health and safety of our communities and our nation’s ability to stave off the worst impacts of climate change. |
---
[SEND A MESSAGE NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347166/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for raising your voice, |
---
| | |
---
### Dani Hupper
Campaigns Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
|
* * *
**P.S.** There is broad, bipartisan support for preserving federal investments in climate and clean energy—in fact, _most of the investments have gone to red districts represented by Republicans._ This means we have a real shot at convincing some Republicans who have seen the benefits of these clean energy investments firsthand to protect them. [**But we must contact Congress today to show them just how popular these programs are with real voters.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347167/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3347168/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---

| Peter: Should Democrats vote NO on ALL Trump appointees? [[YES]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T206220fb-bc33-4dee-a70e-8a47aeef46d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td25ea922-d297-4eb3-9cec-433a934b17b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress have been pushing through questionable cabinet nominees – and some Democrats have even helped get these far-right extremists confirmed! Kristi Noem – our new Secretary of Homeland Security – had the backing of 7 Democrats during her confirmation vote, getting her well over the support she needed! As Governor of South Dakota, Noem was BANNED from entering her state’s indigenous territories because she couldn’t stop making RACIST comments about tribal leaders working with drug cartels. And 7 Democrats still voted for her... Peter, we need to know if you think every last Democrat should say NO to any of Trump’s chaotic nominees. [Will you take our quick survey and let us know your thoughts?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d5e0983-7fc4-44aa-a7da-0d22c576334b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Should Democrats vote NO on ALL Trump appointees? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. subject: AP Sues Trump Officials, Beards Welcomed in New York, and Volcano Sightseeing
body:
The Associated Press [filed a federal lawsuit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAABNCvgQ4DAytaUFxjt9deaVBg5YKLEXaNf39x-6sn8ybzcx_vNqb4fHzb1Zsa8giOG-NgwOhsTOeoqDPBe3hJvRFacQBCKboYF3rehtAJTFIqJzonHMfcWTm1Wk4tjebSPgV-66Vuullba_vOy9skoHqiuHex5r35zfFZFx_Smd9-b-a80mSWWrdC5BfBQDAcx9Gcdsn5SgmGpz8KwWA3Vl6-sLq_1o3lEOIcbSrschjAoaA5mqWuie7GbUdMKZZWE8Ufq43ps1X_-_42-AsAAP__ynJauw) Friday against three Trump administration staffers after being banned from the Oval Office for refusing to use the term “Gulf of America.”

# Saturday, February 22, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1980, the U.S. Olympic hockey team stunned the world by defeating the four-time defending gold medal-winning Soviet team, 4-3, at the Winter Games in Lake Placid, New York. This unforgettable moment is known as the "[Miracle on Ice](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71uwyAURp8GtlhwgWAPDJUqb-ladbIwXAIVNqlNbPntK2fP-v0c6XzfhptNOc33LzuhqaEMwEBdGFwABm9TPgZJvQmIgIKi4VoyAOBS0mhG8OiC8x5HyxU45IppedVKdALOfTIn7XVgqhO6aZ221nYtCjVykB2RDH2qZWl-S5prxJCPsuHSuDLRbGKtj5WIDwI9gX7f9-Yoz_oc8ezPxFYXieg3Ij7_flaHU5xD29LF-Meeck7rVRPJ7pNN-YWs7xQ3A_8BAAD__4dbUs8)." Sicily’s Mount Etna is erupting and drawing tourists. Many are getting dangerously close to the lava, some even using it to cook lunch. [Check out the story below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOqzAQRb_GdEb2YOO4cPEaurx2SzTgIXhjmAh7g_L3q6Tf-uqeo_N1Ha-Yctpv_3GjUBceQYGVCiTAGDHl12iaGBYioK6hoJ1RAKCNadYAkyMkpS3a3oDyERdl_TShdz7anpoU3rTPQVnfufYyO0T0F-rspMF4YRTFVPlovzntdaUlv_hJRzvz1uSw1vooovsnYBAwnOfZvnBlfq8Chp3OImAovBHvJGfmO0VZ8KfgjWTGJ8qD57vU1ljTawPtWrfcHCE-zpRzKr0TRt02TPnjq3_1PwP8BgAA__94ilxt) about this unique travel destination. We're sponsored today by [Energous](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAMhp8mbKDgJJdjyFDpdNt17YgMGHCVEBTCVff2FbTq1tXfb_vX9_FoH8iel-kdA7k8xhYkmFJCCdAOyP7V6mJwIxGQKsjVVksAqLUuZmcUjJ3W1JAiDQRdN0oDGjWq3hqqC3bHtXNBmkbZ6tpbRGyupExXg26EljRwjqn6jLzkmUb_ik9KVR9D4d2c87oJ9SbgLuDOy5O2XNFCaYr7dmQOoO57Du0W99STUDcKyF7A5RgGGngPQt1W5KFcMeWF0jbz-st7DCvytJyJP1hfZamMan8kADSN1TUA2CK5Yf1i73m7WKHldLw6q-b_1D0dfAcAAP__kDZvyA), offering an investment opportunity in groundbreaking wireless energy transmission technology.

## AP Sues White House Over Gulf of America
The _Associated Press_ [filed a federal lawsuit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAABNCvgQ4DAytaUFxjt9deaVBg5YKLEXaNf39x-6sn8ybzcx_vNqb4fHzb1Zsa8giOG-NgwOhsTOeoqDPBe3hJvRFacQBCKboYF3rehtAJTFIqJzonHMfcWTm1Wk4tjebSPgV-66Vuullba_vOy9skoHqiuHex5r35zfFZFx_Smd9-b-a80mSWWrdC5BfBQDAcx9Gcdsn5SgmGpz8KwWA3Vl6-sLq_1o3lEOIcbSrschjAoaA5mqWuie7GbUdMKZZWE8Ufq43ps1X_-_42-AsAAP__ynJauw) Friday against three Trump administration staffers after being banned from the Oval Office for refusing to use the term “Gulf of America.” The lawsuit [named White House deputy chief](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1PwzAQhn-NszlKzm4-Bg9FKFsZYEBMkWuf00OOHcVuQ_n1KEWMbKe7ex-9et5P40mTpzC96BlVdnGECg68Ag4wWk3-PsrCKocIKApUdSsrAKilLC6qaTtooHO6bkGisK4G1wgDwvS2axELUjvtEagOvWjLzrRa675DcTjXIHsmK7SU41p-Rgr5gs7f4w3X0sS58OqS85KYODIYGAzbtpVzCvuNwYCBXxODYYmeMpl9nPZomDFkBoNeeLpi4nm9zguPzpEh7RPff3i8af-7Q37WgRvKFCbuaE2Z6xmD_aOs_Hisv79eqw8mhmjIMvH8tPvCLb3huhSrsstG3lNqWiaradbkH_XzfzpvCn4CAAD__1XeeXI) of staff Taylor Budowich, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt, and White House chief of staff Susie Wiles, alleging AP reporters were denied access to Oval Office events and Air Force One, violating First Amendment rights. The AP also claimed the White House [violated its due process protections](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGngY4ID8M1Lihu4y7bbmmReAizIiEy40R5-1XSb310vuL_Pi7HxJVvl690pSi5LWDBGwsGYFkT19eCeo2ZCMhpisOIFgAGRF2iG5By8lN2QIDWYcjDOgV0Fv0EATTHt_Y5WD-58RDOY0ppCuT8aQCcFFpaWdp2-Gl8k0K5vtqDtsO5XXWNReTelfuvYFYwS6HCtb43BfNGl70m4XZTMJ_bvok5JZFKXcHsBx8gBJPupu_UzbOwkClt76Rg1ltc70-ulfu_UaG9XBN_WC1_JXhE-A0AAP__lTZcTg) under the Fifth Amendment, asking the court to restore its access to spaces made available to other White House press pool members. The White House has not responded, but earlier this week, President Trump said, “ _We’re going to keep them out until such time as they agree that it’s the Gulf of America_.”
## Senate GOP Advances Budget Blueprint
The Republican-controlled Senate [approved a $340 billion budget blueprint](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAUhH8Ndhh84oIFxTV2e-2V5glPlwuCAVaz__6y2183yWQmX76f-3xHH3zcvnEnU9c0g4CBC-AAs0MfXrNsnFmJgPqGTKekAIBOyuZhrLqBViD1ciOyNNDSd6pTg16VGqQSjTfvt89ADGOvWm0VIo6a-mHpQI5MCnK-ptz-Jh_rg9bwSifl1qa9CeZR61FY_8VgYjBd19XGxUa6yrtnMB0p-OptYTDZFLdM5R0LRazEz1SJI8-4I0d3YrTEl6fbqPKan_vBcaPokGcbsRtBj32TjTsuH4IvN8Wk2Hb04YNS_1NzGvgLAAD__9RPZnU) early Friday morning, increasing funding for President Trump’s immigration enforcement, energy production, and military. The Senate approved the budget resolution [52-48 just before 5 a.m.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCnMZ0js5gAhYtr6HLtlWjBCzhnbMveEOXtf5H-71ZazafR_HtMD3Tehe0vHmR4jRMoaKUCCTBZdP4z6cqalQioqcjUnVYAUGtd7QaVVrDMfb22A9kWQGkc5rm933UPCF3lzKV9A6odmu7WLx0iDj017VyDHoRWZB3HfHtGF3in1X_iSfm2xKPyZmdORTR_BIwCxvBJsfD1EjBesIBRwXXXAsZXkYHeRcBYKCCTzJRes3cLhiIxpRxPkvPLbsRyzXjQO-b_0lJJjklaOuKSkYuM85MWdjEU6YL0lxTctrM8I5OAscrGprfz3pV7J7TaDnT-25d_2-808BMAAP__AvtzKQ) after a 10-hour, 33 amendment "vote-a-rama," with Sen. Rand Paul as the lone Republican joining all 47 Democrats in opposition. The resolution allocates $150 billion for military spending and $175 billion for border security but [excludes extending](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzGPhCAUhH8NdBh4sstaUFxjt9deaZ7wVC4IRljN_vuL2183yeSbyffzHJ4YYkjzN65k65QHkHATEgTA4DHE96C5txMRUMvJKqMlACit-WIf1N6Mk5NXnZOo3L0F57wzY0dSuenOg73WPoC8da1pHs4gYneBowLdMS3Jh5r35jeHVBea4jsftDcurzzapdatsPaLQc-gP8-zcWNJdJarZ9BfkUFfKGElsdP2GmNwmIoYX36mKraISRy5kkCx44oMer5bv50hxlDuhmk5rxji56_-539Y-AsAAP__HuheCA) Trump-era tax cuts, which Senate Republicans plan to address separately. Senate GOP members advanced their budget plan despite Trump's vocal support earlier this week for a competing "[big, beautiful bill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQRL9G6miQy5dUsLiNO982pbAilzYDShSktR3_fWD3KQeDGRycr8t0wVLLev2PCwXObQIJVkgQAFPCUl-T6VPIREC6p6C8kQCgjOlvAQ2OUqN06CJFP8jRKKeigjQoSdb1JbzfPgNpR-1PQ_SIOA6k7azAjJ2RlAq3_fTdyso3yvXVHrSfYlv6Gm7M29Hpfx2cOzjjttLzeFfvsHOJlTo4H7Qik5jv6UoseL8vm2D8EfHOh0i0tZ2RS1sPYYbsrLMxzjInJyV4bdI826ijznn2_R7S9iy1lsP5zsjrgqV-UPgvNY8AvwEAAP__cWRlGw)" from House Republicans.
## Overdose Deaths Decrease
New data from the Centers for Disease Control revealed that the U.S. experienced [a large decline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOtSAUhJ8GOgweUaSg-Bu7-7dbmqMclA2KEfYa337j7bebZPLN5Pt6jS8MMezLf9zIFp9GkNAKCQJgdBjiPSrurCcCajjZWisJALVSfLWTlpM3nZtbU_dkDPq5c0Z7aWrlO2h4sM_aB5CtaXTVzxoRTU9NO9WgDFOSXCjprL5T2MtKPt7pTWc1p41Hu5ZyZNb8YzAwGK7rquYp73Tlp2cwPJHBsOEh3PmziAd1KZNwhGUV5aTdZTHdIhcsxGDgp3XHFWIMudNMyWXDED9n5S_5t4XfAAAA__-j71yH) in overdose deaths between 2022 and 2023, continuing into 2024, with deaths dropping 17% from July 2023 to July 2024. Reported overdose deaths decreased in 20 states, increased in six states, and remained relatively unchanged in 24 states and the District of Columbia. Nationwide, drug overdose death rates dropped 4%. [See the details of the report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1urTAQBp_G7rDsxfwVLm5Dd26bEm3wGhwZjGAD4u0jThkp5RTffNJ8vIYXxhTX6T8u5DjkATRUhYYCYPAY0z1Y6V0gAiolOdNYDQDGWjk7b7SuNVnEFltfBwLT6NJQhR2ErkIZ3WN7D3TVlY1qxwYRu5bK6tOA7YTV5CPnXX3luPJMId35pF2NeZHJzczbIcp_AnoB_XVdavSjmvIpoF_H-RDQe2QU0M90MPLD-_dUPAqfD_rNxZJ3xhT5VpsPcnd-u2JK8agbYfW0YEzvZ_6rxOngJwAA__81P2D7). Alabama, Alaska, California, Nevada, Oregon, and Washington were among the states with a significant increase. New Jersey, Michigan, Kansas, Louisiana, and Florida reported decreases. See the [map here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOtSAUhJ8GOgweUaSg-Bu7-7dbmqMclA2KEfYa337j7bebZPLN5Pt6jS8MMezLf9zIFp9GkNAKCQJgdBjiPSrurCcCajjZWisJALVSfLWTlpM3nZtbU_dkDPq5c0Z7aWrlO2h4sM_aB5CtaXTVzxoRTU9NO9WgDFOSXCjprL5T2MtKPt7pTWc1p41Hu5ZyZNb8YzAwGK7rquYp73Tlp2cwPJHBsOEh3PmziAd1KZNwhGUV5aTdZTHdIhcsxGDgp3XHFWIMudNMyWXDED9n5S_5t4XfAAAA__-j71yH). Officials were encouraged by the data, contributing the positive numbers to aggressive public health actions and improved access to life-saving treatments.

It transmits power to devices through the air, eliminating the need for cables and batteries. This provides **a constant, reliable energy source for IoT devices** that track and deliver data in real-time. It’s such a powerful innovation, it earned Energous **“IoT Innovation of the Year”** honors. But their innovation could also be crucial to retail, manufacturing, and logistics operations, a combined [$650B market](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAMhp8mbKDgJJdjyFDpdNt17YgMGHCVEBTCVff2FbTq1tXfb_vX9_FoH8iel-kdA7k8xhYkmFJCCdAOyP7V6mJwIxGQKsjVVksAqLUuZmcUjJ3W1JAiDQRdN0oDGjWq3hqqC3bHtXNBmkbZ6tpbRGyupExXg26EljRwjqn6jLzkmUb_ik9KVR9D4d2c87oJ9SbgLuDOy5O2XNFCaYr7dmQOoO57Du0W99STUDcKyF7A5RgGGngPQt1W5KFcMeWF0jbz-st7DCvytJyJP1hfZamMan8kADSN1TUA2CK5Yf1i73m7WKHldLw6q-b_1D0dfAcAAP__kDZvyA). Data is the oil that keeps these companies running smoothly. And thanks to Energous’ wireless power network transmitters, all of these industries could get a **24/7 flow of data** without depending on batteries or cords. That’s why Energous already landed a contract to supply wireless power network solutions to a **Fortune 10 multinational retailer** , opening them up to**4,700 retail locations** across the U.S. Sounds like it’s time to cut the cord and****[**become an Energous shareholder as they work to empower businesses globally with their wireless power network solutions.**](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAMhp8mbKDgJJdjyFDpdNt17YgMGHCVEBTCVff2FbTq1tXfb_vX9_FoH8iel-kdA7k8xhYkmFJCCdAOyP7V6mJwIxGQKsjVVksAqLUuZmcUjJ3W1JAiDQRdN0oDGjWq3hqqC3bHtXNBmkbZ6tpbRGyupExXg26EljRwjqn6jLzkmUb_ik9KVR9D4d2c87oJ9SbgLuDOy5O2XNFCaYr7dmQOoO57Du0W99STUDcKyF7A5RgGGngPQt1W5KFcMeWF0jbz-st7DCvytJyJP1hfZamMan8kADSN1TUA2CK5Yf1i73m7WKHldLw6q-b_1D0dfAcAAP__kDZvyA)

| | Fellow Conservative, Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte 's Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist." They've stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder's name from a prestigious book award because of her "problematic" _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for "Drag Queen Story Hours" where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for "families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for..."

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros' Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you've noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating "the environment" to a type of religion. The "Teen Zone" is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here's what's really alarming. We can't just sit back and say, "Well, I'll just make sure my family doesn't go to "Drag Queen Story Hour" and we won't check out those inappropriate books." That may be good for your family - for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c572607ace345c5b4d6e4c19fe05a32&_e=DdQxavZGSzdIsL4z2zMjHKqicLNGMHBKCwNC7hAHFR5UiDJPPbnJNrHv1jJawbXoM45OZkbmFTZ0eMhErD_COaBl9i8Y30jbacaQUd6MEo2fzPwZImjfFyG9d4JDcfjlBmpCg623d7y9YQ-jThn7Mgnptp91J2xEihhZAmqMPzewBtwTRwKNqdDR1xDP8a9GX7DMpr1udmfac330NIt_XVsKGMNWW_Yzl3JGrv3jkAmE3oJJ4n1ShfpK-PL8-V1y2MiqBMcV-uB8dSgJzXKcbKvIY8TFFR--_9YyrK0pHUi-WpDvq1cflcFM5SF4UqOcwR6teYpf68wcn6iGaN-AkafIK-bB4ks75YQ9xZ075-QYHv6cTXJ_pHUanToLxJq5VOvvHAqWk8wfkNWuxqyFq2vi-dkQ5Xe7WCWtWqjFD-Y%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980's family sitcom "Growing Pains" or from my work in inspirational movies like "Fireproof" and "Left Behind." I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what's far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote "As You Grow" to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn't like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that's original), Brave Books was accused of trying to "confuse and demoralize children," our supporters were described as "bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about," and on and on. I can't even print most things these radicals said because it's so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang "God Bless America," and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here's the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own. So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots "See You at the Library" movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours... ...for a very simple mission - to reject the Left's radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America's libraries. And our ambitious goal is to expand our "See You at the Library" movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year. Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you 'll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c572607ace345c5b4d6e4c19fe05a32&_e=DdQxavZGSzdIsL4z2zMjHKqicLNGMHBKCwNC7hAHFR5UiDJPPbnJNrHv1jJawbXoM45OZkbmFTZ0eMhErD_COaBl9i8Y30jbacaQUd6MEo2fzPwZImjfFyG9d4JDcfjlBmpCg623d7y9YQ-jThn7Mgnptp91J2xEihhZAmqMPzewBtwTRwKNqdDR1xDP8a9GX7DMpr1udmfac330NIt_XVsKGMNWW_Yzl3JGrv3jkAmE3oJJ4n1ShfpK-PL8-V1yyzCZzLEJONOjTdePFv8_sWUvG-wC8oR3EhrBWvbq-xra896evT4MxzU467zSDJ2sQNaRgFsfdD7gXTqkxh65KhsHb1tBPo07yCZYin9S9zRCSksZTSK2Uh4pwyQ8OWmekIYcSk5iYmxbfX4JbGomL98d6L2KJxp_lwzpwwJ6N5Y%3D)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a "Story Hour Kit" to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who's organizing an event at their library. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don't have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who've taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1c572607ace345c5b4d6e4c19fe05a32&_e=DdQxavZGSzdIsL4z2zMjHKqicLNGMHBKCwNC7hAHFR5UiDJPPbnJNrHv1jJawbXoM45OZkbmFTZ0eMhErD_COaBl9i8Y30jbacaQUd6MEo2fzPwZImjfFyG9d4JDcfjlBmpCg623d7y9YQ-jThn7Mgnptp91J2xEihhZAmqMPzewBtwTRwKNqdDR1xDP8a9GX7DMpr1udmfac330NIt_XVsKGMNWW_Yzl3JGrv3jkAmE3oJJ4n1ShfpK-PL8-V1yoXe2IFu-I6od84qI-MXqWJMSxYHnYk5Ts91GPUGnRcuSZc_LfHP5EISwAGh5oQM5_Y38UAPEfZXYVx2nSRTzn7vtPNNzL87f7M98a-gPvOXXwUt8FAkfFtSFrwRtFNo6OHEUWHy2iN59q0AMtQx1khmALfU50-jjElqKK929MUQ%3D)_** That's enough to sponsor one entire "Story Hour Kit" yourself. body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/TcBstOptKu3nZdnYZAB5ZSlNVIccVthnlCaPfYTQfH_wSyfEuMk_Rm_m-izAkU--qJSTUvTBLGydLDmCRzYoPFX8NCTHwEogsWa2jIJqa592SbTBL6fUs_KFgcO_MuW70OaefWE-OeFo6snPoeNVcQnUQl2gS7BdPENwZbeiSMPj-aupwA1pktjNnsYfGc-ambIQ9qA6PTzOV97qC5jGDNZjtLHejNJ24lMI2Y_00TXc1QXLy21O_ux_ntlDOJ6TZzXSd0GPTBRBRyRpS4bu360ctLed8uujjDoUTl5RnONdKYw4UnxFjK6hcqs88ESnRjqE8e1rmGWXJOg6a1DT8iqxCbHkgWYUc9H1pCjVwcVZsIGs2Gx6OoK7lv5zs-09EjnywSIbTB-d9WaFhLISF0Vj8Wh8Ul5b_sLZqvfIRM8MLCAJOojxR0bdu9uKfCTgY6mU3A/V0ZeiPnnggd9IJBb7k5kgH85ano4n0MS/6)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/F8DNAbxwbNCiXh2vPi9fk8kOE8FdMDn5g703M_O3KbV9kyvXcBDuBumShRyz89TjpKZWV32enKh6bl446RfS3jdB1hoSfkvTBwXyzsiNkwWwhcen8HzCvDVXKtBKN4njM0onmJntfPoXI1kz0uaSaUPJhizij3oAsGPw7whn7UtpUeHXrxwb_Oag-j_AlWES2kQqeFmnEXHWXowTGXJbK86PD9vQXxU4zS4sNgqtZB0lRYhYFdJWdTDBag3T3V_rkueQdfeGGZCwg7eDL3mPZ_KQsaP6z2m0DHcEg-qc1X6Iru3tp9ixKPLzx74tlVQEWvAWqSmD2JymCihquD3m8kKaFv9QIvi_80m6Q1RyRjIwkRlauhqLncjra0FJgKWCFTcJkeSS9r2oSEUOAdG2V_ti67swlvVjmkmtPwnn4yIfze904oWw6u6nYFlY0qBoQeYOiA/h1x10xMe-hZYf_E47wF4wBRUpCHUpuW3/6)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**

clean_body: While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others? Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King” examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel. | | This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of “The David Story” while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty. Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below: Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
The Texas House unveiled its private [school voucher plan](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L9uwyAYBPCngQ0LvvAnGRi6sKVrRwvM54BKQmSI7bx95ezdTjrpd9L9XMerzyU_bt_-jrbvcx2Bg2IcGMAYfS7vUdJoA48XQdEKIzmA0krSZJUGo0wMkwySn72c42meIfiTjuoitKbZHhgHACGU4ecBJkREbqKR8hJiJJJjzL0uQ0_YcfdtLu-64jJM9U6LTb0_Gzl9EXAE3LZtw2_o-1EScIdNwHE4siDgPgBL9dWQLbiiL421KdVa2FpfU8KFPYt_EHB0sfG55VJy04ZIfrv7XD6b_d8TVgt_AQAA__9DLl30) on Thursday, filing a bill that would allocate taxpayer funds for qualifying families to pay private school tuition.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PszAQhH-N6YLM2nwVLl4posvbXok29gIrrYMFJpf8-xN31179jGZGz8dtvCELP-b_GMnl17SOoKG-aLgAjAFZ3qMtgrvr0FcFuaq1GqBualssztgJsOkQqtaGvoPJYGfAeGt6raGvC3ZnmQaAqqpb3ZXgiYh0G1pr-3sIymoKnNetzAtleuE-yXt90lb6NRbilpzTrsw_BYOCAVMqwyqC2yQ8L9nLcT-DCoad58eRFAx-IUw_eAdlhiPHMVLgIypzTcghCXqK9MgKmhPu67F5UuaaF_odLzYX0ieL8N60yuo5Isv3o_ynoqeDrwAAAP__9cdrTA) | |
# Saturday, February 22, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1878, Charles Moran was born in Tennessee. Moran coached football at Texas A&M from 1909 to 1914, famously beating the University of Texas twice in one year. When asked how he taught his players to be good losers, he responded, “ _I didn’t come here to lose_.” ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUQOGngc0W3FxMMjB08ZauHS1-bgIqhghQnLx91e59gXP0fV23q005lfun3cmM161uIEBNAiaALdiU3xvyYJwIF8nJSI0CQC0KeTTeIUhchEYUCGcVpDsHuZykvyjnvefJ_MYEAEiptDjP4ImIhA4a8eJCYCgopFHbPCINetl-y-_6pDb7uvNs4hiPzk4fDFYG63Ec8-jR1pJTobm2O4M12hJcrd8MViqjJeoM1r02WyYfbcvUJ2fbiJQzbyY8jpRz6otmKO67TfnvNP6lPw38BAAA__9EtlzZ)) If you've ever wanted to meet Texas native [Sandy Cheeks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAUhH8N7rDgBYxdUFzjLtdeaUF4iZ8OgwUkTv79Ktlmm-1mpNHo0_fvvJwdRUq3v25D257XvIAAzQVwgCU4iq9FdcF6ESbZoZVGCQA9aNWt1gyTdy4EF_RwFVoaGEenPYyTHszl5Dqy7zMBAFJqI8YeLoiIwgSj1ORDYEpgoJZL31Zs-HT1Gl_5gaW_5K2Ldm1tr-z0h8HMYD6Oo19zjK8j51Bwz6V9LxnM_l4pYa0_Ik94vHvdc7qhz55vlCinyu-JHliqi7y2e6BceVtxQ7678p9_MLiE0yAVjFoymLtiw35QjFQHw5S4bY7iB7H96uxh4SsAAP__sNpxog), known for her role in the animated TV series _SpongeBob SquarePants_ , you'll soon get your chance when she comes to life at NBCUniversal’s Kids Theme Park in Frisco, opening next year. If you're looking for ways to save big on your next flight, check out today's sponsor, [Dollar Flight Club](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PszAQhH-N6YLM2nwVLl4posvbXok29gIrrYMFJpf8-xN31179jGZGz8dtvCELP-b_GMnl17SOoKG-aLgAjAFZ3qMtgrvr0FcFuaq1GqBualssztgJsOkQqtaGvoPJYGfAeGt6raGvC3ZnmQaAqqpb3ZXgiYh0G1pr-3sIymoKnNetzAtleuE-yXt90lb6NRbilpzTrsw_BYOCAVMqwyqC2yQ8L9nLcT-DCoad58eRFAx-IUw_eAdlhiPHMVLgIypzTcghCXqK9MgKmhPu67F5UuaaF_odLzYX0ieL8N60yuo5Isv3o_ynoqeDrwAAAP__9cdrTA).

## Texas House Unveils School Choice Plan
Legislation to establish a state-funded [school choice program](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMR1ovayxKVz8DV3-9kpk2CVYMiFnfCF5-1PSX__NjDRfl_ESYoq36_-wiS_PZR8R0NSANeLIIabXSBX7CbjXlXhtCRBNZ6havUODgtDy5MCxbU3nWmfcRMbCMoe2iv5dBoiotbHgGpxFRMCyJeonZkUgHMuem7JKkWc4lvTaH5Kbed-q5NdS7odq_ykcFA7neb7dLLci-fj-CVneTuHwiSocQi5xTjJq7hxNHGpZJqq1lqXu-15qWmYOgQnBmGYtW6qy5_sZU4pHZxXBdQsxfcbLn288PP4GAAD__45AYKM) was filed in the Texas House on Thursday, over two weeks after the Texas Senate passed its version. House Bill 3 by Rep. Brad Buckley (R-Salado) would fund education savings accounts at [85 percent](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8GOiy4YBMXFK-hy2u3tAhcByRiLCBx8veruN92jmY0Oj_X5epSTtv9v3ug6e-1LMBhZBwYwBJcyp9F0WBuPMyCohFacYBxGhWNRvJVAiJqsbqL1iDlReJtnqScvVqdpMl8xzgACDFqfhnAIyJyHbRS8y0EojiG1EsdesSOb9fW_CkvrIMvD5pN7H1vRP4jYAnY4zgGH2vZvpSA3fBoBGwsz9bLxs4-AetqTz4jAXsm7MuRNR9LyexVnj5ibQy40HqaxmGPO60m7EfKObVJE8XvD5fyeaH_6eRl4DcAAP__4ORkww) of the statewide average for public schools, a model that ties future program funding directly to public education spending. Buckley also filed a bill that would spend more than $9 billion on public education. House Speaker Dustin Burrows said the two bills will move forward in tandem, calling the package a "[Texas Two-Step](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCnMZ0js5iYFC6uocu1VyLjXWLrNjbCBpK3PyW69q9H32g0f-7T3UWO6fHbPcnW15InUNBLBRJgQhf5PekG7azw1jZkW6MVQH_tdRMsdQuaoffeqK5zyoDHoSUalqFbsPPYRPspUwDQtr1RwwU8EZEyaLS-zYhCK8JY83apgSq9XFn4nQ_aLj4_G7ah1rWI7peAUcDo5-L2UmP6pALGRGcRMHL2jgWMXy9D3gvJjQ5yXGTxIWeWR959oE2u7JI8Q_RB_iVai1z2hDE9JOeTNlmDS3LdZ47-vyzNZnE9I3MsVyO0ejxd5O-6-uNdh4V_AQAA___XMHGn).” House Bill 3 [differs significantly](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1h4jcEuKK5xl2uvtMCs45U2JgokJH9_SnTtdVO8GY3ez2k5eWI6zt_-gq48t7SAgkEqkABL9MSvRTfRBRWnrkHXWa0ABjPoZnfKDKMNUzBgpn6zow_BjFtnugHtOPa6IfceUwDQdYNVYwsrIqKy0Wo9hRiFVhippFtbdiz49HnjV3rgrV3TpWG3l3LNov8SMAuYa63tlp76wJrfgID5HQXMn6rc0z2jvB8PJM6SSpapHjKve0os1z3RipLxTJl9oXT88YGYJci-ubl4rcRM2Vih1fniiT8_yr9iHg5-AwAA___ssmd7) from the Senate’s proposal, which would allocate $10,000 per participating student. Gov. Greg Abbott has designated school choice legislation an official priority.
## Dude Perfect Unveils New Frisco HQ
YouTube sensation [Dude Perfect](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGSsyAUBeCngQ4HrhB-C4o0dPnbLR30XiM7RF3AmLz9jum3P-d8M-fr1t9CTHG5_w8PcvU1rT1IMEKCAOgxxPTuNUc3SOwUJ6eslgDmYjSfnensOE02tKqlDgnMoLQOgzJjB3ZoJx7dOSYBQClj5b8GRiIiadFq3Q2ITEvCWNfc1JkqvUKZ0nt9Um7G9cGTm2vdCmuvDDwDfxxHU7Y11zLsJS5Uyve65yWkM83AX3ONY6LCwJ8uAy-BgVcdA487ktgoTzRWsS9PiqmIhQ7xUcVMAX_2kCvls86zw-2IKcVysUzL-yPEj8Lrnyc9HfwGAAD__yRLavY) has debuted their new headquarters in Frisco, spanning 80,000 square feet in Jerry Jones’ Star Business Park and dubbed “DPHQ3.” The dudes claim their multimillion-dollar space is “the world’s greatest office,” complete with a basketball court, a 45-yard football field with a regulation-size NFL goalpost, offices, a slide, and a host of other features. The likes of Tom Brady, Bryson DeChambeau, and Noah Lyles toured the facility and signed the "[stairs of fame](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1jjMYS4oHiNu7x2S4swQ4yETRaTkPz9KttvfXWPjs7XZbm4mOJ---82tvUV8oKAWgJKxIVcTO9FdWSvQNPQsR2MAkR90qpbrdFBaQigpzDqEXTQSofBgTm5M2o_ddF-YICIw6ANnHv0zMxgyCg1XYmEAqZYc-nrypVf7gjpnZ9cep-3Ltm11vshxn8CZ4Fza63fr55C-8wC553bIXBO2bskcKYHsbxzCeyr3LlJLbeYUsy7pJySK3JlR98PVyqXQ4YSD58FzqMxChQInLti6d4-n-NkhILb5mL6dal_xnla_AkAAP__vWlmkQ)" before Wednesday’s debut. You can see pictures of the [new headquarters here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1iwwRAKite4y2uvtDC7jpGI8WES4r8_5frrRzPSfN2mm48pbvf__kGuvpc8gYCBC-AAE_qYzkl16GaBVnbkpFECYNCD6lanjUUKV5SKgtYwmIDyYoWyqNAqee2i-8gEAEg5GHHtIRARCYNGKTsjMiUIY82lrytVevtjSWd-UelDfnTJrbXuB7v8YzAyGFtrfcrBp73kJSb6QAzGjdrBYMQnEt-pLBQqn4vfkG_U-FLiETJfv_mZn_U5E5cCNGhtu-JwbzGleGjDlLg_fEy_4frniZeDnwAAAP__4tFhGQ).
## Texas Leads Build-to-Rent Boom
Texas is the U.S. capital for rental home construction, far outnumbering any other state in build-to-rent homes, according to research from [Point2Homes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEZmMDgpXLyGLq_dEjn2EEYyNrInIfz9Kum3u8XV0dH5uc03R5HS47_b0PJ7yTMoGKQCCTAHR_GcdRPsXYVr16DtjFYAwzjoZrUD9mq5gBmc18s4hjtg6D1cl95cxg6xIfuBKQDousGoSwseEVGZYLS-3kMQWmEgzqXlFRnfri7xzC8src9bE-3KvFfR_xMwCZiO42j3TIlhzRvWz0fAlPCoAqaCFV3x63fuubCslB4R5eI2iqcsmNjFKp8pYJE-p8rl6ZlyalfeYlNs2A-KkepohFaPzVH8WvCfWV4WfgMAAP__GoRoiA). The Lone Star State had 21,812 rental homes under construction as of the end of January, making up nearly 20% of the U.S. total at that time. On this day in 1878, Charles Moran was born in Tennessee. Moran coached football at Texas A&M from 1909 to 1914, famously beating the University of Texas twice in one year. When asked how he taught his players to be good losers, he responded, “ I didn’t come here to lose.” () If you've ever wanted to meet Texas native , known for her role in the animated TV series SpongeBob SquarePants , you'll soon get your chance when she comes to life at NBCUniversal’s Kids Theme Park in Frisco, opening next year. House Bill 3 by Rep. Brad Buckley (R-Salado) would fund education savings accounts at of the statewide average for public schools, a model that ties future program funding directly to public education spending. Buckley also filed a bill that would spend more than $9 billion on public education. House Speaker Dustin Burrows said the two bills will move forward in tandem, calling the package a ".” House Bill 3 from the Senate’s proposal, which would allocate $10,000 per participating student. Gov. Greg Abbott has designated school choice legislation an official priority. Dude Perfect Unveils New Frisco HQ YouTube sensation has debuted their new headquarters in Frisco, spanning 80,000 square feet in Jerry Jones’ Star Business Park and dubbed “DPHQ3.” The dudes claim their multimillion-dollar space is “the world’s greatest office,” complete with a basketball court, a 45-yard football field with a regulation-size NFL goalpost, offices, a slide, and a host of other features. The likes of Tom Brady, Bryson DeChambeau, and Noah Lyles toured the facility and signed the "" before Wednesday’s debut. You can see pictures of the . Texas Leads Build-to-Rent Boom Texas is the U.S. capital for rental home construction, far outnumbering any other state in build-to-rent homes, according to research from . The Lone Star State had 21,812 rental homes under construction as of the end of January, making up nearly 20% of the U.S. total at that time. and its surrounding suburbs is the top metro area for new rental homes, adding 8,470 houses for rent in the upcoming months. Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

They've just dumped in $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/UZTjlv3V9rvg5It8x6Vx7NOqFS8EnnhRFSOX1tvh1Sx5_Y5uNn7HAhiOCg-VVqRqyhk9aXLT23nNo8bqssnQTEGnau_DFLyJAAPCr_n5BJJ9GYijoNF-JQGJ46QyDoGhvdev6auIUbwSDdMkcTGrWdyY8qRqzjFE8bmyUu8Ea_oORAM1KuJzEcUomgxKc3dqRV7Iqmb1R-kGiyloyqmxMr_ndlR-aeO1lNRbvjVAhzSQ6utE5Aaon4l4XWBed8QyPcxS9flIgwPMiYSpqFxepM7EV8Efx2kBHKkPbNeF5Uq_4UqbrccmD_NwhgzH31DvvS59O8U3rQhDZQvzn-_M0Z3nDS_NEpER-wO5aFRnle6Gk3-DKyVa_3bAzBtAmztMPjLLYxDx8aXcc07w10rU18odnAE9G5IWQdA3hzZ5AFKK0g1SQ20Aa2WPSKPYE-zfB7kVAw/mC6cGySJuVK2KcS7axbSyspaR130fMhW/6)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This beautiful course is now available on DVD. You can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/gKzt32QEx52-_WQE-eJLfL3JEoBxeVkUgprmwep6mMWKVCVzsOtDPnANUJGJq6etOsK340gWUhI4UWlb2OaILSEqLlDk4QLO_5o7OUPxOjN7Ogr3oUjhjMRLNUNmqx_NKQHYlUhOEZb2Q-B66aowQxb9sLcGdwa-e6p_ONZN4KlJlV3HXFAOp4i_V955V0VWF5H1Q9pK_6p8GZa5jX2V4yBxtLiiCn27jyGjRHl4UGFz26SsqeBP8TOPbhZ1MncNz0HDux_57wypX2lGwQSnhpvyeLL_t-XlQ86CAYCmL_Mr1ijGIhvNVIEMbFsozK5noHMpAzDCXED8AoWGxKm629JfA-D0rjXV9quRKv_5zgI83ERmMEbnEq0Csz3f4NykXjD9iV8lShM6OpRtUz1IA4pWW80xDNV26sezWaz8ZIWaGSjIf1eZRUlnMul2Jp88lARNtw/YUL5vR-QK0ov-qcor0i-ajylG7S0oZxz/6)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**

name: History Facts
subject: Were Greek statues originally white?
body:
Walk through a museum with ancient Greek and Roman artifacts and you’re likely to see the familiar gleam of white marble statues.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dcqu7a84ttc9w7guz2pkucla16xc9gtit91c4u9rqlrq37wkry9wit2sr1xou2hu4vvg4sw7fjchr17h4m70gswdifhopvdukr9m4dbplfhvjup4768oe145vjfjvbf8t4jc6kqd6x1av1l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Many Greek and Roman statues were originally painted vibrant colors.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W alk through a museum with ancient Greek and Roman artifacts and you’re likely to see the familiar gleam of white marble statues. It’s how our modern eyes have always seen these ancient artifacts, but originally, many of these statues were painted in bright, vivid colors. The decorative practice known as [polychromy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — meaning “many colors” in Greek — brought statues to life in vibrant detail, with intricately designed robes, lifelike eyes, and detailed jewelry.
---
Artists [didn’t just use paint](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to produce this effect: Bronze, copper, silver, and gold added shine, while gemstones and colored marbles created textured inlays. Over time, exposure to the elements — along with cleaning and restoration — stripped away most of the color and detail, leaving only faint traces behind. Though archaeologists and art historians have [noted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=107jrez3mbl8ws63ek2qaiwj12ufz6b5d2ylwbowvr72d6y4gqsectfw0p15pxawl1knsuwuu647c1bklkloye50172whikllttut6csk9eu1fzzbv51rm5xn4gu90iqbqcxdd7v2mh7aqt7ypkyc9zeqfw3zzn9t3c1968w9mjh5v85dyjz14gri3uf5s6humutn17y4ln0dayil7t29afhcs67xwywvtibhubk5hx3t8cae93wc7redyxjb9gi5fabqyqyvq8weeqssrseq8xbkmox1e3m3rpkxw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) traces of pigmentation on excavated Greek and Roman antiquities since the 18th and 19th centuries, it wasn’t until the 1980s that the full, colorful scope of the past began to be understood. German archaeologist Vinzenz Brinkmann led the charge, and today, his detailed analysis and meticulous plaster recreations have helped revive long-obscured details such as the goddess Artemis’ [bright floral crown](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and blond hair.
It was once thought that Greek and Roman sculptors intentionally favored minimalism; the presumed preference for form over decoration was considered the height of classical beauty and influenced contemporary art and culture. While some historians [question the accuracy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of the research methods and even the colors used in modern reconstructions, the lost hues of antiquity nonetheless reframe long-held beliefs, and remind us that history is often a work in progress.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## It took 4,000 pounds of meat a day to feed the Giza pyramid builders.
Feeding the massive workforce that built Egypt’s pyramids was a colossal task in itself. Archaeological evidence suggests that upwards of [4,000 pounds of meat](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss331a&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) were required every day to sustain the tens of thousands of laborers. These workers, most likely skilled laborers and farmers recruited during the agricultural off-season, were housed in nearby villages; it was there that researchers uncovered more than 175,000 animal bones and fragments. Cattle, goats, and sheep were a key part of the daily feast, along with beer and grains. The research, shared by the University of Michigan’s Richard Redding in 2013, indicates that a central authority likely managed the Giza settlement, while others coordinated a large-scale livestock supply chain — an impressive feat for the time, not unlike every other aspect of the pyramids.
