clean_body: The Nuts and Bolts of Running our Country Like a Modern Business | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The Nuts and Bolts of Running our Country Like a Modern Business | | | Feb 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | In the modern business era, corporations operate under one simple golden rule: to maximize shareholder profit. Let's take a minute to see what that looks like at different stages of the business lifecycle. In early business stages--or with companies in developing markets with exciting products or services--most businesses are run at a loss, so shareholder value is increased by driving excitement or demand for the company itself. Like a pyramid scheme, the company only continues running if it receives outside investment to prop up the early investors and shareholders, whose shares then get more valuable. If the new money doesn't keep coming, the pyramid collapses and you have a WeWork situation, where the late investors and employees are screwed, but the founding . Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Once a business is established, the accountants take over and shareholder profit is maximized through things like market consolidation. Acquiring competitors (or sometimes even being acquired), consolidating supply chains, and exercising market dominance are tools of the trade. If a company is successful enough at this, it becomes a Boeing, and no matter how bad the product is, to include planes that fall out of the sky, consumers are forced to buy it because there is no competition and high barriers to entry mean there never again will be. When a company is on a downward trajectory, or frequently these days even while it is still successful, shareholder profit is maximized through "managed decline," a phrase used by market purists to euphemize the stripping for parts of a company for profit. Typically, a CEO, a private equity firm, or an activist shareholder wrests control over a company and sells everything of value, cuts workforce and production, flat-lines investment, and loads up on debt held (preferably) by your own private equity fund or a friend. The company's carcass is picked clean and the couple of fat vultures who organized the scheme fly off to find their next target. Once in a generation, however, a visionary transcends these traditional business practices. Instead of working within the life-cycle boxes, they become all at once the pyramid schemer, the monopolist, and the vulture. They don't let private equity through their doors, they become private equitists themselves. They convert their productive companies into financial engines, running hot and fast on the fuel of past productivity. No one embodies this more than Jack Welch, the former CEO of General Electric. "Neutron" Jack, as they called him, built his reputation on the back of savvy marketing--wowing investors and hanging with celebrities-- and the legacy of his predecessors' accomplishments at America's greatest company. According to one of his , "[Welch's] face was on the cover of magazines all the time. He emerged as sort of this imperial executive and helped define what I think is still with us today in the form of a certain amount of CEO worship." In 1999 Fortune named him the manager of the century. Under the cloak of "efficiency," Welch had his managers rank their employees every year and then fired the bottom-ranking ten percent of GE's work force each year. The original "you're fired" man, Welch fired more than 100,000 people in a series of mass layoffs and factory closures in his first few years, then off-shoring all of the work that still needed to be done. He operated the company in stark contrast from the GE of yesterday when, , GE was "proud of the way that they distributed their profits widely with employees, with their supply chains, and even with the government. It was a 1953 annual report by GE that I cite in the book, where they brag about how much they're paying in salaries to their workers and how much they're paying in taxes to the government." Welch advocated mass acquisitions, including buying completely unrelated companies like NBC(!). He then the company, saddling GE with debt to fund share buybacks and dividends, diving into subprime mortgages, and gutting GE's production base to turn it into a private equity firm. The short-term gains on paper, as they always are when you are turning assets into cash, were incredible. Eventually, . By 2018 GE, once America's greatest company, was removed from the DOW Jones Industrial Average. In 2024, it was finally put out of its misery and . Utterly destroyed. Jack Welch, on the other hand, is still lionized. When he died a legend in 2020, the former and current President eulogized him on Twitter: "There was no corporate leader like "neutron" Jack. He was my friend and supporter. We made wonderful deals together. He will never be forgotten." And, to the detriment of us all, neither he nor his management techniques--which are still universally mimicked by wannabe management wizards--have been. For example, one of the first things Elon Musk did when he bought Twitter was ordering managers to The DOGE's goal for federal workforce reduction? The same arbitrary 10%. Folks, Elon Musk isn't running America, Jack Welch is running it from his grave. And the worst thing is that he has been doing it for a while even without Elon. Just look at what we have done with our country over the last decades: Financing share buybacks and dividends through debt? Check. In the form of massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans and corporations, wholly funded by debt. A pyramid scheme? Check. A generation of boomer politicians getting cheap education, lower taxes, worry-free carbon energy, unfunded social security, and so many other things and then voting to lower future benefits and raise age limits, making education unaffordable, and saddling us with two forever wars without paying for them (among so many other things). Financialization of the company? Check. The financial sector percentage of U.S. national GDP is higher than it has been at any point since The Great Depression. It has doubled since 1980. Production as a percentage of GDP? to the rise in financialization. America is already being run like a company--the same way that Jack Welch ran GE into the ground--and the latest DOGE moves are just the culmination of decades of managed decline of our country. (Ironically, managed decline was a phrase used when he was in Congress to whine about libs while doing his best to make sure America was run in the image of Welch and GE) The worst part of all of this is that while we are all supposed to be equal shareholders in America, and should theoretically benefit in the short term from the gutting of our nation, it hasn't worked that way. The dividends and share buybacks funded by stripping our country for parts are overwhelmingly distributed to the top, as evidenced by the 2001, 2003, and 2017 tax cuts that heavily skewed toward the richest Americans (Paul Ryan helped pass all three) and, more recently, the PPP loan scam which was converted into a nearly trillion dollar cash . Who do you think is going to benefit from the impending firing of ? The millions of Americans desperately relying on their tax refunds who may have to wait longer now, or the "high income earners, partnerships, large corporations and promoters" that many of those employees were recently hired to investigate? In one very clear way, Jack Welch's management model works. Short term, vulture shareholders reap a lot of wealth picking the carcass clean. Every chart printed on American income and wealth inequality proves it. Unfortunately for all of us without wings, who can't fly off into the sunset but will always live here, running America like a business means gutting the only institution most of us will ever have a voting stake in and forever diminishing our power and quality of life. So the next time someone tells you that America should be run like a business, you can let them know what that really means. Lucas Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. Box 1240, Independence, MO 64050 ? ?

body:
Last weekend, the president fired over 3,000 federal employees primarily from the Centers for Disease Control

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102591504/529648513/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzg2ZDZkZC00MWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DHiATYJILHjXQeXN7aXWlX5hKxwNW-w2NmVtduDTOYk=) _**“Mass firings continue across nation’s health agencies”[1]**_ Last weekend, the president fired over 3,000 federal employees primarily from the Centers for Disease Control and the National Institutes of Health — including employees responsible for emergency preparedness and outbreak response efforts. **Today, because of these indiscriminate terminations, our nation is less prepared for a public health emergency.** By cutting the CDC’s resources, President Trump is risking the lives of the American people — all to pay for the costs of a billionaire tax cut. It’s wrong, it’s dangerous, and it needs to be put to a stop. [_**That’s why Sharice just introduced a new petition calling on President Trump to reverse his reckless terminations of health workers. Will you sign your name in support?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102591505/529648514/2056487417?refcode=email_022225_health-workers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzg2ZDZkZC00MWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DHiATYJILHjXQeXN7aXWlX5hKxwNW-w2NmVtduDTOYk=&emci=57052dbd-cfef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7386d6dd-41f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102591506/529648515/275360789?refcode=email_022225_health-workers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzg2ZDZkZC00MWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DHiATYJILHjXQeXN7aXWlX5hKxwNW-w2NmVtduDTOYk=&emci=57052dbd-cfef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7386d6dd-41f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458)

It has become abundantly clear that the president has little interest in keeping his campaign promise to lower everyday costs. Instead, Trump is focused on lining his billionaire allies’ pockets by freezing the basic functions of government — and we’re already seeing the consequences here in Kansas.
Whether it’s the health care workers charged with protecting us from diseases, or the Social Security Administration workers who ensure that seniors receive the benefits they’ve earned, the president is taking a sledgehammer to the agencies whose job is ensuring the wellbeing of the American people — and Sharice is standing up to it.
[_**Call on Trump to reverse his reckless terminations by signing your name next to Sharice’s. With your help, we can show politicians in Washington that we will not be silent as the president dismantles our health care, our security, and our federal government for his own gain.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102591507/529648516/275360789?refcode=email_022225_health-workers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzg2ZDZkZC00MWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DHiATYJILHjXQeXN7aXWlX5hKxwNW-w2NmVtduDTOYk=&emci=57052dbd-cfef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=7386d6dd-41f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=22117458)

name: Sarah Koo, Leaders We Deserve
subject: This might not seem glamorous, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We rely on support from people like you to make this work possible.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250222-1&t=1&akid=1772%2E587540%2E0cNhE-)
Hi there, Peter! I’m Sarah Koo, the Operations Manager at Leaders We Deserve.
**I’m proud to work for an organization dedicated to electing the next generation of bold, young progressive leaders to serve in state legislatures and Congress.**
**[We rely on support from people like you to make this work possible. If you’re able, can you contribute $5 right now to help power our organization?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250222-1?refcode=em20250222-1772&amount=5&refcode2=1772_587540_0cNhE-&akid=1772%2E587540%2E0cNhE-)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250222-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250222-1772&refcode2=1772_587540_0cNhE-&akid=1772%2E587540%2E0cNhE-)**
As Operations Manager, I’m responsible for A LOT of moving pieces – including supporting David and Kevin with project management and running our office.
Managing the HQ might not seem glamorous, but it’s important work! We have to pay the bills and keep the lights on so we have a home base for our operations.
We try to be as frugal as we can with office expenses – most of the furniture at HQ was donated by our supporters – so we can focus our resources on our mission.
Electing the next generation of progressive leaders is something I’m passionate about – but I can tell you firsthand that supporting these candidates isn’t cheap.
**Running for office is _more expensive_ than ever.**
That’s why grassroots support from folks like you is so essential to what we’re trying to accomplish, Peter. We don’t have a bunch of billionaires funding our work. They’re too busy bankrolling our opposition. But when people like you and me put our efforts together, we can make a real difference where it matters most.
**[Can you chip in $5 to keep our office running and support our mission?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250222-1?refcode=em20250222-1772&amount=5&refcode2=1772_587540_0cNhE-&akid=1772%2E587540%2E0cNhE-)**
Thank you!
Sarah Koo
Operations Manager
Leaders We Deserve

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Another win for the people!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Last night, we secured another court order to temporarily stop unelected billionaire Elon Musk and his DOGE team from accessing U.S. Treasury payment systems.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250222&t=1&akid=1656%2E1088799%2EqXmqRg)
I have an update for you:
**Last night, we secured another court order to temporarily stop unelected billionaire Elon Musk and his DOGE team from accessing Americans’ private data.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250222?refcode=em20250222-1656&refcode2=1656_1088799_qXmqRg&akid=1656%2E1088799%2EqXmqRg)
This decision by a U.S. District Judge in New York will extend the ban on Musk and DOGE from U.S. Treasury Department payment systems, which they have no legal authority to access.
**It’s another win for the people — for now.** While this preliminary injunction is good news, unfortunately, other court decisions this week have allowed DOGE to continue accessing records at federal health, education, labor, and consumer financial protection agencies, as well as directing the firing of federal workers.
**This fight is far from over.** President Donald Trump and his administration do not have the authority to give our sensitive data to anyone they see fit or to fire anyone they want without cause.
**[Will you support my grassroots-fueled campaign as I keep up my work to stop Trump and Musk’s unlawful power grabs?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250222?refcode=em20250222-1656&refcode2=1656_1088799_qXmqRg&akid=1656%2E1088799%2EqXmqRg)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250222?refcode=em20250222-1656&amount=5&refcode2=1656_1088799_qXmqRg&akid=1656%2E1088799%2EqXmqRg)**
In solidarity,
Rob

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Democracy is not a given. It is a decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Our next Governor must be ready to stand up to anyone, no matter how rich or how powerful, who tries to tear down our democracy or take away our rights in Michigan.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
Team,
If I’ve learned one thing during my years of public service, whether protecting civil rights during my clerkship with the Honorable Damon J. Keith or serving as Michigan’s Secretary of State, it’s this:
**Democracy is not a given. It is a decision.**
**We have to defend it.
Protect it.
Stand up for it.**
| [DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
---
That’s why I’ve spent my career fighting for voting rights. I’ve worked to combat voter suppression and expand access to the ballot box. Even in the face of threats to my own life, I’ve ensured free and fair elections for everyone and implemented reforms to protect the safety and security of every person regardless of their race, gender, faith, or sexuality.
**Our next Governor must be ready to stand up to anyone, no matter how rich or how powerful, who tries to tear down our democracy or take away our rights in Michigan.**
That’s exactly what I’ve done as Secretary of State — and I’m ready to do the same as Michigan’s next Governor.
[**Please help me continue the fight for our democracy by pitching in to my campaign for Governor today.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q12025.faQQoW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
---

---

---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q12025.slPEnH&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q12025.UvwKrI&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=109%2E181023%2EnDr_gq)
---
Protecting your voice, and your vote, during a time when both are under attack, is the greatest honor of my life. And I’ll be proud to continue doing just that as Michigan’s Governor.
Thank you for your support!
— Jocelyn

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Undeterred
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Oregon has been a leader in the battle against the climate crisis. We are known stewards of the environment around us and have crafted ambitious policies that protect our future. **Tina has been at the forefront of these efforts, advocating for a cleaner, more sustainable tomorrow for our children and grandchildren.** Tina is doubling down on our efforts to protect our environment. Regardless of what’s happening in Washington, DC, she remains undeterred in the mission. It's going to take all of us, together, to confront this crisis head-on. That’s why Tina allocated $25 million in her state budget to enhance renewable energy access and build climate resiliency. And it’s why she is fighting to maintain federal investments in clean energy. This funding is just a start, and with grassroots support, we can meet our climate goals. But we can't do it alone. Our shared progress depends on the contributions of supporters like you. [**Will you sign on right now and stand with us as we continue the work to protect our environment?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102593285/529653435/-987987562?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGY1YzVjMS00NWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOLIkfYuqW-bACuVsQTaKLeKEsZl-o6mlGvPQrXueSk=&emci=84d76546-15ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b4f5c5c1-45f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15353729) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102593286/529653444/-987987562?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGY1YzVjMS00NWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOLIkfYuqW-bACuVsQTaKLeKEsZl-o6mlGvPQrXueSk=&emci=84d76546-15ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b4f5c5c1-45f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15353729)
---
Pursuing new, innovative solutions and driving the transition to clean energy is how we’ll stay on track to meet the climate action goals we’ve set. Together, we can protect our environment for generations to come.
Thank you for your support,
Team Kotek
| Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. **Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102593287/529653445/559856784?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGY1YzVjMS00NWYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QOLIkfYuqW-bACuVsQTaKLeKEsZl-o6mlGvPQrXueSk=)

Peter Willis,

Once again, Bernie is sounding the alarm over Trump’s terrifying ‘plan’
for Gaza:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21696?t=1011&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ][IMG]

Make no mistake: Trump’s plan to expel more than two million Palestinians
and turn Gaza into the “riviera of the Middle East” is ethnic cleansing.
And he didn’t stop there. Trump also bypassed Congress and fast-tracked
the sale of $8 BILLION more weapons to Israel.

Now, as most of the world condemns Trump’s dangerous plan, a thrilled and
emboldened Netanyahu is racing to try to make it “a reality”. We HAVE to
do something.

Giving Israel a massive new influx of bombs and missiles at a moment where
they are jumping at the chance to expel the Palestinian people is
INCREDIBLY dangerous.

Bernie has vowed once again to lead the way and do everything he can to
stop the arms sale. But it will only work if he gets more members of
Congress to join him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21696?source=email-022225&t=1012&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Together we can overwhelm Congress with demands to join Bernie and stop
fueling Israel’s war on Gaza. Will you add your name?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21696?source=email-022225&t=1013&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]ADD YOUR NAME

At a press conference this week, Netanyahu praised Trump’s plan, vowing to
"ensure that future becomes a reality" and "ensure that Gaza never again
poses a threat to Israel".

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21696?t=1014&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ][IMG]

Meanwhile, Egypt, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Qatar and the United Arab Emirates
are RACING to try to offer an alternative plan for Gaza to stop Trump’s
dangerous takeover. But the fact is that NOTHING will change until the
U.S. government stops providing Israel with an endless stream of bombs and
weapons.

Bernie has introduced resolutions to block arms shipments in the past –
and was even able to win historic levels of support from the Senate. But
to actually have a shot at changing the status quo, he’s going to need
more support. And that’s where we come in.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21696?source=email-022225&t=1015&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Will you send a clear message to Congress that right now it’s more
important than ever to stand with Bernie and stop the endless supply of
U.S. weapons to Israel?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7742%2E5885482%2E6QjGLZ ]Website |

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump and Musk are Firing Veterans - And Lying About It
body:
MAGA is reaching new lows. With Elon at the helm of DOGE, American veterans are being fired in mass.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wjexg-v5qqp1-kyd76rh2/)
---
# **Trump & Musk Are Firing Veterans—And Lying About It**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wjexg-v5qqp2-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Trump and Elon Musk want you to believe they’re cutting “low-performing” federal employees. The truth? They’re firing veterans, cybersecurity experts, and nuclear defense specialists—all while lying to the American people. Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has turned the federal government into a political purge machine, gutting agencies that protect national security and provide critical services.

* Veterans who served our country—fired.
* Cybersecurity experts protecting us from China—fired.
* Nuclear security professionals keeping America safe—fired.

All of them dismissed under false claims of “poor performance”—even after receiving outstanding reviews. This isn’t about efficiency. It’s about Trump and Musk consolidating power by installing their loyalists, no matter the cost to national security. **_The Department of Veterans Affairs?_** Over 1,000 firings, including disabled vets. **_The National Nuclear Security Administration?_** Hundreds of layoffs, setting our nuclear defense back years. **_The Department of Homeland Security?_** Cybersecurity experts cut while foreign threats grow. This is sabotage. And the worst part? They’re covering it up, blaming the very workers who have dedicated their lives to serving this country. Trump and Musk aren’t draining the swamp—they’re burning it down. They are making America weaker, and we cannot let them get away with it. [**_We need to fight back, expose the truth, and hold them accountable. Chip in now to help us spread this message before it’s too late. This is a battle for the future of our country. If we don’t stand up now, who will?_**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wjexg-v5qqp3-kyd76rh4/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

subject: The future of American education is at stake
body:
You may have heard of Hillsdale College, but did you know that we are leading a national effort to restore excellence in American education?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/FfHEEqdf6rGDcMF8-858VJy8WwfyubFaX229I0QBawBVvaxVPSyslK49oBKxUuEJtcN7o4oFE1BkhiywoTfS2WPRVH2hHqneD6htBfeR2t6ONIjyt1mdkkRACDX-9qGJP93QVh33P3K340lXlBfeEHIVgfpHjz8YI7wqqZS4nCRWia1Zcb2M94pu/IetA8QmyG-qb61xLF9jr40ZlCYelCwLJ/6)_

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/2DEGtB3GeNf3NaQCD-bZT-j9MQO_Tar1jiSvHJo6pO48xNHJNAB2MD0MbsX2kAxSZ5Gf_NEACyRPPA0vomqQepKgdcNU4tHLx5JuzkeCKH17hNN6eL5LpC7ejw5yj64eo5G4HvoLL3EQ1-eDQN12RHXphUcDsjx24m1vsNJWDsw285lubIKoM5Rwy3M2dfmMux32k71bw8Ey9IxfpQj3OodaGtWAoNRDKzpbGLJJzZos_QRxX-4Npqtz0rpExaZHGAr1lTp_68dbhqByj7mPcdExnTc-RTjJMbx2Z7P46b5P6cOHHO5kagc3LEKjEjGq_OCIocid-xXKWj_Qbh2iRF1bDtppH3m9Hya_FW29mSFR2qyOWS_5VR2I3ZU5vwDaw7BvXha0A2aHrgA9GQ35u7dftar-5VQ6BWxcP674y6RLkIjvZZkWt1IJFlRjDCjiQoj7MVqD/ulgkDJifVYDMiYr5OjCaF25Vtc9VlplI/6)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

You may have heard of Hillsdale College, but did you know that we are leading a national effort to restore excellence in American education?

For nearly 200 years, Hillsdale College has provided a classical education rooted in the Constitution and the principles of liberty--without taking a single penny of government funding.

[That's why we are conducting the **National Survey on the Department of Education**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/JrzBuWkBzsPR1eupJgqNZyiOOjx-NijzlU1CHCLSA08OnRuPTRIYWXMyYFeBcbS9LWHzNZeWp_7WuUq3tk8x8Tv3PLD6dDmrtrTl9oYEZcAJ9ol0ZVQ7ku8FIkXxKCNx_lFkchSNfAVjRBEKFyrniIFarZUbXamZ0ZjCEB_0L2DbmpMntwe4rnnnfDlXPsVPLdfd2SOQxwBPvFsl9IZhNpCBv2zdMj4dghbDYHVfjK5IXTJhiFHSekpfLVs3BJjwJOVxCVwISYl7zaTI7C96-58OIU2V-q7A57UWwGdm6OV2t5XarJc46y9kyfHvK0a4mGimI0xN_gtP4fLgSnJH4Qh8VxrxBohOW8XOmipQ9UUXDSWzL5Aa5pNBopdeHCmMULdzT9-qOQBrSgEYRMKq1LK8cPdnrf71gnPgjhccMcMd4hpe5lV4Tg7baDJpdPR80RK1pHXo/n4-bkJAV9pbsnP8qtVeRp29GvMODr8iC/6)--to hear what Americans like YOU think about the role of the federal government in education, parental rights, and school standards.

Will you take just two minutes to share your opinion?

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-education-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/hXD4rRIekvyNahwJdVYheZ9ITdo4sB_cTSqmy1lddF8KVx5ybUVPJKrL19bVeHwYnavWuPKh17_DTxswbBZZH8tO7qRQZ76GPRN73xYI43sNz74jinZf7UH_WRlc710NQ579ZRrnZ9Hi--u16myEjIwS0uwoavSdPfCywdWzbcw2Jhqim-_e6PS6vNpGnybNwNMKyvrL1GnLzZD8fEPjx_idAnsC4l0a7yXjh2plgZCvpogxdN0BnAh9CULzH9W8nHAwRkDzcdLGiFsGubIJdJMXzv4kgTEHZIazdAMinMK8Oqca4dVFlpIvJKlicb3h9spWXo6oYmmkvfg35C6DA0bZSVIy2RSIDLbhAuCJ1MEYZFWI9e7ppAuwFGjsS3AFQq_xWR-uYcTZnhQLcz8tybVPJutv935pBQ1hGKHMavB4e9ANm6WpI-CrpuabRy33lsRs-YDU/Kbutxgwej00Jr84XFNs_pGMNwMJUOgO_/6)

Your opinion matters. Together, we can ensure that education remains a foundation of liberty in America.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Nikki HQ
subject: We’re here to say hell no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
We won’t let them dismantle the Department of Education. |
#
---
Team — Extreme Republicans in Congress are working harder than ever to debilitate and dismantle public education in this country. Nikki is working even harder to protect it. Last week, as Republicans worked to confirm an unqualified Linda McMahon to lead the Department of Education, Nikki and her Democratic colleagues stood with educators, staff members, and NEA union members to defend the Department of Education. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102594651/529657318/816645765?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC120_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg1MzkyNy00OGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxElZZShxGlJnTxY__AvnFNBr47A8Ku2JCCiux59iKo=&emci=7eda9e3e-a0ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d6853927-48f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13891387) | [WATCH NIKKI’S SPEECH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102594653/529657321/816645765?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC120_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg1MzkyNy00OGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxElZZShxGlJnTxY__AvnFNBr47A8Ku2JCCiux59iKo=&emci=7eda9e3e-a0ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d6853927-48f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13891387)
---
Millions of children nationwide depend on our public schools to meet their educational needs. The Department of Education is critical to funding education and access for special education students and children in low-income areas.
An unelected billionaire is trying to get away with highway robbery, on the backs of our students, teachers, and public schools. They don’t want to pay their fair share and want to bring down the tax rates for the _wealthiest_ corporations and families to _just 15%_.
We’re here to say **hell no**. And we’ll fight to protect public education.
Thanks for your support today,
— Nikki HQ
Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States ****[Nikkiforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102594655/529657323/-927342243?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_NOA_AC120_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjg1MzkyNy00OGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mxElZZShxGlJnTxY__AvnFNBr47A8Ku2JCCiux59iKo=&emci=7eda9e3e-a0ef-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d6853927-48f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13891387) ** | [info@nikkiforcongress.com](mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com)** | **Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Elon Musk just called me a criminal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Elon Musk just called me a criminal,
Derek.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]Before I share more about the latest smear against me, will you rush a
contribution to help my team respond? Facing attacks from the world’s
wealthiest man with a massive social media following means we need to be
ready for anything and everything.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]DONATE

Let me tell you what happened.

Earlier this week, I spoke out against Kash Patel’s confirmation for FBI
Director in front of the FBI building.

We should all have deep concerns on Kash Patel’s ability to be a neutral
arbiter of the rule of law and the justice system — considering he’s been
a willing participant in every last one of Trump’s schemes to seize power.

Patel has spread dangerous, false conspiracy theories about a “deep state”
that is unfairly persecuting the MAGA world.

He’s called for a “comprehensive housecleaning” of professionals at the
Justice Department.

While I served on the House Intelligence Committee, Kash Patel was a major
part of the efforts to sabotage a thorough investigation of Russia’s
involvement in the 2016 election.

He’s even resorted to childish antics such as launching watermelons (with
my face on it) out of a catapult and sharing videos of me being
buzz-sawed.

And for all his sycophantic work, he was rewarded with a post in the Trump
Administration.

Kash Patel has attacked me before, calling me a criminal and trying to
discredit my work to hold Trump accountable.

Now, Elon Musk is doubling down on the smears against me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]Screenshot of Elon Musk writing on Twitter: Adam Schiff is a criminal

I’ve been bullied and called names before. Everyone, from Trump to Sean
Hannity to Musk and Patel, has come after me. And it’s clear they have no
intention of stopping.

But they’re not going to stop me from holding them accountable. Not now,
not ever.

Not when Donald Trump proclaims himself to be a king. Not when Elon Musk
calls me a criminal. Not when Republicans come after me. Not when they go
after critical services for working families.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]Your support goes a long way in helping me respond to attacks from
Trump World. Please chip in a few dollars if you can.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q12025_abs_em.sOF3cu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q12025_abs_em.yoPhsC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q12025_abs_em.rGpVdd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q12025_abs_em.zzYphW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q12025_abs_em.KUIsEV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you, and more soon.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q12025_abs_em.-jDD3p&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=8320%2E5257348%2EGj3i4K

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Governor Ayotte's Bold Reforms Will Deliver for New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
We're going to make history.
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
Derek,
Governor Kelly Ayotte’s leadership is already reshaping New Hampshire’s future for the better. Her bold reforms are demonstrating fiscal discipline, strengthening public safety, and ensuring that our economy continues to thrive. I recently wrote an op-ed for the **_Union Leader_** detailing how her policies are setting New Hampshire on a historic path, and I encourage you to take a few minutes to read and share it.
As I wrote in the op-ed: _"Governor Ayotte’s vision of a more efficient, business-friendly state government is becoming a reality, and the impact will be felt for years to come. Entrepreneurs will find a smoother path to success, businesses will invest in expansion, and our communities will see greater economic opportunities without sacrificing the limited-government principles that make New Hampshire unique."_ The state budget is a blueprint for long-term prosperity, ensuring that taxpayer dollars are spent wisely, fixing the disastrous bail reform policies that have put our communities at risk, and making strategic investments in the future of our state.
The governor’s reforms also focus on strengthening our economy by cutting red tape, reducing burdens on small businesses, and keeping taxes low. She understands that New Hampshire’s advantage lies in our pro-business, pro-worker environment, and she’s working tirelessly to protect it. Under her leadership, we’re ensuring that businesses can thrive, families can prosper, and the next generation has the opportunities they need to succeed.
Democrats in Concord are already working to roll back these critical reforms and return to the same failed policies that have burdened taxpayers and weakened public safety. We cannot let that happen. It’s up to all of us to ensure that Granite Staters know what’s at stake and to push back against those who want to take our state in the wrong direction.
Take a moment to [read my op-ed](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.), share it with your friends and neighbors, and let’s work together to keep New Hampshire on the right track.
Thank you for your support,

**Rep. Joe Sweeney** Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
| | | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org
https://snh.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=ncqE6uxbcZQXls
---

name: Breakup Notice
subject: It's complicated... But your membership doesn't have to be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I remember the good times when you were a crucial part of our team.
Now’s your chance to reactivate, Friend.
|
---
| | |
Friend...

I'm not sure how to say this...

But I think it's time for us to face the truth...

**Your membership has expired, and now I 'm lost.** We had some great times, standing our House GOP Majority. _**But now, it seems like you've moved on.**_

---

name: AOC
subject: They know they have nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Call their bluff.
#
These baseless threats are meant to intimidate us into censoring ourselves first.
They know they have nothing and can’t come after us all.
Be brave. **Keep speaking up**.
We must use our freedom of speech now more than ever to defend from their threats against it.
Call their bluff.
MAGA actively creates fear to get us to give up in advance and withdraw from public life _without them lifting a finger_.
**Hell no**. [Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250222.riZZge&refcode=em20250222-8201-P_FND_CTR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8201%2E2526796%2EkB7nU2)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250222.riZZge&refcode=em20250222-8201-P_FND_CTR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8201%2E2526796%2EkB7nU2)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

Chip in and help us elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will fight for the rights and dignity of ALL!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcRF5l6bk3T-TulISycYkL-9neb6nZqP5lxikhMpWJB33t27FkAG2PzQmpMCsffU_ZB1pnycZ111bUGBd_p_0Z9YY5zSILJN9WvEmttYjO-g330UWzcGy6-PeOAtYYUaw5DYiOeps-tBW0aJyYGNyyUMOXcjNjptkCKOPzAParD9jFmZv1mLcQH3p45TXV4Ci5vDFPbLwzrjYdcPG7XIMi4-yWJKmRq7gjrCQkbY8iaHTchpW4sFBUHgCsfoB1M2-1WB5pwMLexxWaKe5KSfaYnA/4e8/6cM_JDPtTR-DLtkjb9xZww/h1/h001.13Z97yMi3b84mYMQ_BlrzailiObFSqrW2JPjnXIRJjY)**
* * *
__ Elon Musk and MAGA influencers have stooped to a new low by mocking a respected, nonpartisan government watchdog who happens to be blind. This expert plays a crucial role in safeguarding against waste, fraud, and abuse, yet his integrity is being undermined in the most vile manner. His testimony was maliciously labeled as a "theatre of the absurd," with cruel quips about his inability to "see" abuse or waste, because he’s blind. Adding insult to injury, Elon Musk amplified this mockery on X, triggering a flood of MAGA vitriol against the watchdog. The mob even suggested he be doxxed, laying bare their utter disregard for decency and respect. Friend, the cruelty here isn't an accident; it's the point. As the bipartisan watchdog delivered vital testimony, MAGA Twitter reveled in their contempt. Such attitudes do more than hurt feelings—they actively dismantle the progress we fight for every day. **This flagrant disrespect for people with disabilities is intolerable. We must unite to amplify our voices and affirm the value of our experiences.** [**By donating to Able Dems, you are fueling a movement to elect leaders committed to compassionate, inclusive policies and equitable opportunities. Your support can help build a future where everyone, regardless of ability, thrives with dignity and respect.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8QssM0vZSMSWnK0b9uP4I7YWuWiIwaYVfxa9NLynvahI4V3dPkv6BfZqdasfMu3nBpmqN8ClHEshjHI5SqMBalOSQuE-oDV5qkMU6Q2PubGuwEada-tPQC23BYUMs5Fq1GdfksKyhv4SxsdZD12tc6SsmE5bdkDm9xPK2F7ggTdK-vswDfneacyRAK2StcQrx7BNbTnDTnmnp8qza05cqmZSEBzUWHgcnO7DtkVpKPEdNW47SplrPcIJiI136NyPo_xdCGKov-4Bj75v_9-D0-cw/4e8/6cM_JDPtTR-DLtkjb9xZww/h2/h001.DsscMsEdB99Wdy4Zml_B4URyxWWWucHTbhRM1AuYLq8) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsuACinv7O4Qklf4XmypE-q1VXBmLsuiSQMbsBzKUraEq9O5ZZi5pktp6oERprrQiTHaa37ph1Qz8911_QnYHo64jRBdbdaZdlWzVC68Y0zCG9QN1YHzlmdpltas97yvgm8Tly0drUvuSPbvZPFzbMph1r85vhzUH1XbBB9yiv_0BFwI_oRTmdDFAAXvDIkb9qxHpLR-T3QGFJT7KByNBIHN-ykNt3e3JyKNY7abJwoqecBQPmI8n9Wc6IApMT4LoKlkSs4Bn9CDLE0olWwcXpBV3xKxhfsGuCDszD6HWyfOq5ROi63lHEema6c4v3xARrt54u_Ek9WbrEY1FS9q432A/4e8/6cM_JDPtTR-DLtkjb9xZww/h3/h001.akaJw9ho7PHNnYj9Mt1BaXW6796ltXT4qGFIy8bea1A) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ** Elon Musk and MAGA influencers have stooped to a new low by mocking a respected, nonpartisan government watchdog who happens to be blind. This expert plays a crucial role in safeguarding against waste, fraud, and abuse, yet his integrity is being undermined in the most vile manner. His testimony was maliciously labeled as a "theatre of the absurd," with cruel quips about his inability to "see" abuse or waste, because he’s blind. Adding insult to injury, Elon Musk amplified this mockery on X, triggering a flood of MAGA vitriol against the watchdog. The mob even suggested he be doxxed, laying bare their utter disregard for decency and respect. Friend, the cruelty here isn't an accident; it's the point. As the bipartisan watchdog delivered vital testimony, MAGA Twitter reveled in their contempt. Such attitudes do more than hurt feelings—they actively dismantle the progress we fight for every day. This flagrant disrespect for people with disabilities is intolerable. We must unite to amplify our voices and affirm the value of our experiences. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Let’s work together to build a future where everyone, regardless of ability, can thrive with dignity and respect. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa51995b80ad47cdb900f020e1cb9ef9&_e=I4vPCz_iUv_ctYaM41Cbd57tCN1zhFtUWPXzfR4qyOKQ2u1BjZVS8sEuIqmTtXL7Lsl7fVSdySlH_tudwrr3SFQ8OecGTbGCOYg6zDBya2kg3eBmf7CUp3HdbkQPhuSjsv3sv5txA-qHQ-_gED8441vAC-ZCxxGmwkMM48yvFKI_WUaYhriYtdNrM4dH9WUmxCxi6p3kElFiskoaQ_Rzyar7-GzZDvCY6dQkILt0ry5a5ptLpqYrR-pHZLf2h-ukIk5cx3Fn9H65FBbMrl_u4DtfE2inhLRCeh2919jxTWmGXW5tBmzVz2Nc1xYKxkz0qeLC23I-VE46sDIHnV6AbwLFsuO2ylo5FxMJn7Ta98rURGCjBdDxSFIvxLAMrJ0by6nXqM6CHEmfZi5ABG2Hg0Lw6GAd1GViDrInft1QUg_jvC--ABKCoGKgqNWJnYiD)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa51995b80ad47cdb900f020e1cb9ef9&_e=I4vPCz_iUv_ctYaM41Cbd57tCN1zhFtUWPXzfR4qyOKQ2u1BjZVS8sEuIqmTtXL7Lsl7fVSdySlH_tudwrr3SFQ8OecGTbGCOYg6zDBya2kg3eBmf7CUp3HdbkQPhuSjsv3sv5txA-qHQ-_gED8441vAC-ZCxxGmwkMM48yvFKI_WUaYhriYtdNrM4dH9WUmxCxi6p3kElFiskoaQ_Rzyar7-GzZDvCY6dQkILt0ry5a5ptLpqYrR-pHZLf2h-ukIk5cx3Fn9H65FBbMrl_u4HNx8-BCrS-aTUE4l9apSjmKF3Ve1SauT_c-_D7uzbKAfjzTPC65hw9PK3HLHhP1zOMBE6MBMZ-PnvzOR3VBxvLUwsumTS8eo2YDfYfsISOYRfumtZ6jzQXlU27Q7WPmHzOX8ng3v5biQCeM8Bj9ShJ4df_c1fJzcxxJok4oXDOo)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa51995b80ad47cdb900f020e1cb9ef9&_e=I4vPCz_iUv_ctYaM41Cbd57tCN1zhFtUWPXzfR4qyOKQ2u1BjZVS8sEuIqmTtXL7Lsl7fVSdySlH_tudwrr3SFQ8OecGTbGCOYg6zDBya2kg3eBmf7CUp3HdbkQPhuSjsv3sv5txA-qHQ-_gED8441vAC-ZCxxGmwkMM48yvFKI_WUaYhriYtdNrM4dH9WUmxCxi6p3kElFiskoaQ_Rzyar7-GzZDvCY6dQkILt0ry5a5ptLpqYrR-pHZLf2h-ukIk5cx3Fn9H65FBbMrl_u4CaiAUQec3HRiiyUwMV828m3dSO2nrIfgRniiFv8jPd0HYBdaaceX7TYzdJbnAaFj1-hv8H3nvslX9V0PKdVZOK-8b2O3xAe1GBposdk1EsPJy2LIMDWzmFZ8B31NlZFrVqQSi031h5ZhqjHfN81Ek_qS_zOQk-74Lanw9uW6g0r)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fa51995b80ad47cdb900f020e1cb9ef9&_e=I4vPCz_iUv_ctYaM41Cbd57tCN1zhFtUWPXzfR4qyOKQ2u1BjZVS8sEuIqmTtXL7Lsl7fVSdySlH_tudwrr3SFQ8OecGTbGCOYg6zDBya2kg3eBmf7CUp3HdbkQPhuSjsv3sv5txA-qHQ-_gED8441vAC-ZCxxGmwkMM48yvFKI_WUaYhriYtdNrM4dH9WUmxCxi6p3kElFiskoaQ_Rzyar7-GzZDvCY6dQkILt0ry5a5ptLpqYrR-pHZLf2h-ukIk5cx3Fn9H65FBbMrl_u4I8AON5E_h_GBpdrFDBUOQ9RMYFLq0f8ISbBkoejPF85UUK3OqrE1HCnjmK2OFNJkDxALCeTSONcDk8KqSVsbqjlGS-NThOetL-GZHeMMy01JvTHqWjIKZWOMEElvOAkscpBYZ5iLD8-521u45EcVXjwfkfZ9ML_M8tprMk5MHe6).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=fa51995b80ad47cdb900f020e1cb9ef9&_t=Tbjk0Jplmm-TfXfKWkmpo3Y5yLcepBNLsAx4IOHfq-bNO_GxnCgfX4SXNSkmOLfOXNu6QQL7Cga7Mlzmxpd1kLiZ2TLgW_G_Yp7Av4mF9n1K5xnWMwskAXfS3m5t3l1Z)

body:

When a Republican congressman from a deep-red district starts warning that Trump’s executive orders are “getting out of control,” you know something is seriously wrong.
Rep. Troy Balderson of Ohio recently told his constituents that Trump’s rapid-fire executive orders are undercutting Congress’s authority and concentrating power in the hands of Trump and his billionaire advisor, Elon Musk.
Balderson made it clear: Decisions about eliminating federal agencies—like the Department of Education—should be made by Congress, not by a president acting alone. But that’s exactly what Trump and Musk are trying to do—sideline elected representatives and consolidate power in the executive branch.
This isn’t just about partisanship—it’s about protecting democracy and preventing authoritarian rule. The founders designed a system of checks and balances for a reason, yet Trump and his enablers want to tear it down for their own political gain.
I refuse to stand by while Trump and Musk gut public education, attack healthcare, and strip away Congressional oversight. Will you?
Join our campaign today by donating $9! Without your support, we cannot sustain our efforts! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

Saludos, it’s Gabe Vasquez. **I came to Congress to amplify the voices of New Mexicans, not self-serving billionaires.** Recently the world's richest man, Elon Musk, has taken control of our government and many of our federal agencies. He has access to the personal information of the American people, put thousands of government workers out of jobs, and plans to slash funding for critical programs that many hardworking New Mexicans rely on. The future of Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, after-school programs, and more are all uncertain. These programs are essential, and in order to defend them, we have to work together. It is crucial that we are prepared to fight back against Elon and Trump's agenda every step of the way. [Going up against their deep pockets won't be easy, but defending New Mexicans is my number one priority. Can I count on you to chip in $10 today and help defend NM-02?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102596528/529662445/-993827495?amount=10&source=SBD_VASQUEZ_FR_022225_1_1_Musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGJlY2M1Ny00ZGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWCp51Ue7amsBXG6u3oadgirRiEwipoKcZDhtcgvg8M=) | | [CHIP IN $10 TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102596529/529662446/-993827495?amount=10&source=SBD_VASQUEZ_FR_022225_1_1_Musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGJlY2M1Ny00ZGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NWCp51Ue7amsBXG6u3oadgirRiEwipoKcZDhtcgvg8M=)

Elon Musk is putting Virginians’ — and Americans’— privacy at risk. He’s jeopardizing the security of personal information — including financial records, medical data, tax returns, and more. This is unacceptable.

It’s deeply concerning that an unelected billionaire could gain access to this sensitive information. It raises serious questions about transparency, accountability, and the integrity of our government.

We cannot allow Musk and his allies to continue gutting essential federal programs and agencies that serve our communities. Their reckless cuts have already slashed vital federal programs and led to the firing of thousands of nonpartisan, dedicated federal employees — many of whom call Virginia home.

Elon Musk is bankrolling Brad Schimel’s Supreme Court campaign because they know Wisconsin’s highest court can stop their lawless coup. Brad Schimel would be a rubber-stamp for Musk and Trump’s assault on constitutional checks and balances, giving themselves sole power to enrich the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the rest of us.
**This is a watershed moment in this election.** A MAGA Supreme Court in Wisconsin could reverse our progress on fair state legislative maps and lock in power for far-right legislators, and give them the power to overturn elections when they don’t like the results.
**Brad Schimel has cut shady deals for campaign cash his entire career, but now he’s cut the biggest and shadiest deal of his political life.** With only 37 days until Election Day, WisDems needs your support right now to make sure voters learn about the stakes, reject Elon Musk’s hostile takeover of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, and elect Judge Susan Crawford.

Friend, We must be having déjà vu. In the first month of Trump’s presidency, we’re seeing a resurgence of the same divisive policies and rhetoric we’ve fought against before. From undermining environmental protections to eroding civil liberties to dismantling government institutions, his agenda threatens to take us backward. But here’s the truth: our resolve has only grown stronger. We know what’s at stake this time, and we’re prepared to stand up and defend the values that define our democracy. = | = Eric has been in the halls of the Capitol advocating for justice and challenging the GOP agenda since before Trump even showed up on the scene. He’s never been afraid to speak truth to power – whether it’s exposing Republican corruption, standing up for the rule of law, or holding far-right extremists accountable. But to keep fighting, we need you in Eric’s corner. We’ve lived through this nightmare once before – this time, we have the power to be in control of the outcome. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Governor Ayotte's Bold Reforms Will Deliver for New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions
body:
We're going to make history.
| | | | [](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
Derek,
Governor Kelly Ayotte’s leadership is already reshaping New Hampshire’s future for the better. Her bold reforms are demonstrating fiscal discipline, strengthening public safety, and ensuring that our economy continues to thrive. I recently wrote an op-ed for the **_Union Leader_** detailing how her policies are setting New Hampshire on a historic path, and I encourage you to take a few minutes to read and share it.
As I wrote in the op-ed: _"Governor Ayotte’s vision of a more efficient, business-friendly state government is becoming a reality, and the impact will be felt for years to come. Entrepreneurs will find a smoother path to success, businesses will invest in expansion, and our communities will see greater economic opportunities without sacrificing the limited-government principles that make New Hampshire unique."_ The state budget is a blueprint for long-term prosperity, ensuring that taxpayer dollars are spent wisely, fixing the disastrous bail reform policies that have put our communities at risk, and making strategic investments in the future of our state.
The governor’s reforms also focus on strengthening our economy by cutting red tape, reducing burdens on small businesses, and keeping taxes low. She understands that New Hampshire’s advantage lies in our pro-business, pro-worker environment, and she’s working tirelessly to protect it. Under her leadership, we’re ensuring that businesses can thrive, families can prosper, and the next generation has the opportunities they need to succeed.
Democrats in Concord are already working to roll back these critical reforms and return to the same failed policies that have burdened taxpayers and weakened public safety. We cannot let that happen. It’s up to all of us to ensure that Granite Staters know what’s at stake and to push back against those who want to take our state in the wrong direction.
Take a moment to [read my op-ed](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.), share it with your friends and neighbors, and let’s work together to keep New Hampshire on the right track.
Thank you for your support,

**Rep. Joe Sweeney** Chairman, Granite Solutions

[Donate Today](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
| | | Paid for by Granite Solutions. Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman. www.GraniteSolutions.org
https://snh.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=ncAyBH4QCA5Dls

* * *
Mike Johnson just said the quiet part out loud, Peter.

**He wants our system of checks and balances to “take a step back” so Donald Trump’s agenda can move full steam ahead.**

This isn’t just reckless – _it’s beyond dangerous._

Our democracy was built on three coequal branches of government, each designed to keep the others in check. But Republicans don’t want accountability. They want absolute power, and we can’t let them have it.

That’s why Kim is fighting every day in Congress to put Washington families first – not Trump’s extreme agenda. But with GOP mega-donors spending big to enact their extremist agenda, we need your help to keep common-sense leaders at the forefront of this fight.

Peter,

A lot has happened in recent weeks, so I wanted to take a moment to get you up to speed.

subject: Rep. Greg Casar vs. Elon Musk

body:
Casar just exposed the corruption Republicans don’t want to talk about.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102598597/529668014/1328794144?refcode=ea.d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZWQxOWFlLTUxZjEtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JI0Dp7X1oHgwH_JSO3veSnHy5hogOvzXf5KJ_DeOstw=&emci=96e549a3-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
Our endorsed leaders are speaking truth to power when it matters most. During the first _Delivering on Government Efficiency (DOGE) Subcommittee_ hearing last week, Rep. Greg Casar called out the corruption Republicans don’t want to talk about. The hearing — run by Trump allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene — was supposed to be about “government waste.” But instead of holding billionaires like Elon Musk accountable for pocketing millions in taxpayer dollars, Republicans attacked working people instead. **Casar fought back.[Now, let’s make sure he’s not alone — chip in to elect more leaders like him.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102598598/529668015/2105508926?refcode=ea.d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZWQxOWFlLTUxZjEtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JI0Dp7X1oHgwH_JSO3veSnHy5hogOvzXf5KJ_DeOstw=)** The Texas Congressman didn’t mince words: | _“We’re not looking into Elon Musk’s $8 million a day. This subcommittee... is looking into your grandmother’s $65 a day.”_
---
While Republicans go after Social Security — the lifeline millions of seniors rely on — Elon Musk is raking in billions with zero oversight. And when independent inspectors started investigating his companies, they were fired.
That’s the fight we’re up against.
We need more Democrats willing to call out corruption like Greg Casar. Because right now, too many in Congress look the other way while Republicans protect their billionaire donors. Unless we elect more leaders with real backbone, nothing will change.
Fighting corruption and fighting the climate crisis go hand in hand. **[That’s why we’re working to elect candidates at every level of government who will hold corporate polluters and billionaire profiteers accountable. If you’re with us, chip in today — every dollar fuels the fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102598599/529668016/2105508926?refcode=ea.d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.d5ed19ae-51f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZWQxOWFlLTUxZjEtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JI0Dp7X1oHgwH_JSO3veSnHy5hogOvzXf5KJ_DeOstw=)**

clean_body: Casar just exposed the corruption Republicans don’t want to talk about. | Our endorsed leaders are speaking truth to power when it matters most. During the first Delivering on Government Efficiency (DOGE) Subcommittee hearing last week, Rep. Greg Casar called out the corruption Republicans don’t want to talk about. The hearing — run by Trump allies like Marjorie Taylor Greene — was supposed to be about “government waste.” But instead of holding billionaires like Elon Musk accountable for pocketing millions in taxpayer dollars, Republicans attacked working people instead. Casar fought back.= The Texas Congressman didn’t mince words: | “We’re not looking into Elon Musk’s $8 million a day. This subcommittee... is looking into your grandmother’s $65 a day.” While Republicans go after Social Security — the lifeline millions of seniors rely on — Elon Musk is raking in billions with zero oversight. And when independent inspectors started investigating his companies, they were fired. That’s the fight we’re up against. We need more Democrats willing to call out corruption like Greg Casar. Because right now, too many in Congress look the other way while Republicans protect their billionaire donors. Unless we elect more leaders with real backbone, nothing will change. Fighting corruption and fighting the climate crisis go hand in hand. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this. Listen, I’m sick to my stomach. The administration just cut billions from the National Institutes of Health (NIH), effective immediately. That means fewer breakthroughs, fewer treatments, and fewer lives saved. Extremists have gone too far and I refuse to let them get away with this. **[Will you rush in $15 right now to help me hold them accountable and put a stop to their dangerous policies?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102598863/529668850/571999290?amount=15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.22_NIHFunding_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmFiY2M1OS01MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T25nH7jdB8T6ostCN_JYB1RvqLsmRvS-5cAafsW4dXg=)** [CHIP IN $15 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102598864/529668851/571999290?amount=15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.22_NIHFunding_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmFiY2M1OS01MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T25nH7jdB8T6ostCN_JYB1RvqLsmRvS-5cAafsW4dXg=) These cuts aren’t just numbers on a budget sheet – this is personal to me. Groundbreaking medical research has found new cures for previously incurable diseases. It’s also given more time to families with their loved ones when a cure simply isn’t possible. For me, that meant more time with my dad after he was diagnosed with pancreatic cancer. **These cuts could take that same hope away from millions of families.** For so many families who are going through what ours did, this isn’t just about future cures – it’s about _right now._ Clinical trials will shut down. Lifesaving drugs won’t get approved. Researchers will lose funding. Countless families will lose loved ones too soon. **[I’m going to fight as hard as I can to protect lifesaving research, but heartless politicians aren’t going to make it easy. Can I count on you to chip in $15 and join me in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102598865/529668852/571999290?amount=15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.22_NIHFunding_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmFiY2M1OS01MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T25nH7jdB8T6ostCN_JYB1RvqLsmRvS-5cAafsW4dXg=)** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [CHIP IN $15 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102598866/529668853/571999290?express_lane=true&amount=15&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.22_NIHFunding_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmFiY2M1OS01MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T25nH7jdB8T6ostCN_JYB1RvqLsmRvS-5cAafsW4dXg=)

clean_body: These cuts aren’t just numbers on a budget sheet – this is personal to me. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Listen, I’m sick to my stomach. The administration just cut billions from the National Institutes of Health (NIH), effective immediately. That means fewer breakthroughs, fewer treatments, and fewer lives saved. Extremists have gone too far and I refuse to let them get away with this. = = These cuts aren’t just numbers on a budget sheet – this is personal to me. Groundbreaking medical research has found new cures for previously incurable diseases. It’s also given more time to families with their loved ones when a cure simply isn’t possible. For me, that meant more time with my dad after he was diagnosed with pancreatic cancer. These cuts could take that same hope away from millions of families. For so many families who are going through what ours did, this isn’t just about future cures – it’s about right now. Clinical trials will shut down. Lifesaving drugs won’t get approved. Researchers will lose funding. name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 🚨 Feb 22, 2025: Must-Watch Videos Alert
body:
Don't miss out on our newest video releases! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0cf91a8ed4&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7bb9f1a4a9&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**WATCH OUR VIDEOS AND ...
THEN LET US KNOW WHAT YOU THINK!**

---
|
[**One of the biggest issues we face in Ohio is the low-engagement (aka "low information" & "disengaged") voter.**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d8178d8389&e=5c740fa3e2) They often vote by name recognition or who their party tells them to vote for on party-mailed slate cards.

Getting the attention of this sector of the voting population is challenging because they are often disinterested in the nasty side of politics and have busy lives. They want the **facts** , they want **self-service** , **they don't want** to join **groups** or participate in **Zoom meetings** , they want **efficiency**.

With this in mind, we decided that using informational, short, videos could be a way to meet this challenge. We started doing short videos a little over a month ago, and we are now ready to start promoting them with zeal. **We need your help!** We would like you to do us a few favors. They are:

1) **Watch** a few of our videos.
2) **Give us your feedback** by commenting on the videos.
3) **Share** the videos with as many people as you can.
4) Be sure to **subscribe** & hit the notification bell to be alerted when we release new content.

We post our full videos everywhere we can, which includes Rumble, YouTube, X, Telegram, and Facebook. We are posting video excerpts, known as "shorts" and "reels", on Instagram and TikTok. The best way to find and follow (or subscribe) to GFI's various communication channels is to go to our "[**Linktree**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3cb9164f1a&e=5c740fa3e2)", which you can find by [**CLICKING HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d41cc13aa9&e=5c740fa3e2).

Thank you!

PS: Here are some samples of our videos:

**Episode: "Ohio Corruption: Appointment Patronage, Nepotism & Payback"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bd30af8c80&e=5c740fa3e2)

# **Episode: " Hiding in Plain Sight: Ohio Government Waste"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e9f90742f3&e=5c740fa3e2)

# **Episode: " Ohio Public School Facts: Spending vs. Performance"**

**[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ee168735e1&e=5c740fa3e2)**

**Episode: "5 Lies About Paper Ballots & Hand Counting"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1c29e7c663&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fb4db8ba45&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=edc8a0df13&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=85e45e6128) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=85e45e6128).

The radical Left’s multi-million-dollar propaganda campaign targeting President Trump and House Republicans is working! I’ll be frank, we don’t have enough to fight back against these lies! We’re up against a mountain of Democrat spending and mainstream media lies, We have an extremely narrow window to reverse this polling trend before these lies become accepted as fact by the mainstream media. Don’t let the Left get away with their campaign to tear down President Trump and our Republican plan to save America. clean_body: | | | The Virginia General Assembly just adjourned, which means the fundraising ban on incumbents like MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy is OVER. This year’s Virginia General Assembly elections will be our first chance to show Donald Trump and Elon Musk that they won’t take our country without a fight. To expand our 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates, Democrat Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to defeat Del. Ian Lovejoy and flip a seat that Donald Trump lost. Incumbents like Lovejoy have been banned from fundraising while the General Assembly was in session. With yesterday’s adjournment, right-wing groups and corporate lobbyists are furiously making up for lost time by cutting big checks today. Democrat Elizabeth Guzman is a mom, social worker, and union leader backed by grassroots donors like you - and we’re counting on you to help us stay competitive. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Guzman for Virginia | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Sarah McBride
subject: I refuse to be a pawn.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
They want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it won’t be on the issues I laid out in my speech.
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride — Pramila said I could reach out to you about something important.
You may have heard that I recently gave my first speech as Delaware’s Congresswoman on the floor of the House of Representatives. And you may have also heard that the Republican who recognized me when I came to the podium used the moment to refer to me as the “Gentleman” from Delaware, “Mr. McBride.” A thoroughly unoriginal schoolyard taunt against trans people.
In truth, they want the focus to be on their theatrics so that it _won’t_ be on the issues I laid out in my speech: the MAGA effort to gut our government at the expense of working people and my focus on bringing down costs and building a government that respects everyone.
Really, their attacks are about more than just me. The truth is they are using trans people as a pawn in their scheme to gut the federal government and line the pockets of Donald Trump’s best friends.
**But I refuse to be a pawn. I refuse to give them that power. And I refuse to let them get away with it.**
That’s why I’m going to spend every day fighting _against_ their attempts to dismantle the federal government, and fighting _for_ the things Delawareans elected me for — regardless of what kind of personal insults Republicans want to throw my way.
Republicans know what they’re doing right now is unpopular, and that’s why they’re desperate to change the conversation. It’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it.
[**Peter, if you’re with me, Pramila and I could really use your support at this moment. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today and help us keep up the fight, no matter what gets thrown our way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250222?refcode=em20250222-4789&amount=3&refcode2=4789_420207_f6_E-P&akid=4789%2E420207%2Ef6_E-P)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250222?amount=3&refcode=em20250222-4789&refcode2=4789_420207_f6_E-P&akid=4789%2E420207%2Ef6_E-P)**
Thank you again to Pramila for letting me reach out. And thank _you_ for all of the support,
Sarah McBride

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250222-4789-footer&t=1&refcode2=4789_420207_f6_E-P&akid=4789%2E420207%2Ef6_E-P)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Paid for by Pramila for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4789%2E420207%2Ef6_E-P).
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111
