name: Congresswoman Boebert
subject: I ❤️ Trump’s cabinet
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9xq2po8l8icuqas9ce80kut1jtgmf0wyi73q51n3pupzg86557bonvxmtrmq3wmmulygpus198vysqu5o&__stmp=ss3owq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de4oujvwy827u5m7uy7227vjos8t40rkrkkrrmdvnogzjxmfnilnylp4cdx1oakxq3mwh17eym91t60oyi527hxj1xc8s81pnlvyxu2woej8d0ac5z9ws7f7xxqr9xumsqjz70055aejo3987lt2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6de4oujvwy827u5m7uy7227vjy3mjnepf7i5h4t56tbsudi0d24ytfufyjmacfmpzm0oihwzzak3of9c7s18jgthzcuv7p6op8cqts036b8kd1kpj7wp737rtmuaocr1geayllsz50cuyfeov5zj3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=ss3owq&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4fcef32c1e2a47899de0060e16a34088&_e=b1WFeBr7_7EZQK-QNqJHoa2LiRxv6kuXEHhnmGfo4qmbNaNn8wxtZ-ekSaFfvqudt2Au3qLnhJUYn8SeZ_UjBbzlWsK_uXxVH1knQTfz6xhe1TvQdbQ2TgQpU40nQqznNG6o8NJvKbrzRQW91iAP93bh2BXlKRB3oltTaa6USzq4SHjyLos7U2Ft2lusnocNXkiwArtml30UwVBJDGJ8KIh0r_ZiSOVOmR8wSTi69gi769vPLpELNi-sVwFglJzZ4OyMr60WvLozHafQD39Pqm8CDTrMdMMnR8CPeO94s1Z9bXd9sdAtARaHOAW5TYg-_O0KTt0FE2GZPqKK4hdJbia2VGiGzJVdRtQVY0IjaYTsyEkIkbzZy-Wwk4lvDdqQ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4fcef32c1e2a47899de0060e16a34088&_e=b1WFeBr7_7EZQK-QNqJHoa2LiRxv6kuXEHhnmGfo4qmbNaNn8wxtZ-ekSaFfvqudt2Au3qLnhJUYn8SeZ_UjBbzlWsK_uXxVH1knQTfz6xhe1TvQdbQ2TgQpU40nQqznNG6o8NJvKbrzRQW91iAP93bh2BXlKRB3oltTaa6USzq4SHjyLos7U2Ft2lusnocNXkiwArtml30UwVBJDGJ8KIh0r_ZiSOVOmR8wSTi69gjjbYdgA29HQRHseFKWKPBrn6NzfRGKJPQOl8RhORybF1tN3NXJ2hxoz3hErEsV1YtCr7toWRckVlRtSJNm8lEn1mCakKlB6Awuhrruxt-Pu2Cthrmq6eL_ndilMIkrkz93yIox0AAxZUU8ww8lSpUX)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. name: Gay Valimont
subject: We don’t do KINGS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks,

Donald Trump says a lot of crazy stuff but watching him lean in to proclaiming himself King is scary - and so gross.

Gross because he is ACTING like a king - flaunting the Constitution and the Rule of Law - in ways that are going to hurt every working American, seniors, veterans, you name it.

This is America and in America: WE DON’T DO KINGS.

I’m Gay Valimont, running for the 1st Congressional District seat in Florida’s Panhandle vacated by the sleazebag Matt Gaetz (who DEFINITELY would see Trump wear a crown).

To fight back against this talk of kings, I need your help-the special election is on April 1st! Can you help me defeat my Republican opponent - who will ALWAYS BEND THE KNEE to Donald Trump?

Can you give $15, $45, or even $100 today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton -- to help me WIN this crucial seat? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

We are told time and again that when Trump says this crazy crap he’s just trolling the libs, etc. etc. But haven’t you seen enough? The guy poops on a gold toilet! He has vassals and estates! He thinks himself ABOVE the law! He just does what he wants.

That seems rather KINGLY to me, and this is America: WE DON’T DO KINGS. Most of our ancestors came from the lands of princes and paupers to create a Constitution and a society where every man and woman is equal in their citizenship.

Let’s stop the Trump kingdom in its tracks: Donate $25 or whatever you can afford today -- split evenly with Seth Moulton! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]I’ve been running for this seat for almost two years and NOT ONCE has anyone I’ve talked to spoken of the need for a president to act more like a king.

Here, everyone is concerned about the cost of homeowners insurance and eggs. Whether their Medicaid, Medicare or Social Security benefits are going to be slashed to pay for billionaires who live like kings.

Please, let’s all stand up to this just like the patriots before us.

With contempt for kings,

Gay Valimont
Democratic Nominee, FL-01

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xued07Iteknop5IbITm7gybwsh&s=IAPHHGMKMBHFAHCE) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xued07Iteknop5IcITm7gybwsh&s=IAPHHGMKMBHFAHCE) [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xued07Iteknop5IdITm7gybwsh&s=IAPHHGMKMBHFAHCE) **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2000X**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xued07Iteknop5IeITm7gybwsh&s=IAPHHGMKMBHFAHCE) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.

---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank You! Rep. Raskin,

**I couldn’t be more thrilled to have your voice in the House at this critical time in our history — you are one of the most heroic Representatives we have, and I’m so grateful.**

As a key part of the January 6th committee, you stood up to Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans over and over again. _Now the GOP is furious at you,_but you continue to stand strong and lead our party forward.__

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of the work you’ve done to hold MAGA Republicans accountable – so I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to VPP to keep electing incredible Democrats just like you. I know Republicans are already plotting their revenge against you, but as long as you keep fighting for Democracy, we’ll be beside you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86988?t=9&akid=18985%2E878179%2EQC-1Sj)

Can we be honest with you? We understand how the constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. We’re real people who receive those emails, too — so trust us when we say we completely understand how frustrating they can be. But if you have a moment, Peter, please let us explain why they are so important. We don’t ask for your support because we expect every person to give every time we send an email. We ask because we know that when you and so many others can give to support our cause, you will. Because when people like you chip in with whatever you _can_ it helps move us toward making real progress. **[The only way we can reach our monthly fundraising goals is with the support of grassroots donors like you. If you can, will you donate however much you can spare to help us get there? It’ll go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602050/529678689/-634802177?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2UxYzczMS02MGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrhX4PYCAGCQSx-Sf9NusLz0CFt4ykSCJ2XCIOtVfl0=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602052/529678691/-634802177?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2UxYzczMS02MGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrhX4PYCAGCQSx-Sf9NusLz0CFt4ykSCJ2XCIOtVfl0=)

While some politicians fuel their re-election campaigns by dedicating a significant amount of their time to asking wealthy donors for large donations, Becca chooses to do things differently.
Most of her campaign contributions come from grassroots donors like you who chip in $5, $10, or $25 at a time.
Small-dollar contributions may _seem_ insignificant compared to the tens of thousands of dollars Republicans raise from the ultra-wealthy, but their short list of megadonors doesn’t compare to the tens of thousands of folks who chip in to support what Becca’s doing.
**Our work to reach voters across Vermont, spread our message, and re-elect Becca so she can continue fighting for working families in Congress wouldn’t be possible without folks like you.**
**[So Peter, can we count on your support today? Regardless of the amount, every dollar you give powers Becca’s fight to bring real change to Vermont.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602054/529678693/-634802177?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2UxYzczMS02MGYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vrhX4PYCAGCQSx-Sf9NusLz0CFt4ykSCJ2XCIOtVfl0=)**

clean_body: | = Can we be honest with you? We understand how the constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. We’re real people who receive those emails, too — so trust us when we say we completely understand how frustrating they can be. But if you have a moment, Peter, please let us explain why they are so important. We don’t ask for your support because we expect every person to give every time we send an email. We ask because we know that when you and so many others can give to support our cause, you will. Because when people like you chip in with whatever you can it helps move us toward making real progress. = | = While some politicians fuel their re-election campaigns by dedicating a significant amount of their time to asking wealthy donors for large donations, Becca chooses to do things differently. Most of her campaign contributions come from grassroots donors like you who chip in $5, $10, or $25 at a time. Small-dollar contributions may seem insignificant compared to the tens of thousands of dollars Republicans raise from the ultra-wealthy, but their short list of megadonors doesn’t compare to the tens of thousands of folks who chip in to support what Becca’s doing. Our work to reach voters across Vermont, spread our message, and re-elect Becca so she can continue fighting for working families in Congress wouldn’t be possible without folks like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much, Team Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

On this week's recap--four writers I highly encourage you to follow, the Qasim Rashid Show Episode 159, five ways to fight back against denied healthcare, why February 19 is so significant in US history, the horrific approval of anti-Arab hate, and countering Trump's war on a free press.
**Let 's dive into our weekly recap of **_**Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid**_**.**
* * *
## Call to Action
**With attacks on abortion and reproductive health access increasing every day, it 's critical we invest in and support the leaders fighting to protect our rights.**
Join me in subscribing to [Pari & Eve, MPH](https://open.substack.com/users/215799239-pari-and-eve-mph?utm_source=mentions) -- two amazing women who are national leaders in public health and reproductive rights. They bring decades of experience and scholarship, and are experts at breaking down the complexities of the legislative and public policy aspects of healthcare into understandable content. Most of all, they use that expertise to help us better understand how we can act now to drive change.
[Subscribe to Pari & Eve](https://substack.com/redirect/69415f1a-4d21-4142-8499-72e1f536d39e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
## This Week's Articles and Podcasts
* **Sunday:** [Four Writers, Scholars, and Activists You Should Follow](https://substack.com/redirect/e6d94509-6524-46bc-94b7-4c5b41419708?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Four thoughtful voices to expand your understanding on the key issues that directly impact us
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 159](https://substack.com/redirect/21297855-e4a2-45ee-afff-fb04813c3811?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Wajahat Ali joins to discuss the state of American democracy and the dire need for Democrats to _do something_
* **Tuesday:** [How We Fought Back Against Denied Healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/a69b1dfa-fa5d-47a5-b091-f42b859add52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Our HELL corp denied our daughter's critical care 13 times--here's how we fought back, and won
* **Wednesday:** [Why February 19 is a Notable Day In U.S. History](https://substack.com/redirect/0a637911-8015-484d-a688-1945d156312b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Some of our nation's most dreadful chapters unfolded this day--that trend continues in 2025
* **Thursday:**[The Horrific Approval of Anti-Arab Hate](https://substack.com/redirect/dec09280-e4f7-42d8-88ac-be1f2b0b8a47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): An attempted murder of two Palestinians--who were in fact Jewish--as the "death to Arabs" chant continued
* **Friday:**[Trump's War On Free Press & How to Fight Back](https://substack.com/redirect/3a343e0d-4cf5-4278-9db3-4082783aa52c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The Trump regime's assault on journalism obliges us to act--here's two actions we all can take

## **Dad Joke of the Week**

What do you call a cat who prays in a mosque?

A Meowslim!

subject: We have a blueprint—now we need action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
We're going to make waves 🌊 but first, I need your help.
Hey Peter,

Things are heating up here at In This Together PAC. We’ve been taking our success from the governor's race in 2023 and using what we've learned to support good people and good candidates in Kentucky and in red and purple states nationwide.

And in 2024, we had some incredible wins. We helped senators in battleground states win tough races, and we even successfully stopped Amendment 2 right here in Kentucky—ensuring our public schools remain fully funded and our children have the resources they need to thrive.

This work wasn’t easy, but we were able to accomplish so much because of this incredible grassroots team. As we look ahead at what’s to come, your support will be even more critical.

[**Peter — In This Together PAC is building up our resources so we can continue to support leaders with the courage to stand up for what’s right regardless of politics, but we need your help! Will you become a founding donor to In This Together by chipping in any amount you can today? ---|---|---|---|---
My campaign for governor in Kentucky was a success because I ran on our shared values of compassion, decency, and courage. Instead of stooping to the level of my opponent and the five Super PACs who spent tens of millions of dollars on nasty, false attack ads, we ran a race that put people ahead of politics and brought Kentuckians together.

Especially with the chaos, dysfunction, and division coming out of DC, people need leaders to step up who will stand up for them and do what's right, regardless of politics. That’s why our work at In This Together is so crucial. But if we're going to replicate that success in races across the country, I need you by my side.

clean_body: We're going to make waves 🌊 but first, I need your help. Hey Peter, Things are heating up here at In This Together PAC. We’ve been taking our success from the governor's race in 2023 and using what we've learned to support good people and good candidates in Kentucky and in red and purple states nationwide. And in 2024, we had some incredible wins. We helped senators in battleground states win tough races, and we even successfully stopped Amendment 2 right here in Kentucky—ensuring our public schools remain fully funded and our children have the resources they need to thrive. This work wasn’t easy, but we were able to accomplish so much because of this incredible grassroots team. As we look ahead at what’s to come, your support will be even more critical. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- My campaign for governor in Kentucky was a success because I ran on our shared values of compassion, decency, and courage. Instead of stooping to the level of my opponent and the five Super PACs who spent tens of millions of dollars on nasty, false attack ads, we ran a race that put people ahead of politics and brought Kentuckians together. Especially with the chaos, dysfunction, and division coming out of DC, people need leaders to step up who will stand up for them and do what's right, regardless of politics. That’s why our work at In This Together is so crucial. But if we're going to replicate that success in races across the country, I need you by my side. = = Thank you, Andy Beshear In This Together PAC | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. name: Team Thompson
subject: Mike needs to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
---
| | Peter — did you see Mike’s message? He joined hundreds of fellow Americans on Monday to celebrate American democracy, the rule of law, and to stand against the current actions of the administration. Now, he needs to hear from you to fight back against the undermining of our democracy.

**_[Use your voice today, Peter. Click here to sign our petition to stand against these attacks on our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602506/529680030/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250222_PT_WeThePepole_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmYyZTkzMS02MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1di8Lz6pv1A5YzdjMJjAVoDlg6HeVaOCyPbnu4Qre1Y=&emci=cdf2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cff2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)_**
* * *
**_Begin original message:_**

Peter, this past Monday I joined hundreds of community-minded citizens in front of the Napa 9/11 memorial to celebrate democracy, the rule of law, and our American flag. The crowd was enthusiastic and energetic, with signs and voices asserting their concerns about the current Administration’s undermining of our democracy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602507/529680031/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250222_PT_WeThePepole_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmYyZTkzMS02MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1di8Lz6pv1A5YzdjMJjAVoDlg6HeVaOCyPbnu4Qre1Y=&emci=cdf2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cff2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)
_Passionate, foresightful 13-year-old girls painted the pictures included in the photos above from the We the People event._
Several speakers at the event urged the crowd to speak up and take action — **and I couldn’t agree more.** In times like these, it becomes more important than ever that we gather together, and employ our fundamental right to assembly and freedom of speech to call out those threatening our democracy.

Democracy is for the people and **by the people.** It only works when each of us does our part. We must remain active and engaged to hold those attempting to take control accountable.

I was so proud to be a part of a crowd with such a strong spirit who are determined to push back against the chaos we’re witnessing today.

**We need all hands on deck if we’re going to win this fight. I need your support, Peter, now more than ever.

_[If you stand with us, sign our petition here. We need 2,000 signatures to show the current Administration that we don’t stand for the undermining of our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602508/529680032/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250222_PT_WeThePepole_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmYyZTkzMS02MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1di8Lz6pv1A5YzdjMJjAVoDlg6HeVaOCyPbnu4Qre1Y=&emci=cdf2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cff2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)_**
**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102602509/529680033/-284627003?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20250222_PT_WeThePepole_0_New_TeamThompson_NA_NA_WeThePeople2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmYyZTkzMS02MmYxLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1di8Lz6pv1A5YzdjMJjAVoDlg6HeVaOCyPbnu4Qre1Y=&emci=cdf2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=cff2e931-62f1-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2678920)**
Thank you,

Mike Thompson
---
|
---

Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support.mikethompsonforcongress.com/p/KK6Ox2NzGk6ccCSbCGuKYA2?unsubscribedata=S9b6VXP1BbI8KkiFOPYwQTWHuLGgedA82pSA2QY2P7sxseMh5L%2B%2BU02l92MtQ89%2BCems24YtllS0e3LOg6BcD%2BwRP5KYGKTjerWHlvmW%2F1ZVta7fvSL7Y9WL8zsd9JLvjnWQTDkf6DHWxwaykdSSawnK5b6QYCRpE2l%2FerKiHMHo3MENsiCkmqiJKfXW1am2%2FCO738S%2FDHCLLpNNXqHylSw%2FS3l%2B0s8UVsez%2FFIF9DQSUkDuy%2B5yiJVRMr%2FNAhx1zkjoskmRN68J9yk2liNlvdfpeWv1nfgN6VgeCtHHj5niNYA0rZ3TS7Ru9ErxjrR%2FCpJ0l8bFY%2BLY1obbVPcAWYLuDRa4FGDJ9MviDEh4UZ2yCuLmyBOylj74h1DpmVEQ6M7yyFVv76FiNV67ZcJ3wOPmDYEXjBO84Wqk0%2BU%2BSho%3D)

name: Response Pending
subject: DOGE Survey #5580-2260 for Fellow Patriot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. We just need to know you are, too.
This may be the best idea yet.
|
---
| | |
This is genius, Friend.

**The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)** will cut down on wasteful government spending and make it MUCH more efficient.

Elon Musk has been selected to lead this effort, and he's already off to the races.

**House GOP has authorized the release of our new DOGE Survey, and you are 1 of 10 patriots from your area given clearance to complete this important survey.**

---

There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government.

**And draining the swamp has been part of our mission since DAY 1.**

House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Counter the radical leftists
body:
| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d22c2ec080a84c9192a6a7d6597471b5&_e=Eol7Hm-8HG-DGOP3btG6AxQ_DXYTe30nzfINwRKKwot_7JLf2cUPk_YTwTYcVENStPgKvgKV32DYbw24kmYsOVkozhMsDd7bzYmRDnUiWFUno64dvu6wKPJw1EvueCvWkzTGBSeAg6lR0aZSPdOXeHyp74AgC_RUOLNuymsfc184kVX2QPYMVuR5sKPqyxulvfmIiaQ7Ef7BAnlYOBzqOTjlLxKsVzCD8FrjkUK_gHBa-P3Eof4-g3CPmYFc7bmVR_Khmj8xBOXAcP3BfHKYG0zLh-qbWyGEwikY4qaYBH61rwqJSt5AqzvCjI7VLFG1cKWrmdWKLB6as5lK5bRkpfk1It6BN75ErDIX3TTxBjIqMpziwHtWHUEPsYUB45adTFg-C-S0-TDq5Jr6h6oXXg%3D%3D)

| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d22c2ec080a84c9192a6a7d6597471b5&_e=Eol7Hm-8HG-DGOP3btG6AxQ_DXYTe30nzfINwRKKwot_7JLf2cUPk_YTwTYcVENStPgKvgKV32DYbw24kmYsOVkozhMsDd7bzYmRDnUiWFUno64dvu6wKPJw1EvueCvWkzTGBSeAg6lR0aZSPdOXeHyp74AgC_RUOLNuymsfc184kVX2QPYMVuR5sKPqyxulvfmIiaQ7Ef7BAnlYOBzqOTjlLxKsVzCD8FrjkUK_gHBa-P3Eof4-g3CPmYFc7bmVZvJrcbxI89NabqPmPkkT_HHt0gDeAsXSMJw0AcMfZAdnpUDYqw93nBtWhe9F4GLaQEq6DprK5bE1XAXojdKwjl9CDxif-RZXlhslUCqLo-F06sFIN71FQxRQo5_ChH3DYrJ0f8lyyWeXXDMDT7T8PA%3D%3D)

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d22c2ec080a84c9192a6a7d6597471b5&_e=Eol7Hm-8HG-DGOP3btG6AxQ_DXYTe30nzfINwRKKwot_7JLf2cUPk_YTwTYcVENStPgKvgKV32DYbw24kmYsOVkozhMsDd7bzYmRDnUiWFUno64dvu6wKPJw1EvueCvWkzTGBSeAg6lR0aZSPdOXeHyp74AgC_RUOLNuymsfc184kVX2QPYMVuR5sKPqyxulvfmIiaQ7Ef7BAnlYOBzqOTjlLxKsVzCD8FrjkUK_gHBa-P3Eof4-g3CPmYFc7bmVQiKl8SJGAAkWhXNX0a3VDq31VXIfQOp7gCuCxm8UueoSX1Jp1Ie9uXAL5q4xuAVSn1g_prBiVap6eh9MrFo7ORP0GPNJmiISLpGmS_Ic5uUQjOQGy7HX0atqCt4UvgTP5xVtI58f5b95N-OdNu-LUA%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d22c2ec080a84c9192a6a7d6597471b5&_e=Eol7Hm-8HG-DGOP3btG6AxQ_DXYTe30nzfINwRKKwot_7JLf2cUPk_YTwTYcVENStPgKvgKV32DYbw24kmYsOVkozhMsDd7bzYmRDnUiWFUno64dvu6wKPJw1EvueCvWkzTGBSeAg6lR0aZSPdOXeHyp74AgC_RUOLNuymsfc184kVX2QPYMVuR5sKPqyxulvfmIiaQ7Ef7BAnlYOBzqOTjlLxKsVzCD8FrjkUK_gHBa-P3Eof4-g3CPmYFc7bmVemKBDF57IK0g-LFvtjq1RNBrAtVWeZtPwGLl7ZoRpARNWYlOJeKoLTfBWD7DrVOOQUaOU67t3lJ3CwMmtYVk8OFM-tCxiD2BfiOoTpItJvPka5LwyOprAECY4T9BLZ9NLoRQI2NQ7x1TTHK0zxGZ7A%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d22c2ec080a84c9192a6a7d6597471b5&_e=Eol7Hm-8HG-DGOP3btG6AxQ_DXYTe30nzfINwRKKwot_7JLf2cUPk_YTwTYcVENStPgKvgKV32DYbw24kmYsOVkozhMsDd7bzYmRDnUiWFUno64dvu6wKPJw1EvueCvWkzTGBSeAg6lR0aZSPdOXeHyp74AgC_RUOLNuymsfc184kVX2QPYMVuR5sKPqyxulvfmIiaQ7Ef7BAnlYOBzqOTjlLxKsVzCD8FrjkUK_gHBa-P3Eof4-g3CPmYFc7bmVmRHkdwpMk9t3UA-5L8rM85ItIq7N_ly-_6cP5DZ7taVh-LuCTiRQmsR3w9VZNm3xNL6gW7xhDBX6WYzCFNboJe1coistvyuvcbg0BnoRGWtyHcpdTmsWOkuzM_nlgcHiHbYzhzADtZPC5g-cX9G3NQ%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. clean_body: | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. name: Zee
subject: Our ‘terrible resolve’
body:
| |
---
Why coming together in this moment is so important. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MDczMDAwOTc5NTYzNTQ2LFwiclwiOjE0NzA3MzAxNTU2NTI1NjYyMX0iLCJzIjoiODE5N2ExMWJmMmQwYTNlMyJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MDczMDAwOTg1ODU1MDAzLFwiclwiOjE0NzA3MzAxNTU2NTI1NjYyMX0iLCJzIjoiZTllOGY1MDk4MWIwNDg5ZCJ9)
---
|
---
Friend,

My name is Zee, and I am a Democratic political operative. And I am asking you to take a brief moment to read this message and consider joining our ranks at **National Ground Game**.

My journey into campaigns and politics began in 2016 on Bernie Sanders' transformative presidential campaign. That experience led me to AOC's underdog run in 2018, where I handled a crucial piece of the grassroots field program that fueled her inspiring victory.

|
---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MDczMDAwOTkwMDQ5MzA4LFwiclwiOjE0NzA3MzAxNTU2NTI1NjYyMX0iLCJzIjoiN2VlNzRkNGZlMmYwMmE2MiJ9)
---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MDczMDAwOTk0MjQzNjE0LFwiclwiOjE0NzA3MzAxNTU2NTI1NjYyMX0iLCJzIjoiM2UzZjhjNjdlMzVjNDI0YiJ9)
---
|
---
For Democrats casting about in the wilderness searching for the path back to power—and back into the hearts and minds of millions of American voters—a steady, strong, and seasoned ground organization is indispensable.

But before I discuss how we do this—and ask for your support for our new initiative, **National Ground Game** —I want to explain why I am reaching out _at this precise moment_.

After nearly a decade working in American politics with its intoxicating highs and abysmal lows, I can say this to you with absolute certainty: **our country and our democracy are at a breaking point**.

The threat that Trump posed was real when I started my political career in 2016, **_but it is even more urgent, and unimaginably dangerous, right now_**.

Trump and his MAGA loyalists are __celebrating the malice and cruelty__ of widespread deportations of immigrants and immigrant families who have no criminal history; __relishing in their mass layoffs and firings__ of federal workers with no justification, and no cause; and __enjoying completely unchecked power__ as they steamroll over Congress and the courts to position Trump as the sole source of authority over government (_aka, a dictator_):

|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MDczMDAwOTk3Mzg5MzQ0LFwiclwiOjE0NzA3MzAxNTU2NTI1NjYyMX0iLCJzIjoiY2Q0OGJhNmUyMDMxZGMzNiJ9)
---
|
---
These are the challenges and the very dark and very heavy burden that has fallen on all of us. But the outlook is not bleak—and it is far from hopeless.

The American people are, at this moment, like the “sleeping giant” in the legendary quote attributed to Isoroku Yamamoto, the Japanese Admiral who planned the attack on Pearl Harbor: “I fear all we have done is to awaken a sleeping giant and **_fill him with a terrible resolve_**.”

But nothing is going to happen on its own. No one is coming to save us from this danger—every single one of us must act, must do what we can, when we can, to fight back and **make sure that MAGA comes to understand _our terrible resolve_**.

National Ground Game is a grassroots group with a 50-state strategy to organize for the working class, to fight for universal healthcare, labor rights, and personal freedoms. We are having the deeper conversations that go beyond typical campaign outreach in an election season.

**Our team, and our mission, is on the rise.** There is massive enthusiasm and support for a unifying force to focus on fixing the fundamental problems that hold us back—and allow Trump to act as a dictator—and change hearts and minds on a personal level.
**
[I am asking if you will support this cause, Friend. And if you are ready to lace up your shoes and help rally our side to the task at hand, we are thrilled to have you with us. Can you help us start on the right foot by making a donation to National Ground Game today?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTQ3MDczMDAxMDAzNjgwODAxLFwiclwiOjE0NzA3MzAxNTU2NTI1NjYyMX0iLCJzIjoiMmNmNDJmZTY3ZTRkMGY0NiJ9)**

|

clean_body: | | Why coming together in this moment is so important. | | | | | Friend, My name is Zee, and I am a Democratic political operative. And I am asking you to take a brief moment to read this message and consider joining our ranks at National Ground Game. My journey into campaigns and politics began in 2016 on Bernie Sanders' transformative presidential campaign. That experience led me to AOC's underdog run in 2018, where I handled a crucial piece of the grassroots field program that fueled her inspiring victory. | | | | | | For Democrats casting about in the wilderness searching for the path back to power—and back into the hearts and minds of millions of American voters—a steady, strong, and seasoned ground organization is indispensable. But before I discuss how we do this—and ask for your support for our new initiative, National Ground Game —I want to explain why I am reaching out at this precise moment. After nearly a decade working in American politics with its intoxicating highs and abysmal lows, I can say this to you with absolute certainty: our country and our democracy are at a breaking point. The threat that Trump posed was real when I started my political career in 2016, but it is even more urgent, and unimaginably dangerous, right now. Trump and his MAGA loyalists are celebrating the malice and cruelty of widespread deportations of immigrants and immigrant families who have no criminal history; relishing in their mass layoffs and firings of federal workers with no justification, and no cause; and enjoying completely unchecked power as they steamroll over Congress and the courts to position Trump as the sole source of authority over government (aka, a dictator): | | | These are the challenges and the very dark and very heavy burden that has fallen on all of us. But the outlook is not bleak—and it is far from hopeless. The American people are, at this moment, like the “sleeping giant” in the legendary quote attributed to Isoroku Yamamoto, the Japanese Admiral who planned the attack on Pearl Harbor: “I fear all we have done is to awaken a sleeping giant and fill him with a terrible resolve.” But nothing is going to happen on its own. No one is coming to save us from this danger—every single one of us must act, must do what we can, when we can, to fight back and make sure that MAGA comes to understand our terrible resolve. National Ground Game is a grassroots group with a 50-state strategy to organize for the working class, to fight for universal healthcare, labor rights, and personal freedoms. We are having the deeper conversations that go beyond typical campaign outreach in an election season. Our team, and our mission, is on the rise. There is massive enthusiasm and support for a unifying force to focus on fixing the fundamental problems that hold us back—and allow Trump to act as a dictator—and change hearts and minds on a personal level. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for reading and for being in the fight. I hope you will join us. In Solidarity, Zee Cohen-Sanchez National Ground Game PAC | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | National Ground Game National Ground Game PAC PO Box 1004 La Mesa, California | | | ---|--- | You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us. |

But we need power to keep up the fight.We need to win back the House.= Thank you, Jimmy If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

name: History Facts
subject: Why don't we eat these breakfast foods anymore?
body:
Some of our favorite morning dishes have been around for thousands of years: In fact, researchers believe the earliest variations of pancakes and porridges were first eaten as far back as the Stone Age.

**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
President Donald Trump is a fighter--a man who doesn't back down when the stakes are high and the principles are clear. This week, we saw that grit on full display when **[he clashed with Maine Governor Janet Mills](https://substack.com/redirect/a16e55b2-5531-431a-8a72-8da8b15cd6d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over his executive order banning biological men from competing in women's sports. Mills, a Democrat with a stubborn streak, had the gall to defy Trump right to his face during a meeting of governors at the White House. "We'll see you in court," she sneered, digging in her heels against an order that protects fairness for female athletes. Trump's response? Classic: "You better comply, because you're not getting any federal funding if you don't." That's leadership. That's the kind of backbone America needs.
Let's get one thing straight: Trump has every legal right to withhold federal funds from states that thumb their noses at his directives. As the head of the executive branch, he's not just some figurehead--he's the chief enforcer of federal policy. The Constitution vests him with broad authority to execute the laws, and that includes leveraging the purse strings Congress has entrusted to his administration.
Federal funds aren't a free-for-all entitlement; they're a privilege, doled out with conditions. If a state like Maine wants to cash Uncle Sam's checks--$360 million for education alone in 2021-2022, by the way--it better play by the rules. Trump's executive order, signed February 5, isn't a suggestion; it's federal policy rooted in Title IX's plain intent to protect women's opportunities, not hand them over to biological males.
Mills' defiance is a textbook case of why federal funds are Trump's ace in the hole. She's betting on Maine's state laws--like the Maine Human Rights Act--to shield her from accountability, claiming she's "complying with state and federal law." Trump shot back, "We _are_ the federal law," and he's dead right. When push comes to shove, federal supremacy trumps state grandstanding. The Supreme Court's ruled time and again--think _McCulloch v. Maryland_ (1819)--that states don't get to cherry-pick which federal mandates they follow when they're pocketing Washington's money. Mills wants the cash without the compliance? That's not how it works.
**Now a brief message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Presented by: Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/a232feee-afd6-4803-ba7d-af3f41be6412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Elon Musk Dreams, Mode Mobile Delivers**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a232feee-afd6-4803-ba7d-af3f41be6412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As Elon Musk puts it, "Apple used to really bring out products that would blow people's minds." Those days are long gone, and a new smartphone company is stepping up to deliver the mind-blowing moments we've been missing. **[They've just been granted the stock ticker $MODE](https://substack.com/redirect/a232feee-afd6-4803-ba7d-af3f41be6412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the Nasdaq, and you can still make an investment in their pre-IPO offering.
Turning smartphones from an expense into an income stream, Mode has already **[helped users earn and save an eye-popping $325M+](https://substack.com/redirect/a232feee-afd6-4803-ba7d-af3f41be6412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and seen an astonishing 32,481% revenue growth rate over three years. Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb did it to hotels...And now, Mode Mobile is doing it to the $1 trillion smartphone industry.
Don't miss your chance to invest in the next big disruption to smartphones. **[Join 30,000+ shareholders and invest at $0.26/share today.](https://substack.com/redirect/a232feee-afd6-4803-ba7d-af3f41be6412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/a232feee-afd6-4803-ba7d-af3f41be6412?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Federal funding is the ultimate bargaining tool, and Trump knows it. Governors like Mills think they can undermine his agenda, cozying up to radical leftists who cheer men in women's locker rooms while ignoring the girls losing scholarships and medals. Trump's not bluffing when he threatens to cut the spigot. He did it with sanctuary cities in his first term, and he'll do it again. Maine's population, as Trump pointed out, doesn't even want this nonsense--polls show most Americans back keeping sports fair. Yet Mills doubles down, risking millions in education dollars over a fringe ideology. That's not courage; it's arrogance.
Critics will cry "bullying," but this isn't about intimidation--it's about accountability. The executive branch has discretion over how funds are allocated. If Mills wants to test that in court, as she threatened, let her. Trump welcomed it: "I'll see you in court. That should be a real easy one." He's not wrong. Title IX's purpose isn't ambiguous, and Maine's defiance doesn't rewrite it.
Trump's standing up for women's rights, plain and simple. States that flout his orders aren't just disrespecting him--they're disrespecting the voters who put him in office to fix this mess. Federal funds aren't a blank check for rogue governors to fund their pet projects while ignoring the White House. They're a tool to ensure unity and fairness. Mills can pout all she wants, but Trump's got the law, the people, and the money on his side. She'd do well to remember that before her state's budget takes a hit it can't afford.
* * *
# Thank you for your support!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/64e4652d-b6ea-428f-9cc9-8e2430f1891b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Phil Izon
subject: Frozen Odds Film Project, new petitions, Giessel push for taxes
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67ba4d9b6c3fe712772483f5&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67ba4ba76c3fe71277246edc%26ss_email_id%3D67ba4d9b6c3fe712772483f5%26ss_campaign_name%3DFrozen%2BOdds%2BFilm%2BProject%252C%2Bnew%2Bpetitions%252C%2BGiessel%2Bpush%2Bfor%2Btaxes%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-02-22T22%253A20%253A37Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67ba4ba76c3fe71277246edc&l=en-US&s=QtOvSgbA2wyJgmBgVqMfraIphPY%3D) |
---|---
| **I had planned to pay for the filming, production, and marketing for my new movie. But I wanted to open it up for people to help finance the film. Your contribution will help finance the film and you will be invited to private early screenings and opening. You will get a Frozen Odds physical and digital copy of the movie, you will also get a custom shirt and coffee cup. Finally, Your name will be featured in the credits of the movie. "Frozen Odds" we will start filming this spring / summer and I plan to bring some great people from around the country to Alaska and do interviews with Alaskans about their experience with Lisa Murkowski, Ranked Choice Voting, and the hard push by out of state interests to take over Alaska.****This project will be filmed with Netflix approved Red Digital Cameras, used on popular movies like Guardians of the Galaxy, Matrix, Skyfall, Wednesday and thousands more.**
---
[_ _ Click Here to Join Frozen Odds Film Project _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67ba4d9b6c3fe712772483f5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Ffrozen-odds&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67ba4ba76c3fe71277246edc&l=en-US&s=sly81pn5X8FXaV_5sIWBUzWPTjk%3D)
---
---
|
---
**Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**
---
#### **Ranked Choice Voting and Cathy Giessel**
---
**Ranked Choice Voting has consequences and Alaska is facing those in real time. Cathy Giessel was replaced with a Veteran many years ago when she was the Senate President. After she lost, she joined the board for Alaskans for Better Elections, aka Soros & Friends. Who pushed Ranked Choice Voting on Alaska with $7 million in 2020 and another $15 million in 2034 to defend the system. She won using Ranked Choice Voting in 2022. The unions donate to 1630 Fund, 1630 Fund is Arabella Advisors, Arabella sets up nonprofit in Alaska to push ballot initiatives to help Unions such as Automatic Voter Registration, Ranked Choice Voting, Minimum Wage Increase, and more coming soon. It’s best to understand your opponent’s playbook. They are using the same playbook in every state.**
---
|
---
**I have three petitions coming soon.****My competition spends millions to do a project that costs me 0.1% what they spend. Of course I’m going to continue.****1\. Voter ID / US Citizenship requirements / Election Integrity****2\. Ban foreign funding of ballot initiatives****3\. Remove voting machines for State and Federal elections in Alaska**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
| | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon
12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113
Eagle River 99577
United States [ Unsubscribe ](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67ba4d9b6c3fe712772483f5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2FHy7ctt-wge6whKeykS_VZbHaaNXGMlQI9vxO3-XR5yCGRZbbjRz9ZFI0PyEP-A28RODomGF1VnwX23lJAM53bsaHJkgrbx5XNvWWFYUhdP5XkrVYoh_84ZZB47ZB9DQm9RW7qFaO4X-t3eVeUwcooQG4mLMPaL2qWDvKsF2davHnmgM49mXe86yLtY4XdpKjL75ZZXefeHfowMiJnu_NUghcB9yso0ApYtUH0UkP2OKQbRkrC8y9QdxNHYwFYZ_LKt7JNen_cftDyLi4Po0CzIyrnzptxICkbKU4gRmMAt-Suvgzc5Jg0w0YckZPhbNMRUjXfGdsRZ6XKQIxbyZEDdHOPJo7_2fvvllLg8G9bgQTRfOfpRlrZvk%3D&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67ba4ba76c3fe71277246edc&l=en-US&s=B3X3FSkQktg6FRZvEOKQ_buablE%3D)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: You are not an ATM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

| |
---
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE or Elon Musk's work.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what Elon Musk and DOGE are doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

clean_body: Republicans are already laying the groundwork to flip Virginia red. | I’ll cut right to the chase, Derek: Virginia is the most important battleground in the country, and the only way we can flip it blue is with your support. | ************=********** As Finance Director, I see firsthand what it takes to win tough races. We defended our Democratic majority in the General Assembly – but that was just the beginning. Now, we’re heading full-speed into a massive fight to keep a Republican out of the Governor’s Mansion in November. National Republicans are bringing in immense amounts of money and test-driving history with their extreme, far-right policies. And make no mistake: they’re eyeing Virginia as their next big prize. If they succeed, they’ll have the opportunity to roll back everything we’ve fought for – abortion rights, human rights, public education, and so much more. But we have a secret weapon, Derek – you. Republicans may have billionaires and oligarchs on our side, but we’ve won time and time again through the power of grassroots support. The best way for you to pitch in to our fight is by becoming a monthly donor. = **********=********** **********=************ Virginia’s future depends on what we do today, and I know we can count on you. Thank you, Vicki Daguerre-Bradford Finance Director, DPVA [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. **Please read the following message from our sponsor.**

Did you know that astronauts rarely have heart problems?

Surprisingly, it all comes down to **one specific food they eat in outer space.**

_“This food works to clean your arteries and support your heart health by dissolving the sticky protein building up inside them,”_ says Dr. Sam Walters.

Dr. Sam Walters is a former nutrition consultant to NASA. He’s also a leading “heart doctor” whose natural solution has helped thousands of people enjoy a healthy heart without living on drugs.

He recommends his patients add this food as a staple in their diets... because multiple studies have shown that it can:

\- SLASH your risk of heart attack & stroke by nearly HALF
\- Lower “bad” LDL cholesterol & triglycerides
\- Keep your blood pressure under control
\- Unclog your arteries

Yet, up to 89% of Americans aren’t getting enough of it in their diets!

Fortunately, Dr. Walters has released a short video revealing the **#1 heart-healthy food** you should start eating today.

Watch it here:

With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**There are _12 special elections_** **over the next two months**. With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. **_8 states_** **are holding elections that require our immediate attention.** The MAGA movement could easily pour _millions of dollars_ into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way we can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. **_$7 from you_****is all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure a VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania.** [Can we count on you to chip in a 3X-matched gift of $7 to help state Dems defeat extreme Republicans in the states? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDUDA1SkpaNlXE6dSUgLwEEgEs0H_Dg_Jy_o-xajFXYWAlei0Q3Iw66LUQP8cD6BMZd-AIyyDvKd1jMZqMzOhTfLde4KKWz4tIn2bOFFr45CNU_DFkkrCETt219TeB-wPizut_5B8RMhNTkHy8Lom4xmuV3hbZuwNsc16y4i2M2n-sFv-c8hbXxNPC2XJ3zSm2gUBofhef8oNhD3E22Mg1Q-10Y6EjVMN_Jgd-ViXzS4d900a02RA5M3Vpna7P35hBh9gohewRuo7iimRawzBitm03wP8ySkuKT9odddCtZnHj3-xXS773FX2Na2IZotNCoCmbOp8zApUGmwTzPJUmsFEcjivkREHx-W5y7K9pDA0/4e8/jxilpnMLTA6eeFwlLel0GA/h0/h001.P6zfHHhug8J2XJvmAFAfVyxsAATOoLvwHq9D9boEy1w) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
