name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a2b763c99a345dfb94ae1deeda73488&_e=zrHusbQKzTAiqc-nL8QONb2XmQqc8vLNbfLcK87LakUymZUCMmYZgoIMFs2WvShpdQF-8wXCC-qA4lcEnM9fQw3LWWMt8WZxSL9owK801fO8-1aWyZMKnmzKM2gcAa9ycbTndHI0uGgmnfZOjR_fh0mXnrsN9dOnjdD4yzhdXEHsxnqdJXlj11R5FKWijigOPqmYh9e1ee4C7fgORnAittC4xcH3DxsEHNNXBBeoZLKcbGU0M7zUJS0HTjWvgKp01c1x3RoC1iypw-H9LhdI7XiGw7-ofFZWbjgUD-jLZWDczL9WR9_ZQQO_GdiDC8ipFCMe2kg2CBjb1YozLOLARw8gVXhA7c0GIIaAZ2HVlIBoNmgP83zj-rIOtEMizbG3)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a2b763c99a345dfb94ae1deeda73488&_e=zrHusbQKzTAiqc-nL8QONb2XmQqc8vLNbfLcK87LakUymZUCMmYZgoIMFs2WvShpdQF-8wXCC-qA4lcEnM9fQw3LWWMt8WZxSL9owK801fO8-1aWyZMKnmzKM2gcAa9ycbTndHI0uGgmnfZOjR_fh0mXnrsN9dOnjdD4yzhdXEHsxnqdJXlj11R5FKWijigOPqmYh9e1ee4C7fgORnAittC4xcH3DxsEHNNXBBeoZLJ6ompgbl2jYd2YOl_-yl7gZrJBKcJqTlEVwLz4TTvXQbR7p1C_zkJ6QMYYh0dJZNjVA5jynKnmILm3uKlOyf9ozGCImofY6igSuGjX52n425m479pU0z0MZq2auXZSfHIH11fnWQNdANBz07PF4Hd8)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a2b763c99a345dfb94ae1deeda73488&_e=zrHusbQKzTAiqc-nL8QONb2XmQqc8vLNbfLcK87LakUymZUCMmYZgoIMFs2WvShpdQF-8wXCC-qA4lcEnM9fQw3LWWMt8WZxSL9owK801fO8-1aWyZMKnmzKM2gcAa9ycbTndHI0uGgmnfZOjR_fh0mXnrsN9dOnjdD4yzhdXEHsxnqdJXlj11R5FKWijigOPqmYh9e1ee4C7fgORnAittC4xcH3DxsEHNNXBBeoZLI7GBlnFBecULs1uSuj7KXpGvo1iDNHseAwP1z3gguL2vfyNGGtmwCl-ehTbarcKccdu0gBx_DmX7z_gTnDh_UxL7iqHCl3V8FjugpCfOm-1y7PLRIP5JSt82vF_UiAUD5DZOXoIZX8IUYeYBegg8IL) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a2b763c99a345dfb94ae1deeda73488&_e=zrHusbQKzTAiqc-nL8QONb2XmQqc8vLNbfLcK87LakUymZUCMmYZgoIMFs2WvShpdQF-8wXCC-qA4lcEnM9fQw3LWWMt8WZxSL9owK801fO8-1aWyZMKnmzKM2gcAa9ycbTndHI0uGgmnfZOjR_fh0mXnrsN9dOnjdD4yzhdXEHsxnqdJXlj11R5FKWijigOPqmYh9e1ee4C7fgORnAittC4xcH3DxsEHNNXBBeoZLJI_jFQ9SduaUQzlbV3d4SzusGJ4RKc0o63luIvEORLQP1KR5rdY4QZ2tY61mQ5DNpNwjxHxaZfpJTVktcqjHWClTOdDM0E2w6jnh3RZBEG-rn9vzxauPz4_nxEKrze7s9ANzBRTPkYFL8POwIoKAOM)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1a2b763c99a345dfb94ae1deeda73488&_e=zrHusbQKzTAiqc-nL8QONb2XmQqc8vLNbfLcK87LakUymZUCMmYZgoIMFs2WvShpdQF-8wXCC-qA4lcEnM9fQw3LWWMt8WZxSL9owK801fO8-1aWyZMKnmzKM2gcAa9ycbTndHI0uGgmnfZOjR_fh0mXnrsN9dOnjdD4yzhdXEHsxnqdJXlj11R5FKWijigOPqmYh9e1ee4C7fgORnAittC4xcH3DxsEHNNXBBeoZLK1UakKLNzGtV_FPqguHIZMDuzAxWMJZSQiMDwBsEr8m_YPT3QeNkYgwVyBQUrtb75n-8wCigvQa6aaaCni7VO4BScjufV4kGm5r70EmMvVbQgPPn_vQ4JyBS-gQ-sV-pDYlWi9HByFy_aBHG9g0iv4)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---

clean_body: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. name: Rebecca Weber
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. | |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjqlkvDRWqkM4qtLT-NUDqCEdeSOZa6RCJQLgIrQbB62zCbekJRAgYP4DJ91TGsDcX9Ywl2jj1NDK_CuVXIdY_FQu9EZZHfAHRIMNACCBWQ0fpNj90eTPm8nweu_xHosVhSAVpYzCwjsHb1rdGo_3Kvg%3D)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjjaCR2b470LPzfzYriw7Zfn3GgSXr18FKOBjVzGmlZBhk1rJLf9VS8Kd3l_OCF70_gTdjYOSTfciBWaUwGJjBZK2UEWDnxpVw4uXL7IvrHerAm5a3kSL0iNOL93faGetMJHDcVAs79WM4iSHKOQSPtM%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjvCi26vn2j4EeMvCTgjR8wSS-jStLXlFvJubi1WIMcTomq394wwdZgS7OXKZ3Y5SCmCT5hkNuThgjoSZfLl9IwTLVCxFj1utrP0ZieWk9jOv9uVqpv0YrPMWZvR5ly7owdZQLe-6nCti1ugk6jVlSXY%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNBCq9k_WRe7Cv4hdeXnj7bbU_diY--Km-CvBpmpdEWIES3cN6QItCDCyovEbx7z_WIwJrU0RTWGj_8pDhJMF0bIxdCCsGOFAQ4kR02C1BqknzjLoMOxn3T5f2g0swqJZNhQiD4MUG-PDumatKfM0IEpKf2Vmj-1VqLlC0JOuYcDTNYKLO_3hrH8RlmrkH_QIwo%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjoLZjqyF6E4YCIT_ilefOjI6ekvsPyL1L4OO0-xm2tig6QbJsePN6JEkwCLpTeiGLHj-pyxanczeIqc9XiT6Bg7saJPnEZ0hya1i2gB83RbDuxMLJjq5vUCBbMbvVHUJI3SCnDAr2kk98aH9Qb9-KuY%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjlnFLNoNzwy9QDdyovPnhcptBm7JbZSM1gvVm7VXwSv5UaYI-bOLeQY8krkszQF33itB4ennbFt0Q7oCFjSvKPnKmHEK2hx2VVEX3p3JHnsnmis-VBwK39CPowIIAD_6ybxycwfE9qZ0W-qUAPQ2CCQ%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjmU-AuYIBurlOEEdxwi4f-qclo3zLCNFP3wz4R5_YXxutGkYtr143kL3k79F4adkx5C4TpzfdjfJbbhOPHfSKzv-lubcplPQsNVYGEp9POxff1F4ZosybuNrbUanG0NuIfgBS9vfyx-9bddsEJUz4ck%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7392cb1f3ccf46d5b19f5dfa837c7fde&_e=xaBbf6zKLH4-SQV5oL13EzhZetpKg3WbuTpHeYophNDxDLrmthVqA6nJeobMct0B1OJLtDm81naKBoAPnvFG7CCuHyO2D6wiMQWRxmMV0xauR5RbAehUKveMP2XwUvrYC7Myx_7jaaTjJOrCmqOE4g6CR67v0eTu7Fou6JAnKHUhwotaQpaX2blhhgAb5t0Ue2QON7mwBiwp2YjwZYIxjkksXCFvnqYr-CyIK6zxdJDnCDSoBnQn8CETuyHMh1ojSOqBU_Gadyz9NV0IfVkGI4U1K7wP9DEQN897MCbYcyDbWh_Vw1OlSd9QuUKhFwo159o46gmJzRcwsNUMbaBrTAQUfN4ni7asmcIpI2FK8To%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---

clean_body: Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. Peter,

At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.

I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...

**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**

**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**

And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.

**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**

subject: Musk's DOGE Appointee Raises Serious Concerns

body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear Friends,
Recent reports have unveiled troubling details about Edward Coristine, a 19-year-old appointed by Elon Musk to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
Coristine, known by the online moniker "Big Balls," (haha, thanks Elon 😒), has been tasked with evaluating federal employees, often pressuring them to justify their roles under the threat of replacement by AI. His rapid ascent, marked by aggressive tactics and a controversial past, exemplifies the reckless approach of Musk's administration.
I need your help before April 1st to snowball our way into eliminating these ludicrous hires and senseless threats.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/614C384C6862716A7774375235766139355A4D75346657625478626F6469712B66557677763561596E70484B4A2B677670536D7069317A4B653835384B676A2F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-22%20at%201.43.42%E2%80%AFPM%201.png]
We are witnessing first hand the dangers of entrusting critical government functions to unvetted individuals with questionable backgrounds. Elon is NOT committed to restoring integrity, transparency, and accountability in our government. We must ensure that public service is conducted by qualified professionals dedicated to serving the American people, not by those seeking to dismantle our institutions for personal gain.
Join in the fight today, with just a $9 donation, and support a campaign that works for YOU, not for big tech millionaires. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
